title: Mixed Evidence for Gestalt Grouping in Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络中格式塔分组的混合证据
abstract: Gestalt psychologists have identified a range of conditions in which humans organize elements of a scene into a group or whole, and perceptual grouping principles play an essential role in scene perception and object identification. Recently, Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) trained on natural images (ImageNet) have been proposed as compelling models of human vision based on reports that they perform well on various brain and behavioral benchmarks. Here we test a total of 16 networks covering a variety of architectures and learning paradigms (convolutional, attention-based, supervised and self-supervised, feed-forward and recurrent) on dots (Experiment 1) and more complex shapes (Experiment 2) stimuli that produce strong Gestalts effects in humans. In Experiment 1 we found that convolutional networks were indeed sensitive in a human-like fashion to the principles of proximity, linearity, and orientation, but only at the output layer. In Experiment 2, we found that most networks exhibited Gestalt effects only for a few sets, and again only at the latest stage of processing. Overall, self-supervised and Vision-Transformer appeared to perform worse than convolutional networks in terms of human similarity. Remarkably, no model presented a grouping effect at the early or intermediate stages of processing. This is at odds with the widespread assumption that Gestalts occur prior to object recognition, and indeed, serve to organize the visual scene for the sake of object recognition. Our overall conclusion is that, albeit noteworthy that networks trained on simple 2D images support a form of Gestalt grouping for some stimuli at the output layer, this ability does not seem to transfer to more complex features. Additionally, the fact that this grouping only occurs at the last layer suggests that networks learn fundamentally different perceptual properties than humans.

Recently, Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) trained on natural images (ImageNet) have been proposed as compelling models of human vision based on reports that they perform well on various brain and behavioral benchmarks. Here we test a total of 16 networks covering a variety of architectures and learning paradigms (convolutional, attention-based, supervised and self-supervised, feed-forward and recurrent) on dots (Experiment 1) and more complex shapes (Experiment 2) stimuli that produce strong Gestalts effects in humans. In Experiment 1 we found that convolutional networks were indeed sensitive in a human-like fashion to the principles of proximity, linearity, and orientation, but only at the output layer. In Experiment 2, we found that most networks exhibited Gestalt effects only for a few sets, and again only at the latest stage of processing. Overall, self-supervised and Vision-Transformer appeared to perform worse than convolutional networks in terms of human similarity. Remarkably, no model presented a grouping effect at the early or intermediate stages of processing. This is at odds with the widespread assumption that Gestalts occur prior to object recognition, and indeed, serve to organize the visual scene for the sake of object recognition. abstract_zh: 格式塔心理学家已经确定了人类将场景元素组织成一组或整体的一系列条件，而感知分组原则在场景感知和对象识别中发挥着重要作用。最近，根据自然图像 (ImageNet) 训练的深度神经网络 (DNN) 在各种大脑和行为基准上表现良好的报告，它们被提议作为令人信服的人类视觉模型。在这里，我们在点（实验 1）和更复杂的形状（实验 2）刺激上测试了总共 16 个网络，涵盖各种架构和学习范式（卷积、基于注意力、监督和自监督、前馈和循环），这些刺激对人类产生强烈的格式塔效应。在实验 1 中，我们发现卷积网络确实以类似人类的方式对邻近性、线性和方向原则敏感，但仅限于输出层。在实验 2 中，我们发现大多数网络仅在少数组中表现出格式塔效应，而且仅在处理的最新阶段。总体而言，在人类相似性方面，自监督网络和 Vision-Transformer 的表现似乎比卷积网络差。值得注意的是，没有模型在处理的早期或中期阶段表现出分组效应。这与普遍的假设不一致，即格式塔发生在对象识别之前，并且实际上，格式塔用于为了对象识别而组织视觉场景。我们的总体结论是，尽管值得注意的是，在简单 2D 图像上训练的网络支持对输出层的某些刺激进行格式塔分组，但这种能力似乎并没有转移到更复杂的特征。此外，这种分组仅发生在最后一层的事实表明，网络学习的感知属性与人类根本不同。

AI.tldr: 该论文测试了16种深度神经网络在处理产生格式塔效应的刺激时的表现，探讨其是否具备类似人类的感知分组能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络在视觉任务上表现优异，但其是否像人类一样遵循格式塔分组原则尚不清楚，需验证模型是否具备类似人类的感知机制。
AI.method: 通过实验1（点刺激）和实验2（复杂形状）测试卷积、注意力、自监督等不同架构网络，分析其在不同处理阶段对格式塔原则（接近性、线性、方向等）的响应。
AI.result: 卷积网络仅在输出层表现出有限的人类相似分组效应，其他网络在后期阶段效果有限，自监督模型和Vision Transformer表现较差，且所有模型均无早期分组能力。
AI.conclusion: 深度神经网络虽在输出层部分支持格式塔分组，但无法推广至复杂特征，且分组仅发生在最后阶段，表明其学习的感知特性与人类存在本质差异。

authors_text: Giuseppe Stragapede,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Ruben Tolosana,Aythami Morales,Alejandro Acien,Gael Le Lan
title: Mobile Behavioral Biometrics for Passive Authentication
title_zh: 用于被动身份验证的移动行为生物识别
abstract: Current mobile user authentication systems based on PIN codes, fingerprint, and face recognition have several shortcomings. Such limitations have been addressed in the literature by exploring the feasibility of passive authentication on mobile devices through behavioral biometrics. In this line of research, this work carries out a comparative analysis of unimodal and multimodal behavioral biometric traits acquired while the subjects perform different activities on the phone such as typing, scrolling, drawing a number, and tapping on the screen, considering the touchscreen and the simultaneous background sensor data (accelerometer, gravity sensor, gyroscope, linear accelerometer, and magnetometer). Our experiments are performed over HuMIdb, one of the largest and most comprehensive freely available mobile user interaction databases to date. A separate Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) with triplet loss is implemented for each single modality. Then, the weighted fusion of the different modalities is carried out at score level. In our experiments, the most discriminative background sensor is the magnetometer, whereas among touch tasks the best results are achieved with keystroke in a fixed-text scenario. In all cases, the fusion of modalities is very beneficial, leading to Equal Error Rates (EER) ranging from 4% to 9% depending on the modality combination in a 3-second interval.
summary: Current mobile user authentication systems based on PIN codes, fingerprint, and face recognition have several shortcomings. Such limitations have been addressed in the literature by exploring the feasibility of passive authentication on mobile devices through behavioral biometrics. In this line of research, this work carries out a comparative analysis of unimodal and multimodal behavioral biometric traits acquired while the subjects perform different activities on the phone such as typing, scrolling, drawing a number, and tapping on the screen, considering the touchscreen and the simultaneous background sensor data (accelerometer, gravity sensor, gyroscope, linear accelerometer, and magnetometer). Our experiments are performed over HuMIdb, one of the largest and most comprehensive freely available mobile user interaction databases to date. A separate Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) with triplet loss is implemented for each single modality. Then, the weighted fusion of the different modalities is carried out at score level. In our experiments, the most discriminative background sensor is the magnetometer, whereas among touch tasks the best results are achieved with keystroke in a fixed-text scenario. In all cases, the fusion of modalities is very beneficial, leading to Equal Error Rates (EER) ranging from 4% to 9% depending on the modality combination in a 3-second interval.
abstract_zh: 当前基于 PIN 码、指纹和人脸识别的移动用户身份验证系统存在一些缺点。文献中已通过行为生物识别技术探索移动设备上被动身份验证的可行性来解决这些限制。在这方面的研究中，这项工作对受试者在手机上执行不同活动（例如打字、滚动、画数字和点击屏幕）时获得的单模态和多模态行为生物特征进行了比较分析，同时考虑了触摸屏和同步背景传感器数据（加速度计、重力传感器、陀螺仪、线性加速度计和磁力计）。我们的实验是在 HuMIdb 上进行的，HuMIdb 是迄今为止最大、最全面的免费移动用户交互数据库之一。为每个单一模态实现一个具有三元组损失的单独循环神经网络（RNN）。然后，在分数级别上进行不同模态的加权融合。在我们的实验中，最具辨别力的背景传感器是磁力计，而在触摸任务中，最好的结果是通过在固定文本场景中击键来实现的。在所有情况下，模态融合都非常有益，根据 3 秒间隔内的模态组合，等错误率 (EER) 范围为 4% 到 9%。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过比较单模态和多模态行为生物特征，研究手机被动认证的可行性，利用触摸屏及背景传感器数据进行分析。
AI.motivation: 传统移动设备认证方式（如PIN码、指纹）存在不足，需探索无需用户主动参与的被动认证方法以提升安全性和便捷性。
AI.method: 基于HuMIdb数据库，采用循环神经网络（RNN）与三元组损失处理单模态数据，通过分数级加权融合多模态信息，结合触摸行为与背景传感器（如磁力计、加速度计）数据进行实验。
AI.result: 磁力计为最优背景传感器，固定文本输入场景下的按键行为表现最佳；多模态融合使等错误率（EER）降至4%-9%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合显著提升认证性能，磁力计与固定文本输入为关键因素，为无缝被动认证提供了有效技术路径。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文通过比较单模态和多模态行为生物特征，研究手机被动认证的可行性，利用触摸屏及背景传感器数据进行分析。

In all cases, the fusion of modalities is very beneficial, leading to Equal Error Rates (EER) ranging from 4% to 9% depending on the modality combination in a 3-second interval. 当前基于 PIN 码、指纹和人脸识别的移动用户身份验证系统存在一些缺点。文献中已通过行为生物识别技术探索移动设备上被动身份验证的可行性来解决这些限制。在这方面的研究中，这项工作对受试者在手机上执行不同活动（例如打字、滚动、画数字和点击屏幕）时获得的单模态和多模态行为生物特征进行了比较分析，同时考虑了触摸屏和同步背景传感器数据（加速度计、重力传感器、陀螺仪、线性加速度计和磁力计）。我们的实验是在 HuMIdb 上进行的，HuMIdb 是迄今为止最大、最全面的免费移动用户交互数据库之一。为每个单一模态实现一个具有三元组损失的单独循环神经网络（RNN）。然后，在分数级别上进行不同模态的加权融合。在我们的实验中，最具辨别力的背景传感器是磁力计，而在触摸任务中，最好的结果是通过在固定文本场景中击键来实现的。在所有情况下，模态融合都非常有益，根据 3 秒间隔内的模态组合，等错误率 (EER) 范围为 4% 到 9%。 该论文通过比较单模态和多模态行为生物特征，研究手机被动认证的可行性，利用触摸屏及背景传感器数据进行分析。 Giuseppe Stragapede,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Ruben Tolosana,Aythami Morales,Alejandro Acien,Gael Le Lan cs.CV

authors_text: Anna Frühstück,Krishna Kumar Singh,Eli Shechtman,Niloy J. Mitra,Peter Wonka,Jingwan Lu
title: InsetGAN for Full-Body Image Generation
title_zh: 用于全身图像生成的 InsetGAN
comment: Project webpage and video available at http://afruehstueck.github.io/insetgan
comments: Project webpage and video available at http://afruehstueck.github.io/insetgan
abstract: While GANs can produce photo-realistic images in ideal conditions for certain domains, the generation of full-body human images remains difficult due to the diversity of identities, hairstyles, clothing, and the variance in pose. Instead of modeling this complex domain with a single GAN, we propose a novel method to combine multiple pretrained GANs, where one GAN generates a global canvas (e.g., human body) and a set of specialized GANs, or insets, focus on different parts (e.g., faces, shoes) that can be seamlessly inserted onto the global canvas. We model the problem as jointly exploring the respective latent spaces such that the generated images can be combined, by inserting the parts from the specialized generators onto the global canvas, without introducing seams. We demonstrate the setup by combining a full body GAN with a dedicated high-quality face GAN to produce plausible-looking humans. We evaluate our results with quantitative metrics and user studies.
summary: While GANs can produce photo-realistic images in ideal conditions for certain domains, the generation of full-body human images remains difficult due to the diversity of identities, hairstyles, clothing, and the variance in pose. Instead of modeling this complex domain with a single GAN, we propose a novel method to combine multiple pretrained GANs, where one GAN generates a global canvas (e.g., human body) and a set of specialized GANs, or insets, focus on different parts (e.g., faces, shoes) that can be seamlessly inserted onto the global canvas. We model the problem as jointly exploring the respective latent spaces such that the generated images can be combined, by inserting the parts from the specialized generators onto the global canvas, without introducing seams. We demonstrate the setup by combining a full body GAN with a dedicated high-quality face GAN to produce plausible-looking humans. We evaluate our results with quantitative metrics and user studies.
abstract_zh: 虽然 GAN 可以在某些领域的理想条件下生成逼真的图像，但由于身份、发型、服装和姿势的差异，生成全身人体图像仍然很困难。我们提出了一种结合多个预训练 GAN 的新方法，而不是使用单个 GAN 对这个复杂的领域进行建模，其中一个 GAN 生成一个全局画布（例如人体）和一组专门的 GAN 或插图，专注于可以无缝插入到全局画布上的不同部分（例如面部、鞋子）。我们将问题建模为共同探索各自的潜在空间，以便通过将专用生成器中的部分插入到全局画布上来组合生成的图像，而不会引入接缝。我们通过将全身 GAN 与专用的高质量面部 GAN 相结合来演示该设置，以生成看起来可信的人类。我们通过定量指标和用户研究来评估我们的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InsetGAN方法，通过结合多个预训练GAN模型生成全身体图像，其中全局GAN生成整体人体画布，专用GAN生成局部细节并无缝融合。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN在生成全身体图像时面临身份、发型、服装和姿态多样性带来的挑战，单一模型难以有效建模复杂域。
AI.method: 将全局GAN与多个专用GAN（insets）结合，全局模型生成基础画布，局部模型生成特定部位（如面部、鞋子），通过联合探索潜在空间实现无缝融合。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成无接缝的合理人体图像，定量指标和用户研究验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: InsetGAN通过分解生成任务并整合多模型优势，为复杂全身体图像生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kanishka Ganguly,Pavan Mantripragada,Chethan M. Parameshwara,Cornelia Fermüller,Nitin J. Sanket,Yiannis Aloimonos
title: GradTac: Spatio-Temporal Gradient Based Tactile Sensing
title_zh: GradTac：基于时空梯度的触觉感知
comment: 12 pages, 12 figures, 1 table Submitted to Frontiers in Robotics and AI under Multisensory Perception and Learning towards Dexterous Robot Manipulation and Interaction
comments: 12 pages, 12 figures, 1 table Submitted to Frontiers in Robotics and AI under Multisensory Perception and Learning towards Dexterous Robot Manipulation and Interaction
abstract: Tactile sensing for robotics is achieved through a variety of mechanisms, including magnetic, optical-tactile, and conductive fluid. Currently, the fluid-based sensors have struck the right balance of anthropomorphic sizes and shapes and accuracy of tactile response measurement. However, this design is plagued by a low Signal to Noise Ratio (SNR) due to the fluid based sensing mechanism "damping" the measurement values that are hard to model. To this end, we present a spatio-temporal gradient representation on the data obtained from fluid-based tactile sensors, which is inspired from neuromorphic principles of event based sensing. We present a novel algorithm (GradTac) that converts discrete data points from spatial tactile sensors into spatio-temporal surfaces and tracks tactile contours across these surfaces. Processing the tactile data using the proposed spatio-temporal domain is robust, makes it less susceptible to the inherent noise from the fluid based sensors, and allows accurate tracking of regions of touch as compared to using the raw data. We successfully evaluate and demonstrate the efficacy of GradTac on many real-world experiments performed using the Shadow Dexterous Hand, equipped with the BioTac SP sensors. Specifically, we use it for tracking tactile input across the sensor's surface, measuring relative forces, detecting linear and rotational slip, and for edge tracking. We also release an accompanying task-agnostic dataset for the BioTac SP, which we hope will provide a resource to compare and quantify various novel approaches, and motivate further research.
summary: Tactile sensing for robotics is achieved through a variety of mechanisms, including magnetic, optical-tactile, and conductive fluid. Currently, the fluid-based sensors have struck the right balance of anthropomorphic sizes and shapes and accuracy of tactile response measurement. However, this design is plagued by a low Signal to Noise Ratio (SNR) due to the fluid based sensing mechanism "damping" the measurement values that are hard to model. To this end, we present a spatio-temporal gradient representation on the data obtained from fluid-based tactile sensors, which is inspired from neuromorphic principles of event based sensing. We present a novel algorithm (GradTac) that converts discrete data points from spatial tactile sensors into spatio-temporal surfaces and tracks tactile contours across these surfaces. Processing the tactile data using the proposed spatio-temporal domain is robust, makes it less susceptible to the inherent noise from the fluid based sensors, and allows accurate tracking of regions of touch as compared to using the raw data. We successfully evaluate and demonstrate the efficacy of GradTac on many real-world experiments performed using the Shadow Dexterous Hand, equipped with the BioTac SP sensors. Specifically, we use it for tracking tactile input across the sensor's surface, measuring relative forces, detecting linear and rotational slip, and for edge tracking. We also release an accompanying task-agnostic dataset for the BioTac SP, which we hope will provide a resource to compare and quantify various novel approaches, and motivate further research.
abstract_zh: 机器人的触觉传感是通过多种机制实现的，包括磁性、光学触觉和导电流体。目前，基于流体的传感器已经在拟人化尺寸和形状以及触觉响应测量的准确性之间取得了适当的平衡。然而，由于基于流体的传感机制“抑制”了难以建模的测量值，该设计受到低信噪比 (SNR) 的困扰。为此，我们提出了从基于流体的触觉传感器获得的数据的时空梯度表示，其灵感来自基于事件的传感的神经形态原理。我们提出了一种新颖的算法（GradTac），它将空间触觉传感器的离散数据点转换为时空表面，并跟踪这些表面上的触觉轮廓。使用所提出的时空域处理触觉数据是鲁棒的，使其不易受到基于流体的传感器的固有噪声的影响，并且与使用原始数据相比，允许准确跟踪触摸区域。我们在使用配备 BioTac SP 传感器的 Shadow Dexterous Hand 进行的许多实际实验中成功评估并证明了 GradTac 的功效。具体来说，我们用它来跟踪传感器表面的触觉输入、测量相对力、检测线性和旋转滑动以及边缘跟踪。我们还为 BioTac SP 发布了一个与任务无关的数据集，我们希望该数据集能够提供资源来比较和量化各种新方法，并激发进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GradTac方法，通过时空梯度表示提升流体基触觉传感器的信号噪声比，实现更精确的触觉感知。
AI.motivation: 流体基触觉传感器因流体机制导致信噪比低，难以准确建模和测量触觉响应，需改进数据处理方法以增强鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于神经形态事件感知原理，将离散触觉数据转换为时空表面，通过时空梯度追踪触觉轮廓，降低噪声影响。
AI.result: 在Shadow Dexterous Hand上验证GradTac的有效性，成功实现触觉输入跟踪、力测量、滑动检测及边缘追踪，并发布BioTac SP任务无关数据集。
AI.conclusion: GradTac通过时空域处理显著提升触觉感知精度，为触觉传感器噪声抑制和区域追踪提供新思路，数据集助力后续研究。

authors_text: Wenhao Yu,Chenguang Zhu,Lianhui Qin,Zhihan Zhang,Tong Zhao,Meng Jiang
title: Diversifying Content Generation for Commonsense Reasoning with Mixture of Knowledge Graph Experts
title_zh: 知识图专家混合的常识推理内容生成多样化
abstract: Generative commonsense reasoning (GCR) in natural language is to reason about the commonsense while generating coherent text. Recent years have seen a surge of interest in improving the generation quality of commonsense reasoning tasks. Nevertheless, these approaches have seldom investigated diversity in the GCR tasks, which aims to generate alternative explanations for a real-world situation or predict all possible outcomes. Diversifying GCR is challenging as it expects to generate multiple outputs that are not only semantically different but also grounded in commonsense knowledge. In this paper, we propose MoKGE, a novel method that diversifies the generative reasoning by a mixture of expert (MoE) strategy on commonsense knowledge graphs (KG). A set of knowledge experts seek diverse reasoning on KG to encourage various generation outputs. Empirical experiments demonstrated that MoKGE can significantly improve the diversity while achieving on par performance on accuracy on two GCR benchmarks, based on both automatic and human evaluations.
summary: Generative commonsense reasoning (GCR) in natural language is to reason about the commonsense while generating coherent text. Recent years have seen a surge of interest in improving the generation quality of commonsense reasoning tasks. Nevertheless, these approaches have seldom investigated diversity in the GCR tasks, which aims to generate alternative explanations for a real-world situation or predict all possible outcomes. Diversifying GCR is challenging as it expects to generate multiple outputs that are not only semantically different but also grounded in commonsense knowledge. In this paper, we propose MoKGE, a novel method that diversifies the generative reasoning by a mixture of expert (MoE) strategy on commonsense knowledge graphs (KG). A set of knowledge experts seek diverse reasoning on KG to encourage various generation outputs. Empirical experiments demonstrated that MoKGE can significantly improve the diversity while achieving on par performance on accuracy on two GCR benchmarks, based on both automatic and human evaluations.
abstract_zh: 自然语言中的生成常识推理（GCR）是在生成连贯文本的同时推理常识。近年来，人们对提高常识推理任务的生成质量的兴趣激增。然而，这些方法很少研究 GCR 任务的多样性，其目的是为现实世界的情况生成替代解释或预测所有可能的结果。使 GCR 多样化具有挑战性，因为它期望生成多个输出，这些输出不仅在语义上不同，而且基于常识知识。在本文中，我们提出了 MoKGE，这是一种通过常识知识图（KG）上的专家（MoE）策略混合来使生成推理多样化的新方法。一组知识专家在 KG 上寻求多样化的推理，以鼓励不同的生成输出。实证实验表明，基于自动和人工评估，MoKGE 可以显着提高多样性，同时在两个 GCR 基准上实现同等的准确度性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决生成式常识推理（GCR）任务中生成多样化输出的问题，同时保持生成内容的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在GCR任务中主要关注生成质量，但忽视了生成多样性的需求，而多样化生成需要同时满足语义差异和常识知识支撑的挑战。
AI.method: 提出MoKGE方法，利用混合专家（MoE）策略在常识知识图谱上，通过多个知识专家生成多样化的推理路径以促进多样化输出。
AI.result: 实验表明，MoKGE在两个GCR基准测试中显著提升生成多样性，同时保持与现有方法相当的准确性，通过自动和人工评估验证。
AI.conclusion: MoKGE有效平衡了生成多样性和准确性，为常识推理任务提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Diversifying Content Generation for Commonsense Reasoning with Mixture of Knowledge Graph Experts 知识图专家混合的常识推理内容生成多样化 Generative commonsense reasoning (GCR) in natural language is to reason about the commonsense while generating coherent text. Recent years have seen a surge of interest in improving the generation quality of commonsense reasoning tasks. Nevertheless, these approaches have seldom investigated diversity in the GCR tasks, which aims to generate alternative explanations for a real-world situation or predict all possible outcomes. Diversifying GCR is challenging as it expects to generate multiple outputs that are not only semantically different but also grounded in commonsense knowledge. In this paper, we propose MoKGE, a novel method that diversifies the generative reasoning by a mixture of expert (MoE) strategy on commonsense knowledge graphs (KG). A set of knowledge experts seek diverse reasoning on KG to encourage various generation outputs. Empirical experiments demonstrated that MoKGE can significantly improve the diversity while achieving on par performance on accuracy on two GCR benchmarks, based on both automatic and human evaluations. 自然语言中的生成常识推理（GCR）是在生成连贯文本的同时推理常识。近年来，人们对提高常识推理任务的生成质量的兴趣激增。然而，这些方法很少研究 GCR 任务的多样性，其目的是为现实世界的情况生成替代解释或预测所有可能的结果。使 GCR 多样化具有挑战性，因为它期望生成多个输出，这些输出不仅在语义上不同，而且基于常识知识。在本文中，我们提出了 MoKGE，这是一种通过常识知识图（KG）上的专家（MoE）策略混合来使生成推理多样化的新方法。一组知识专家在 KG 上寻求多样化的推理，以鼓励不同的生成输出。实证实验表明，基于自动和人工评估，MoKGE 可以显着提高多样性，同时在两个 GCR 基准上实现同等的准确度性能。 本文旨在解决生成式常识推理（GCR）任务中生成多样化输出的问题，同时保持生成内容的准确性。 Wenhao Yu,Chenguang Zhu,Lianhui Qin,Zhihan Zhang,Tong Zhao,Meng Jiang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: GrIPS: Gradient-free, Edit-based Instruction Search for Prompting Large Language Models
title_zh: GrIPS：用于提示大型语言模型的无梯度、基于编辑的指令搜索
abstract: Providing natural language instructions in prompts is a useful new paradigm for improving task performance of large language models in a zero-shot setting. Recent work has aimed to improve such prompts via manual rewriting or gradient-based tuning. However, manual rewriting is time-consuming and requires subjective interpretation, while gradient-based tuning can be extremely computationally demanding for large models and may not be feasible for API-based models. In this work, we introduce Gradient-free Instructional Prompt Search (GrIPS), a gradient-free, edit-based search approach for improving task instructions for large language models. GrIPS takes in instructions designed for humans and automatically returns an improved, edited prompt, while allowing for API-based tuning. With InstructGPT models, GrIPS improves the average task performance by up to 4.30 percentage points on eight classification tasks from the Natural Instructions dataset (with similar improvements for OPT, BLOOM, and FLAN-T5). We see improvements for both instruction-only prompts and instruction + k-shot examples prompts. Notably, GrIPS outperforms manual rewriting and purely example-based prompts while controlling for the available compute and data budget. Further, performance of GrIPS is comparable to select gradient-based tuning approaches. Qualitatively, we show our edits can simplify instructions and at times make them incoherent but nonetheless improve accuracy. Our code is available at: https://github.com/archiki/GrIPS
summary: Providing natural language instructions in prompts is a useful new paradigm for improving task performance of large language models in a zero-shot setting. Recent work has aimed to improve such prompts via manual rewriting or gradient-based tuning. However, manual rewriting is time-consuming and requires subjective interpretation, while gradient-based tuning can be extremely computationally demanding for large models and may not be feasible for API-based models. In this work, we introduce Gradient-free Instructional Prompt Search (GrIPS), a gradient-free, edit-based search approach for improving task instructions for large language models. GrIPS takes in instructions designed for humans and automatically returns an improved, edited prompt, while allowing for API-based tuning. With InstructGPT models, GrIPS improves the average task performance by up to 4.30 percentage points on eight classification tasks from the Natural Instructions dataset (with similar improvements for OPT, BLOOM, and FLAN-T5). We see improvements for both instruction-only prompts and instruction + k-shot examples prompts. Notably, GrIPS outperforms manual rewriting and purely example-based prompts while controlling for the available compute and data budget. Further, performance of GrIPS is comparable to select gradient-based tuning approaches. Qualitatively, we show our edits can simplify instructions and at times make them incoherent but nonetheless improve accuracy. Our code is available at: https://github.com/archiki/GrIPS
abstract_zh: 在提示中提供自然语言指令是一种有用的新范例，可在零样本设置中提高大型语言模型的任务性能。最近的工作旨在通过手动重写或基于梯度的调整来改进此类提示。然而，手动重写非常耗时并且需要主观解释，而基于梯度的调整对于大型模型的计算要求极高，并且对于基于 API 的模型可能不可行。在这项工作中，我们引入了无梯度指令提示搜索（GrIPS），这是一种无梯度、基于编辑的搜索方法，用于改进大型语言模型的任务指令。 GrIPS 接受为人类设计的指令，并自动返回改进的、编辑过的提示，同时允许基于 API 的调整。借助 InstructGPT 模型，GrIPS 将自然指令数据集的八个分类任务的平均任务性能提高了高达 4.30 个百分点（OPT、BLOOM 和 FLAN-T5 也有类似的改进）。我们看到纯指令提示和指令 + k-shot 示例提示都得到了改进。值得注意的是，GrIPS 在控制可用计算和数据预算的同时优于手动重写和纯粹基于示例的提示。此外，GrIPS 的性能与选择的基于梯度的调整方法相当。定性地，我们表明我们的编辑可以简化指令，有时会使它们变得不连贯，但仍然提高了准确性。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/archiki/GrIPS

AI.tldr: 本文提出GrIPS，一种无需梯度的编辑式指令搜索方法，用于优化大语言模型的提示指令。
AI.motivation: 传统手动重写指令耗时且主观，而基于梯度的调优计算成本高且不适用于API模型，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: GrIPS通过编辑人类设计的指令生成优化提示，无需梯度计算，支持API调优，结合指令与少量示例提升效果。
AI.result: 在八个分类任务中，GrIPS使InstructGPT性能提升4.30个百分点，优于手动重写和纯示例提示，且效果接近梯度调优方法。
AI.conclusion: GrIPS提供了一种高效、实用的提示优化方案，适用于API模型，在保持计算效率的同时提升任务表现。

authors_text: Peyman Afshani,Mark de Berg,Kevin Buchin,Jie Gao,Maarten Loffler,Amir Nayyeri,Benjamin Raichel,Rik Sarkar,Haotian Wang,Hao-Tsung Yang
title: On Cyclic Solutions to the Min-Max Latency Multi-Robot Patrolling Problem
title_zh: 最小-最大延迟多机器人巡更问题的循环解
comment: This paper is accepted in the 38th International Symposium on Computational Geometry (SoCG 2022)
comments: This paper is accepted in the 38th International Symposium on Computational Geometry (SoCG 2022)
abstract: We consider the following surveillance problem: Given a set $P$ of $n$ sites in a metric space and a set of $k$ robots with the same maximum speed, compute a patrol schedule of minimum latency for the robots. Here a patrol schedule specifies for each robot an infinite sequence of sites to visit (in the given order) and the latency $L$ of a schedule is the maximum latency of any site, where the latency of a site $s$ is the supremum of the lengths of the time intervals between consecutive visits to $s$. When $k=1$ the problem is equivalent to the travelling salesman problem (TSP) and thus it is NP-hard. We have two main results. We consider cyclic solutions in which the set of sites must be partitioned into $\ell$ groups, for some~$\ell \leq k$, and each group is assigned a subset of the robots that move along the travelling salesman tour of the group at equal distance from each other. Our first main result is that approximating the optimal latency of the class of cyclic solutions can be reduced to approximating the optimal travelling salesman tour on some input, with only a $1+\varepsilon$ factor loss in the approximation factor and an $O\left(\left( k/\varepsilon \right)^k\right)$ factor loss in the runtime, for any $\varepsilon >0$. Our second main result shows that an optimal cyclic solution is a $2(1-1/k)$-approximation of the overall optimal solution. Note that for $k=2$ this implies that an optimal cyclic solution is optimal overall. The results have a number of consequences. For the Euclidean version of the problem, for instance, combining our results with known results on Euclidean TSP, yields a PTAS for approximating an optimal cyclic solution, and it yields a $(2(1-1/k)+\varepsilon)$-approximation of the optimal unrestricted solution. If the conjecture mentioned above is true, then our algorithm is actually a PTAS for the general problem in the Euclidean setting.

Our first main result is that approximating the optimal latency of the class of cyclic solutions can be reduced to approximating the optimal travelling salesman tour on some input, with only a $1+\varepsilon$ factor loss in the approximation factor and an $O\left(\left( k/\varepsilon \right)^k\right)$ factor loss in the runtime, for any $\varepsilon >0$. For the Euclidean version of the problem, for instance, combining our results with known results on Euclidean TSP, yields a PTAS for approximating an optimal cyclic solution, and it yields a $(2(1-1/k)+\varepsilon)$-approximation of the optimal unrestricted solution. abstract_zh: 我们考虑以下监视问题：给定度量空间中的一组 $P$ 的 $n$ 个站点和一组具有相同最大速度的 $k$ 机器人，计算机器人的最小延迟的巡逻计划。这里，巡逻计划为每个机器人指定了要访问的无限序列（按给定顺序），计划的延迟 $L$ 是任何站点的最大延迟，其中站点 $s$ 的延迟是连续访问 $s$ 之间的时间间隔长度的上限值。当 $k=1$ 时，该问题相当于旅行商问题 (TSP)，因此是 NP 困难问题。我们有两个主要结果。我们考虑循环解决方案，其中站点集必须划分为 $\ell$ 组，对于 some~$\ell \leq k$，并且每个组都被分配一个机器人子集，这些机器人沿着该组的旅行推销员旅行移动，彼此之间的距离相等。我们的第一个主要结果是，对循环解类的最佳延迟的近似可以简化为在某些输入上近似最佳旅行商旅行，对于任何 $\varepsilon >0$，近似因子中只有 $1+\varepsilon$ 因子损失，运行时有 $O\left(\left( k/\varepsilon \right)^k\right)$ 因子损失。我们的第二个主要结果表明，最优循环解是整体最优解的 $2(1-1/k)$ 近似。请注意，对于 $k=2$，这意味着最优循环解总体上是最优的。结果会产生许多后果。例如，对于该问题的欧几里德版本，将我们的结果与欧几里德 TSP 上的已知结果相结合，产生一个用于逼近最优循环解的 PTAS，并产生最优无限制解的 $(2(1-1/k)+\varepsilon)$ 逼近。如果上述猜想成立，那么我们的算法实际上是欧几里德设置下一般问题的 PTAS。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多机器人巡逻问题的循环解法，旨在最小化所有站点的最大延迟。
AI.motivation: 当机器人数量为1时，问题等价于NP难的旅行商问题（TSP）。现有方法难以高效处理多机器人场景，需探索循环调度策略以逼近最优解。
AI.method: 将站点划分为若干组，每组分配部分机器人沿该组的TSP路径循环巡逻，通过近似TSP解并结合分组策略降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 循环解的最优近似可转化为TSP近似问题，近似因子损失为$1+\arepsilon$，时间复杂度损失$O((k/\arepsilon)^k)$；循环解为整体最优解的$2(1-1/k)$近似，且当$k=2$时达到全局最优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多机器人巡逻问题提供了高效的近似算法，在欧几里得空间下结合TSP结果可获得PTAS，且在$k=2$时保证全局最优性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究多机器人巡逻问题的循环解法，旨在最小化所有站点的最大延迟。

search_text: On Cyclic Solutions to the Min-Max Latency Multi-Robot Patrolling Problem 最小-最大延迟多机器人巡更问题的循环解 We consider the following surveillance problem: Given a set $P$ of $n$ sites in a metric space and a set of $k$ robots with the same maximum speed, compute a patrol schedule of minimum latency for the robots. Here a patrol schedule specifies for each robot an infinite sequence of sites to visit (in the given order) and the latency $L$ of a schedule is the maximum latency of any site, where the latency of a site $s$ is the supremum of the lengths of the time intervals between consecutive visits to $s$. When $k=1$ the problem is equivalent to the travelling salesman problem (TSP) and thus it is NP-hard. We have two main results. We consider cyclic solutions in which the set of sites must be partitioned into $\ell$ groups, for some~$\ell \leq k$, and each group is assigned a subset of the robots that move along the travelling salesman tour of the group at equal distance from each other. Our first main result is that approximating the optimal latency of the class of cyclic solutions can be reduced to approximating the optimal travelling salesman tour on some input, with only a $1+\varepsilon$ factor loss in the approximation factor and an $O\left(\left( k/\varepsilon \right)^k\right)$ factor loss in the runtime, for any $\varepsilon >0$. Our second main result shows that an optimal cyclic solution is a $2(1-1/k)$-approximation of the overall optimal solution. Note that for $k=2$ this implies that an optimal cyclic solution is optimal overall. The results have a number of consequences. For the Euclidean version of the problem, for instance, combining our results with known results on Euclidean TSP, yields a PTAS for approximating an optimal cyclic solution, and it yields a $(2(1-1/k)+\varepsilon)$-approximation of the optimal unrestricted solution. If the conjecture mentioned above is true, then our algorithm is actually a PTAS for the general problem in the Euclidean setting. 我们考虑以下监视问题：给定度量空间中的一组 $P$ 的 $n$ 个站点和一组具有相同最大速度的 $k$ 机器人，计算机器人的最小延迟的巡逻计划。这里，巡逻计划为每个机器人指定了要访问的无限序列（按给定顺序），计划的延迟 $L$ 是任何站点的最大延迟，其中站点 $s$ 的延迟是连续访问 $s$ 之间的时间间隔长度的上限值。当 $k=1$ 时，该问题相当于旅行商问题 (TSP)，因此是 NP 困难问题。我们有两个主要结果。我们考虑循环解决方案，其中站点集必须划分为 $\ell$ 组，对于 some~$\ell \leq k$，并且每个组都被分配一个机器人子集，这些机器人沿着该组的旅行推销员旅行移动，彼此之间的距离相等。我们的第一个主要结果是，对循环解类的最佳延迟的近似可以简化为在某些输入上近似最佳旅行商旅行，对于任何 $\varepsilon >0$，近似因子中只有 $1+\varepsilon$ 因子损失，运行时有 $O\left(\left( k/\varepsilon \right)^k\right)$ 因子损失。我们的第二个主要结果表明，最优循环解是整体最优解的 $2(1-1/k)$ 近似。请注意，对于 $k=2$，这意味着最优循环解总体上是最优的。结果会产生许多后果。例如，对于该问题的欧几里德版本，将我们的结果与欧几里德 TSP 上的已知结果相结合，产生一个用于逼近最优循环解的 PTAS，并产生最优无限制解的 $(2(1-1/k)+\varepsilon)$ 逼近。如果上述猜想成立，那么我们的算法实际上是欧几里德设置下一般问题的 PTAS。 本文研究多机器人巡逻问题的循环解法，旨在最小化所有站点的最大延迟。 Peyman Afshani,Mark de Berg,Kevin Buchin,Jie Gao,Maarten Loffler,Amir Nayyeri,Benjamin Raichel,Rik Sarkar,Haotian Wang,Hao-Tsung Yang cs.CG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuyan Zhou,Li Zhang,Yue Yang,Qing Lyu,Pengcheng Yin,Chris Callison-Burch,Graham Neubig
title: Show Me More Details: Discovering Hierarchies of Procedures from Semi-structured Web Data
title_zh: 显示更多详细信息：从半结构化 Web 数据中发现过程的层次结构
abstract: Procedures are inherently hierarchical. To "make videos", one may need to "purchase a camera", which in turn may require one to "set a budget". While such hierarchical knowledge is critical for reasoning about complex procedures, most existing work has treated procedures as shallow structures without modeling the parent-child relation. In this work, we attempt to construct an open-domain hierarchical knowledge-base (KB) of procedures based on wikiHow, a website containing more than 110k instructional articles, each documenting the steps to carry out a complex procedure. To this end, we develop a simple and efficient method that links steps (e.g., "purchase a camera") in an article to other articles with similar goals (e.g., "how to choose a camera"), recursively constructing the KB. Our method significantly outperforms several strong baselines according to automatic evaluation, human judgment, and application to downstream tasks such as instructional video retrieval. A demo with partial data can be found at https://wikihow-hierarchy.github.io. The code and the data are at https://github.com/shuyanzhou/wikihow_hierarchy.
summary: Procedures are inherently hierarchical. To "make videos", one may need to "purchase a camera", which in turn may require one to "set a budget". While such hierarchical knowledge is critical for reasoning about complex procedures, most existing work has treated procedures as shallow structures without modeling the parent-child relation. In this work, we attempt to construct an open-domain hierarchical knowledge-base (KB) of procedures based on wikiHow, a website containing more than 110k instructional articles, each documenting the steps to carry out a complex procedure. To this end, we develop a simple and efficient method that links steps (e.g., "purchase a camera") in an article to other articles with similar goals (e.g., "how to choose a camera"), recursively constructing the KB. Our method significantly outperforms several strong baselines according to automatic evaluation, human judgment, and application to downstream tasks such as instructional video retrieval. A demo with partial data can be found at https://wikihow-hierarchy.github.io. The code and the data are at https://github.com/shuyanzhou/wikihow_hierarchy.
abstract_zh: 程序本质上是分层的。为了“制作视频”，人们可能需要“购买一台相机”，而这又可能需要“设定预算”。虽然这种分层知识对于推理复杂过程至关重要，但大多数现有工作都将过程视为浅层结构，而没有对父子关系进行建模。在这项工作中，我们尝试基于 wikiHow 构建一个开放域的程序分层知识库 (KB)，wikiHow 是一个包含超过 11 万篇指导文章的网站，每一篇都记录了执行复杂程序的步骤。为此，我们开发了一种简单而有效的方法，将一篇文章中的步骤（例如“购买相机”）链接到具有类似目标的其他文章（例如“如何选择相机”），从而递归地构建知识库。根据自动评估、人工判断以及对教学视频检索等下游任务的应用，我们的方法显着优于几个强大的基线。包含部分数据的演示可以在 https://wikihow-hierarchy.github.io 找到。代码和数据位于https://github.com/shuyanzhou/wikihow_hierarchy。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从半结构化网络数据中发现过程的层次结构，构建开放域的过程知识库。
AI.motivation: 现有研究大多将过程视为扁平结构，未建模父-子关系，而实际过程具有层次性，如制作视频需购买相机，而购买相机又需设定预算。
AI.method: 基于wikiHow数据，开发一种简单高效的方法，通过递归链接文章中的步骤（如‘购买相机’）到目标相似的其他文章（如‘如何选择相机’），构建层次化知识库。
AI.result: 该方法在自动评估、人工判断及下游任务（如教学视频检索）中显著优于多个强基线，提供部分数据的演示系统。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法能有效构建过程的层次化知识库，为复杂过程推理提供支持。

title: FisheyeHDK: Hyperbolic Deformable Kernel Learning for Ultra-Wide Field-of-View Image Recognition
title_zh: FisheyeHDK：用于超宽视场图像识别的双曲变形核学习
abstract: Conventional convolution neural networks (CNNs) trained on narrow Field-of-View (FoV) images are the state-of-the-art approaches for object recognition tasks. Some methods proposed the adaptation of CNNs to ultra-wide FoV images by learning deformable kernels. However, they are limited by the Euclidean geometry and their accuracy degrades under strong distortions caused by fisheye projections. In this work, we demonstrate that learning the shape of convolution kernels in non-Euclidean spaces is better than existing deformable kernel methods. In particular, we propose a new approach that learns deformable kernel parameters (positions) in hyperbolic space. FisheyeHDK is a hybrid CNN architecture combining hyperbolic and Euclidean convolution layers for positions and features learning. First, we provide an intuition of hyperbolic space for wide FoV images. Using synthetic distortion profiles, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We select two datasets - Cityscapes and BDD100K 2020 - of perspective images which we transform to fisheye equivalents at different scaling factors (analog to focal lengths). Finally, we provide an experiment on data collected by a real fisheye camera. Validations and experiments show that our approach improves existing deformable kernel methods for CNN adaptation on fisheye images.
summary: Conventional convolution neural networks (CNNs) trained on narrow Field-of-View (FoV) images are the state-of-the-art approaches for object recognition tasks. Some methods proposed the adaptation of CNNs to ultra-wide FoV images by learning deformable kernels. However, they are limited by the Euclidean geometry and their accuracy degrades under strong distortions caused by fisheye projections. In this work, we demonstrate that learning the shape of convolution kernels in non-Euclidean spaces is better than existing deformable kernel methods. In particular, we propose a new approach that learns deformable kernel parameters (positions) in hyperbolic space. FisheyeHDK is a hybrid CNN architecture combining hyperbolic and Euclidean convolution layers for positions and features learning. First, we provide an intuition of hyperbolic space for wide FoV images. Using synthetic distortion profiles, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We select two datasets - Cityscapes and BDD100K 2020 - of perspective images which we transform to fisheye equivalents at different scaling factors (analog to focal lengths). Finally, we provide an experiment on data collected by a real fisheye camera. Validations and experiments show that our approach improves existing deformable kernel methods for CNN adaptation on fisheye images.
abstract_zh: 在窄视场 (FoV) 图像上训练的传统卷积神经网络 (CNN) 是物体识别任务的最先进方法。一些方法提出通过学习可变形核来使 CNN 适应超宽 FoV 图像。然而，它们受到欧几里得几何的限制，并且在鱼眼投影引起的强烈扭曲下，它们的精度会下降。在这项工作中，我们证明了学习非欧几里得空间中卷积核的形状比现有的可变形核方法更好。特别是，我们提出了一种学习双曲空间中可变形核参数（位置）的新方法。 FisheyeHDK 是一种混合 CNN 架构，结合了双曲卷积层和欧几里得卷积层，用于位置和特征学习。首先，我们为宽视场图像提供双曲空间的直觉。使用合成失真曲线，我们证明了我们方法的有效性。我们选择两个透视图像数据集 - Cityscapes 和 BDD100K 2020，我们将其转换为不同缩放因子（类似于焦距）的鱼眼等效图像。最后，我们对真实鱼眼相机收集的数据进行了实验。验证和实验表明，我们的方法改进了现有的可变形核方法，用于鱼眼图像的 CNN 自适应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FisheyeHDK方法，通过在双曲空间中学习可变形卷积核参数，解决传统CNN在超宽视场鱼眼图像识别中的精度退化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在处理鱼眼图像时因欧几里得几何限制和强畸变导致精度下降，现有可变形卷积方法无法有效适应超宽视角的非欧几里得特性。
AI.method: 设计混合CNN架构，结合双曲空间与欧几里得空间卷积层，通过合成畸变数据和真实鱼眼相机数据验证，在双曲空间中学习卷积核位置参数。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、BDD100K和真实鱼眼数据集上验证，相比现有可变形卷积方法，FisheyeHDK在超宽视场图像识别任务中精度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间建模能有效捕捉超宽视场图像的非欧几里得特性，为鱼眼图像识别提供更鲁棒的CNN适应方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出FisheyeHDK方法，通过在双曲空间中学习可变形卷积核参数，解决传统CNN在超宽视场鱼眼图像识别中的精度退化问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统CNN在处理鱼眼图像时因欧几里得几何限制和强畸变导致精度下降，现有可变形卷积方法无法有效适应超宽视角的非欧几里得特性。
ai_content.method: 设计混合CNN架构，结合双曲空间与欧几里得空间卷积层，通过合成畸变数据和真实鱼眼相机数据验证，在双曲空间中学习卷积核位置参数。
ai_content.result: 在Cityscapes、BDD100K和真实鱼眼数据集上验证，相比现有可变形卷积方法，FisheyeHDK在超宽视场图像识别任务中精度显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 双曲空间建模能有效捕捉超宽视场图像的非欧几里得特性，为鱼眼图像识别提供更鲁棒的CNN适应方案。

search_text: FisheyeHDK: Hyperbolic Deformable Kernel Learning for Ultra-Wide Field-of-View Image Recognition FisheyeHDK：用于超宽视场图像识别的双曲变形核学习 Conventional convolution neural networks (CNNs) trained on narrow Field-of-View (FoV) images are the state-of-the-art approaches for object recognition tasks. Some methods proposed the adaptation of CNNs to ultra-wide FoV images by learning deformable kernels. However, they are limited by the Euclidean geometry and their accuracy degrades under strong distortions caused by fisheye projections. In this work, we demonstrate that learning the shape of convolution kernels in non-Euclidean spaces is better than existing deformable kernel methods. In particular, we propose a new approach that learns deformable kernel parameters (positions) in hyperbolic space. FisheyeHDK is a hybrid CNN architecture combining hyperbolic and Euclidean convolution layers for positions and features learning. First, we provide an intuition of hyperbolic space for wide FoV images. Using synthetic distortion profiles, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We select two datasets - Cityscapes and BDD100K 2020 - of perspective images which we transform to fisheye equivalents at different scaling factors (analog to focal lengths). Finally, we provide an experiment on data collected by a real fisheye camera. Validations and experiments show that our approach improves existing deformable kernel methods for CNN adaptation on fisheye images. 在窄视场 (FoV) 图像上训练的传统卷积神经网络 (CNN) 是物体识别任务的最先进方法。一些方法提出通过学习可变形核来使 CNN 适应超宽 FoV 图像。然而，它们受到欧几里得几何的限制，并且在鱼眼投影引起的强烈扭曲下，它们的精度会下降。在这项工作中，我们证明了学习非欧几里得空间中卷积核的形状比现有的可变形核方法更好。特别是，我们提出了一种学习双曲空间中可变形核参数（位置）的新方法。 FisheyeHDK 是一种混合 CNN 架构，结合了双曲卷积层和欧几里得卷积层，用于位置和特征学习。首先，我们为宽视场图像提供双曲空间的直觉。使用合成失真曲线，我们证明了我们方法的有效性。我们选择两个透视图像数据集 - Cityscapes 和 BDD100K 2020，我们将其转换为不同缩放因子（类似于焦距）的鱼眼等效图像。最后，我们对真实鱼眼相机收集的数据进行了实验。验证和实验表明，我们的方法改进了现有的可变形核方法，用于鱼眼图像的 CNN 自适应。 本文提出FisheyeHDK方法，通过在双曲空间中学习可变形卷积核参数，解决传统CNN在超宽视场鱼眼图像识别中的精度退化问题。 Ola Ahmad,Freddy Lecue cs.CV

authors_text: Ruiwen Li,Zheda Mai,Chiheb Trabelsi,Zhibo Zhang,Jongseong Jang,Scott Sanner
title: TransCAM: Transformer Attention-based CAM Refinement for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: TransCAM：基于 Transformer Attention 的 CAM 细化，用于弱监督语义分割
comment: ef:Journal of Visual Communication and Image Representation 2023
comments: ef:Journal of Visual Communication and Image Representation 2023
abstract: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) with only image-level supervision is a challenging task. Most existing methods exploit Class Activation Maps (CAM) to generate pixel-level pseudo labels for supervised training. However, due to the local receptive field of Convolution Neural Networks (CNN), CAM applied to CNNs often suffers from partial activation -- highlighting the most discriminative part instead of the entire object area. In order to capture both local features and global representations, the Conformer has been proposed to combine a visual transformer branch with a CNN branch. In this paper, we propose TransCAM, a Conformer-based solution to WSSS that explicitly leverages the attention weights from the transformer branch of the Conformer to refine the CAM generated from the CNN branch. TransCAM is motivated by our observation that attention weights from shallow transformer blocks are able to capture low-level spatial feature similarities while attention weights from deep transformer blocks capture high-level semantic context. Despite its simplicity, TransCAM achieves a new state-of-the-art performance of 69.3% and 69.6% on the respective PASCAL VOC 2012 validation and test sets, showing the effectiveness of transformer attention-based refinement of CAM for WSSS.
summary: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) with only image-level supervision is a challenging task. Most existing methods exploit Class Activation Maps (CAM) to generate pixel-level pseudo labels for supervised training. However, due to the local receptive field of Convolution Neural Networks (CNN), CAM applied to CNNs often suffers from partial activation -- highlighting the most discriminative part instead of the entire object area. In order to capture both local features and global representations, the Conformer has been proposed to combine a visual transformer branch with a CNN branch. In this paper, we propose TransCAM, a Conformer-based solution to WSSS that explicitly leverages the attention weights from the transformer branch of the Conformer to refine the CAM generated from the CNN branch. TransCAM is motivated by our observation that attention weights from shallow transformer blocks are able to capture low-level spatial feature similarities while attention weights from deep transformer blocks capture high-level semantic context. Despite its simplicity, TransCAM achieves a new state-of-the-art performance of 69.3% and 69.6% on the respective PASCAL VOC 2012 validation and test sets, showing the effectiveness of transformer attention-based refinement of CAM for WSSS.
abstract_zh: 仅具有图像级监督的弱监督语义分割（WSSS）是一项具有挑战性的任务。大多数现有方法利用类激活图（CAM）来生成用于监督训练的像素级伪标签。然而，由于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的局部感受野，应用于 CNN 的 CAM 经常会受到部分激活的影响——突出显示最具辨别力的部分，而不是整个对象区域。为了捕获局部特征和全局表示，Conformer 被提议将视觉 Transformer 分支与 CNN 分支结合起来。在本文中，我们提出了 TransCAM，这是一种基于 Conformer 的 WSSS 解决方案，它明确利用 Conformer 的 Transformer 分支的注意力权重来细化 CNN 分支生成的 CAM。 TransCAM 的动机是我们观察到浅层 Transformer 块的注意力权重能够捕获低级空间特征相似性，而深层 Transformer 块的注意力权重捕获高级语义上下文。尽管很简单，但 TransCAM 在相应的 PASCAL VOC 2012 验证和测试集上实现了 69.3% 和 69.6% 的最新性能，显示了针对 WSSS 的基于变压器注意力的 CAM 细化的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransCAM方法，通过结合Transformer的注意力机制优化CNN生成的类别激活图（CAM），以提升弱监督语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN生成的CAM因局部感受野限制，易出现部分激活问题。Transformer的全局注意力机制可捕捉多尺度特征，但现有方法未有效结合二者优势。
AI.method: 基于Conformer架构，利用CNN分支生成初始CAM，再通过Transformer分支的浅层（低级空间特征）和深层（高级语义）注意力权重联合优化CAM。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上达到69.3%（验证集）和69.6%（测试集）的mIoU，刷新弱监督语义分割的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: Transformer注意力机制有效补充CNN的局部特征局限，证明了基于注意力的CAM优化策略在弱监督分割中的优越性。

search_text: TransCAM: Transformer Attention-based CAM Refinement for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation TransCAM：基于 Transformer Attention 的 CAM 细化，用于弱监督语义分割 Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) with only image-level supervision is a challenging task. Most existing methods exploit Class Activation Maps (CAM) to generate pixel-level pseudo labels for supervised training. However, due to the local receptive field of Convolution Neural Networks (CNN), CAM applied to CNNs often suffers from partial activation -- highlighting the most discriminative part instead of the entire object area. In order to capture both local features and global representations, the Conformer has been proposed to combine a visual transformer branch with a CNN branch. In this paper, we propose TransCAM, a Conformer-based solution to WSSS that explicitly leverages the attention weights from the transformer branch of the Conformer to refine the CAM generated from the CNN branch. TransCAM is motivated by our observation that attention weights from shallow transformer blocks are able to capture low-level spatial feature similarities while attention weights from deep transformer blocks capture high-level semantic context. Despite its simplicity, TransCAM achieves a new state-of-the-art performance of 69.3% and 69.6% on the respective PASCAL VOC 2012 validation and test sets, showing the effectiveness of transformer attention-based refinement of CAM for WSSS. 仅具有图像级监督的弱监督语义分割（WSSS）是一项具有挑战性的任务。大多数现有方法利用类激活图（CAM）来生成用于监督训练的像素级伪标签。然而，由于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的局部感受野，应用于 CNN 的 CAM 经常会受到部分激活的影响——突出显示最具辨别力的部分，而不是整个对象区域。为了捕获局部特征和全局表示，Conformer 被提议将视觉 Transformer 分支与 CNN 分支结合起来。在本文中，我们提出了 TransCAM，这是一种基于 Conformer 的 WSSS 解决方案，它明确利用 Conformer 的 Transformer 分支的注意力权重来细化 CNN 分支生成的 CAM。 TransCAM 的动机是我们观察到浅层 Transformer 块的注意力权重能够捕获低级空间特征相似性，而深层 Transformer 块的注意力权重捕获高级语义上下文。尽管很简单，但 TransCAM 在相应的 PASCAL VOC 2012 验证和测试集上实现了 69.3% 和 69.6% 的最新性能，显示了针对 WSSS 的基于变压器注意力的 CAM 细化的有效性。 本文提出TransCAM方法，通过结合Transformer的注意力机制优化CNN生成的类别激活图（CAM），以提升弱监督语义分割性能。 Ruiwen Li,Zheda Mai,Chiheb Trabelsi,Zhibo Zhang,Jongseong Jang,Scott Sanner cs.CV

authors_text: Francesca Venturini,Michela Sperti,Umberto Michelucci,Arnaud Gucciardi,Vanessa M. Martose,Marco A. Deriu
title: Physico-chemical properties extraction from the fluorescence spectrum with 1D-convolutional neural networks: application to olive oil
title_zh: 使用一维卷积神经网络从荧光光谱中提取物理化学特性：在橄榄油中的应用
abstract: The olive oil sector produces a substantial impact in the Mediterranean's economy and lifestyle. Many studies exist which try to optimize the different steps in the olive oil's production process. One of the main challenges for olive oil producers is the ability to asses and control the quality during the production cycle. For this purpose, several parameters need to be determined, such as the acidity, the UV absorption or the ethyl esters content. To achieve this, samples must be sent to an approved laboratory for chemical analysis. This approach is expensive and cannot be performed very frequently, making quality control of olive oil a real challenge. This work explores a new approach based on fluorescence spectroscopy and artificial intelligence (namely, 1-D convolutional neural networks) to predict the five chemical quality indicators of olive oil (acidity, peroxide value, UV spectroscopic parameters $K_{270}$ and $K_{232}$, and ethyl esters) from simple fluorescence spectra. Fluorescence spectroscopy is a very attractive optical technique since it does not require sample preparation, is non destructive, and, as shown in this work, can be easily implemented in small and cost-effective sensors. The results indicate that the proposed approach gives exceptional results in the quality determination and would make the continuous quality control of olive oil during and after the production process a reality. Additionally, this novel methodology presents potential applications as a support for quality specifications of olive oil, as defined by the European regulation.
summary: The olive oil sector produces a substantial impact in the Mediterranean's economy and lifestyle. Many studies exist which try to optimize the different steps in the olive oil's production process. One of the main challenges for olive oil producers is the ability to asses and control the quality during the production cycle. For this purpose, several parameters need to be determined, such as the acidity, the UV absorption or the ethyl esters content. To achieve this, samples must be sent to an approved laboratory for chemical analysis. This approach is expensive and cannot be performed very frequently, making quality control of olive oil a real challenge. This work explores a new approach based on fluorescence spectroscopy and artificial intelligence (namely, 1-D convolutional neural networks) to predict the five chemical quality indicators of olive oil (acidity, peroxide value, UV spectroscopic parameters $K_{270}$ and $K_{232}$, and ethyl esters) from simple fluorescence spectra. Fluorescence spectroscopy is a very attractive optical technique since it does not require sample preparation, is non destructive, and, as shown in this work, can be easily implemented in small and cost-effective sensors. The results indicate that the proposed approach gives exceptional results in the quality determination and would make the continuous quality control of olive oil during and after the production process a reality. Additionally, this novel methodology presents potential applications as a support for quality specifications of olive oil, as defined by the European regulation.
abstract_zh: 橄榄油行业对地中海的经济和生活方式产生了重大影响。许多研究试图优化橄榄油生产过程中的不同步骤。橄榄油生产商面临的主要挑战之一是在生产周期中评估和控制质量的能力。为此，需要确定几个参数，例如酸度、紫外线吸收或乙酯含量。为了实现这一目标，样品必须送到经批准的实验室进行化学分析。这种方法成本高昂且无法频繁执行，这使得橄榄油的质量控制成为真正的挑战。这项工作探索了一种基于荧光光谱和人工智能（即一维卷积神经网络）的新方法，从简单的荧光光谱中预测橄榄油的五种化学质量指标（酸度、过氧化值、紫外光谱参数$K_{270}$和$K_{232}$以及乙酯）。荧光光谱是一种非常有吸引力的光学技术，因为它不需要样品制备，是非破坏性的，并且如本工作所示，可以在小型且经济高效的传感器中轻松实现。结果表明，所提出的方法在质量测定方面取得了优异的结果，并使生产过程中和生产后的橄榄油持续质量控制成为现实。此外，这种新颖的方法还具有潜在的应用价值，可作为欧洲法规定义的橄榄油质量规格的支持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用一维卷积神经网络（1D-CNN）结合荧光光谱技术，预测橄榄油的五项化学质量指标，以实现生产过程中的连续质量控制。
AI.motivation: 传统橄榄油质量检测方法成本高且频率低，难以满足生产过程中的实时监控需求，亟需一种高效、非破坏性的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于荧光光谱数据，采用1D-CNN模型直接从荧光谱图中提取特征并预测酸度、过氧化值、紫外吸收参数及乙基酯含量等指标。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在质量检测中表现优异，能够实现橄榄油生产全过程的连续质量监控，且具备低成本传感器实施的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为橄榄油质量控制提供了创新解决方案，符合欧盟相关法规要求，具有重要的工业应用前景。

motivation: 传统橄榄油质量检测方法成本高且频率低，难以满足生产过程中的实时监控需求，亟需一种高效、非破坏性的替代方案。

search_text: Physico-chemical properties extraction from the fluorescence spectrum with 1D-convolutional neural networks: application to olive oil 使用一维卷积神经网络从荧光光谱中提取物理化学特性：在橄榄油中的应用 The olive oil sector produces a substantial impact in the Mediterranean's economy and lifestyle. Many studies exist which try to optimize the different steps in the olive oil's production process. One of the main challenges for olive oil producers is the ability to asses and control the quality during the production cycle. For this purpose, several parameters need to be determined, such as the acidity, the UV absorption or the ethyl esters content. To achieve this, samples must be sent to an approved laboratory for chemical analysis. This approach is expensive and cannot be performed very frequently, making quality control of olive oil a real challenge. This work explores a new approach based on fluorescence spectroscopy and artificial intelligence (namely, 1-D convolutional neural networks) to predict the five chemical quality indicators of olive oil (acidity, peroxide value, UV spectroscopic parameters $K_{270}$ and $K_{232}$, and ethyl esters) from simple fluorescence spectra. Fluorescence spectroscopy is a very attractive optical technique since it does not require sample preparation, is non destructive, and, as shown in this work, can be easily implemented in small and cost-effective sensors. The results indicate that the proposed approach gives exceptional results in the quality determination and would make the continuous quality control of olive oil during and after the production process a reality. Additionally, this novel methodology presents potential applications as a support for quality specifications of olive oil, as defined by the European regulation. 橄榄油行业对地中海的经济和生活方式产生了重大影响。许多研究试图优化橄榄油生产过程中的不同步骤。橄榄油生产商面临的主要挑战之一是在生产周期中评估和控制质量的能力。为此，需要确定几个参数，例如酸度、紫外线吸收或乙酯含量。为了实现这一目标，样品必须送到经批准的实验室进行化学分析。这种方法成本高昂且无法频繁执行，这使得橄榄油的质量控制成为真正的挑战。这项工作探索了一种基于荧光光谱和人工智能（即一维卷积神经网络）的新方法，从简单的荧光光谱中预测橄榄油的五种化学质量指标（酸度、过氧化值、紫外光谱参数$K_{270}$和$K_{232}$以及乙酯）。荧光光谱是一种非常有吸引力的光学技术，因为它不需要样品制备，是非破坏性的，并且如本工作所示，可以在小型且经济高效的传感器中轻松实现。结果表明，所提出的方法在质量测定方面取得了优异的结果，并使生产过程中和生产后的橄榄油持续质量控制成为现实。此外，这种新颖的方法还具有潜在的应用价值，可作为欧洲法规定义的橄榄油质量规格的支持。 本文提出利用一维卷积神经网络（1D-CNN）结合荧光光谱技术，预测橄榄油的五项化学质量指标，以实现生产过程中的连续质量控制。 Francesca Venturini,Michela Sperti,Umberto Michelucci,Arnaud Gucciardi,Vanessa M. Martose,Marco A. Deriu cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SP

title: A Self-Supervised, Differentiable Kalman Filter for Uncertainty-Aware Visual-Inertial Odometry
title_zh: 用于不确定性感知视觉惯性里程计的自监督、可微分卡尔曼滤波器
comment: In Proceedings of the IEEE/ASME International Conference on Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics (AIM'22), Sapporo, Japan, Jul. 11-15, 2022
comments: In Proceedings of the IEEE/ASME International Conference on Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics (AIM'22), Sapporo, Japan, Jul. 11-15, 2022
abstract: Visual-inertial odometry (VIO) systems traditionally rely on filtering or optimization-based techniques for egomotion estimation. While these methods are accurate under nominal conditions, they are prone to failure during severe illumination changes, rapid camera motions, or on low-texture image sequences. Learning-based systems have the potential to outperform classical implementations in challenging environments, but, currently, do not perform as well as classical methods in nominal settings. Herein, we introduce a framework for training a hybrid VIO system that leverages the advantages of learning and standard filtering-based state estimation. Our approach is built upon a differentiable Kalman filter, with an IMU-driven process model and a robust, neural network-derived relative pose measurement model. The use of the Kalman filter framework enables the principled treatment of uncertainty at training time and at test time. We show that our self-supervised loss formulation outperforms a similar, supervised method, while also enabling online retraining. We evaluate our system on a visually degraded version of the EuRoC dataset and find that our estimator operates without a significant reduction in accuracy in cases where classical estimators consistently diverge. Finally, by properly utilizing the metric information contained in the IMU measurements, our system is able to recover metric scene scale, while other self-supervised monocular VIO approaches cannot.
summary: Visual-inertial odometry (VIO) systems traditionally rely on filtering or optimization-based techniques for egomotion estimation. While these methods are accurate under nominal conditions, they are prone to failure during severe illumination changes, rapid camera motions, or on low-texture image sequences. Learning-based systems have the potential to outperform classical implementations in challenging environments, but, currently, do not perform as well as classical methods in nominal settings. Herein, we introduce a framework for training a hybrid VIO system that leverages the advantages of learning and standard filtering-based state estimation. Our approach is built upon a differentiable Kalman filter, with an IMU-driven process model and a robust, neural network-derived relative pose measurement model. The use of the Kalman filter framework enables the principled treatment of uncertainty at training time and at test time. We show that our self-supervised loss formulation outperforms a similar, supervised method, while also enabling online retraining. We evaluate our system on a visually degraded version of the EuRoC dataset and find that our estimator operates without a significant reduction in accuracy in cases where classical estimators consistently diverge. Finally, by properly utilizing the metric information contained in the IMU measurements, our system is able to recover metric scene scale, while other self-supervised monocular VIO approaches cannot.
abstract_zh: 视觉惯性里程计 (VIO) 系统传统上依赖于过滤或基于优化的技术来进行自我运动估计。虽然这些方法在标称条件下是准确的，但在剧烈的光照变化、相机快速运动或低纹理图像序列下，它们很容易失败。基于学习的系统有可能在具有挑战性的环境中超越经典实现，但目前在名义设置中表现不如经典方法。在此，我们介绍了一个用于训练混合 VIO 系统的框架，该框架利用了学习和基于标准过滤的状态估计的优势。我们的方法建立在可微分卡尔曼滤波器的基础上，具有 IMU 驱动的过程模型和鲁棒的、神经网络衍生的相对姿态测量模型。卡尔曼滤波器框架的使用可以在训练时和测试时对不确定性进行有原则的处理。我们证明，我们的自监督损失公式优于类似的监督方法，同时还支持在线再训练。我们在 EuRoC 数据集的视觉退化版本上评估我们的系统，发现在经典估计器持续发散的情况下，我们的估计器运行时准确度没有显着降低。最后，通过正确利用 IMU 测量中包含的度量信息，我们的系统能够恢复度量场景比例，而其他自监督单目 VIO 方法则不能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合学习与滤波的混合视觉惯性里程计系统，利用可微分卡尔曼滤波器处理不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统VIO方法在光照变化、快速运动或低纹理场景下易失效，而学习方法在常规场景下表现不佳，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 基于可微分卡尔曼滤波框架，结合IMU驱动的过程模型与神经网络生成的相对位姿测量模型，采用自监督损失函数并支持在线重训练。
AI.result: 在退化EuRoC数据集测试中，系统在经典方法失效时保持精度，且通过IMU数据恢复度量尺度，优于其他自监督单目VIO方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过融合学习与滤波优势，有效处理不确定性，提升复杂环境下的VIO鲁棒性与准确性。

title: TaylorBeamformer: Learning All-Neural Beamformer for Multi-Channel Speech Enhancement from Taylor's Approximation Theory
title_zh: TaylorBeamformer：根据泰勒逼近理论学习用于多通道语音增强的全神经波束形成器
abstract: While existing end-to-end beamformers achieve impressive performance in various front-end speech processing tasks, they usually encapsulate the whole process into a black box and thus lack adequate interpretability. As an attempt to fill the blank, we propose a novel neural beamformer inspired by Taylor's approximation theory called TaylorBeamformer for multi-channel speech enhancement. The core idea is that the recovery process can be formulated as the spatial filtering in the neighborhood of the input mixture. Based on that, we decompose it into the superimposition of the 0th-order non-derivative and high-order derivative terms, where the former serves as the spatial filter and the latter is viewed as the residual noise canceller to further improve the speech quality. To enable end-to-end training, we replace the derivative operations with trainable networks and thus can learn from training data. Extensive experiments are conducted on the synthesized dataset based on LibriSpeech and results show that the proposed approach performs favorably against the previous advanced baselines.
summary: While existing end-to-end beamformers achieve impressive performance in various front-end speech processing tasks, they usually encapsulate the whole process into a black box and thus lack adequate interpretability. As an attempt to fill the blank, we propose a novel neural beamformer inspired by Taylor's approximation theory called TaylorBeamformer for multi-channel speech enhancement. The core idea is that the recovery process can be formulated as the spatial filtering in the neighborhood of the input mixture. Based on that, we decompose it into the superimposition of the 0th-order non-derivative and high-order derivative terms, where the former serves as the spatial filter and the latter is viewed as the residual noise canceller to further improve the speech quality. To enable end-to-end training, we replace the derivative operations with trainable networks and thus can learn from training data. Extensive experiments are conducted on the synthesized dataset based on LibriSpeech and results show that the proposed approach performs favorably against the previous advanced baselines.
abstract_zh: 虽然现有的端到端波束形成器在各种前端语音处理任务中取得了令人印象深刻的性能，但它们通常将整个过程封装到黑匣子中，因此缺乏足够的可解释性。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了一种受泰勒逼近理论启发的新型神经波束形成器，称为 TaylorBeamformer，用于多通道语音增强。核心思想是恢复过程可以表示为输入混合物邻域中的空间滤波。在此基础上，我们将其分解为0阶非导数项和高阶导数项的叠加，其中前者作为空间滤波器，后者被视为残余噪声消除器，以进一步提高语音质量。为了实现端到端训练，我们用可训练网络替换导数运算，从而可以从训练数据中学习。对基于 LibriSpeech 的合成数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明所提出的方法相对于之前的高级基线表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于泰勒近似理论的全神经波束形成器TaylorBeamformer，用于多通道语音增强任务。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端波束形成器虽性能优异但缺乏可解释性，本文旨在通过泰勒展开理论构建更可解释的语音增强模型。
AI.method: 将语音恢复过程建模为泰勒展开式，分解为0阶空间滤波项和高阶残差噪声消除项，并用可训练网络替代导数运算实现端到端学习。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech合成数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有先进基线模型。
AI.conclusion: TaylorBeamformer通过理论指导的网络设计，在保持性能的同时提升了模型可解释性，为语音增强领域提供了新思路。

As an attempt to fill the blank, we propose a novel neural beamformer inspired by Taylor's approximation theory called TaylorBeamformer for multi-channel speech enhancement. Based on that, we decompose it into the superimposition of the 0th-order non-derivative and high-order derivative terms, where the former serves as the spatial filter and the latter is viewed as the residual noise canceller to further improve the speech quality. To enable end-to-end training, we replace the derivative operations with trainable networks and thus can learn from training data. Extensive experiments are conducted on the synthesized dataset based on LibriSpeech and results show that the proposed approach performs favorably against the previous advanced baselines. 虽然现有的端到端波束形成器在各种前端语音处理任务中取得了令人印象深刻的性能，但它们通常将整个过程封装到黑匣子中，因此缺乏足够的可解释性。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了一种受泰勒逼近理论启发的新型神经波束形成器，称为 TaylorBeamformer，用于多通道语音增强。核心思想是恢复过程可以表示为输入混合物邻域中的空间滤波。在此基础上，我们将其分解为0阶非导数项和高阶导数项的叠加，其中前者作为空间滤波器，后者被视为残余噪声消除器，以进一步提高语音质量。为了实现端到端训练，我们用可训练网络替换导数运算，从而可以从训练数据中学习。对基于 LibriSpeech 的合成数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明所提出的方法相对于之前的高级基线表现良好。 本文提出一种基于泰勒近似理论的全神经波束形成器TaylorBeamformer，用于多通道语音增强任务。 Andong Li,Guochen Yu,Chengshi Zheng,Xiaodong Li cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Chunyang Chang,Kevin Haninger,Yunlei Shi,Chengjie Yuan,Zhaopeng Chen,Jianwei Zhang
title: Impedance Adaptation by Reinforcement Learning with Contact Dynamic Movement Primitives
title_zh: 通过接触动态运动原语的强化学习进行阻抗适应
abstract: Dynamic movement primitives (DMPs) allow complex position trajectories to be efficiently demonstrated to a robot. In contact-rich tasks, where position trajectories alone may not be safe or robust over variation in contact geometry, DMPs have been extended to include force trajectories. However, different task phases or degrees of freedom may require the tracking of either position or force -- e.g., once contact is made, it may be more important to track the force demonstration trajectory in the contact direction. The robot impedance balances between following a position or force reference trajectory, where a high stiffness tracks position and a low stiffness tracks force. This paper proposes using DMPs to learn position and force trajectories from demonstrations, then adapting the impedance parameters online with a higher-level control policy trained by reinforcement learning. This allows one-shot demonstration of the task with DMPs, and improved robustness and performance from the impedance adaptation. The approach is validated on peg-in-hole and adhesive strip application tasks.
summary: Dynamic movement primitives (DMPs) allow complex position trajectories to be efficiently demonstrated to a robot. In contact-rich tasks, where position trajectories alone may not be safe or robust over variation in contact geometry, DMPs have been extended to include force trajectories. However, different task phases or degrees of freedom may require the tracking of either position or force -- e.g., once contact is made, it may be more important to track the force demonstration trajectory in the contact direction. The robot impedance balances between following a position or force reference trajectory, where a high stiffness tracks position and a low stiffness tracks force. This paper proposes using DMPs to learn position and force trajectories from demonstrations, then adapting the impedance parameters online with a higher-level control policy trained by reinforcement learning. This allows one-shot demonstration of the task with DMPs, and improved robustness and performance from the impedance adaptation. The approach is validated on peg-in-hole and adhesive strip application tasks.
abstract_zh: 动态运动基元 (DMP) 可以有效地向机器人演示复杂的位置轨迹。在接触丰富的任务中，由于接触几何形状的变化，仅位置轨迹可能不安全或不稳健，DMP 已扩展到包括力轨迹。然而，不同的任务阶段或自由度可能需要跟踪位置或力——例如，一旦发生接触，跟踪接触方向上的力演示轨迹可能更重要。机器人阻抗在遵循位置或力参考轨迹之间进行平衡，其中高刚度跟踪位置，低刚度跟踪力。本文提出使用 DMP 从演示中学习位置和力轨迹，然后通过强化学习训练的更高级别控制策略在线调整阻抗参数。这样可以使用 DMP 一次性演示该任务，并通过阻抗自适应提高鲁棒性和性能。该方法在孔内钉和胶带应用任务中得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合动态运动基元（DMPs）与强化学习的方法，通过在线调整机器人阻抗参数，提升接触丰富任务中的鲁棒性与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统DMPs在接触任务中难以适应不同阶段对位置或力轨迹的跟踪需求，且固定阻抗参数无法应对接触几何变化带来的挑战。
AI.method: 使用DMPs学习位置和力轨迹，通过强化学习训练高层控制策略在线调整阻抗参数，实现任务单次演示与动态适应。
AI.result: 方法在插孔装配和粘性条应用任务中验证有效，显著提升复杂接触场景下的任务成功率与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 结合DMPs与强化学习的阻抗适应方法，为复杂接触任务提供了高效、鲁棒的控制框架，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Haoyu Song,Li Dong,Wei-Nan Zhang,Ting Liu,Furu Wei
title: CLIP Models are Few-shot Learners: Empirical Studies on VQA and Visual Entailment
title_zh: CLIP 模型是小样本学习者：VQA 和视觉蕴涵的实证研究
abstract: CLIP has shown a remarkable zero-shot capability on a wide range of vision tasks. Previously, CLIP is only regarded as a powerful visual encoder. However, after being pre-trained by language supervision from a large amount of image-caption pairs, CLIP itself should also have acquired some few-shot abilities for vision-language tasks. In this work, we empirically show that CLIP can be a strong vision-language few-shot learner by leveraging the power of language. We first evaluate CLIP's zero-shot performance on a typical visual question answering task and demonstrate a zero-shot cross-modality transfer capability of CLIP on the visual entailment task. Then we propose a parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategy to boost the few-shot performance on the vqa task. We achieve competitive zero/few-shot results on the visual question answering and visual entailment tasks without introducing any additional pre-training procedure.
summary: CLIP has shown a remarkable zero-shot capability on a wide range of vision tasks. Previously, CLIP is only regarded as a powerful visual encoder. However, after being pre-trained by language supervision from a large amount of image-caption pairs, CLIP itself should also have acquired some few-shot abilities for vision-language tasks. In this work, we empirically show that CLIP can be a strong vision-language few-shot learner by leveraging the power of language. We first evaluate CLIP's zero-shot performance on a typical visual question answering task and demonstrate a zero-shot cross-modality transfer capability of CLIP on the visual entailment task. Then we propose a parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategy to boost the few-shot performance on the vqa task. We achieve competitive zero/few-shot results on the visual question answering and visual entailment tasks without introducing any additional pre-training procedure.
abstract_zh: CLIP 在广泛的视觉任务中表现出了卓越的零样本能力。此前，CLIP仅被视为一种强大的视觉编码器。然而，在通过大量图像-字幕对的语言监督进行预训练之后，CLIP 本身也应该获得了一些用于视觉-语言任务的小样本能力。在这项工作中，我们凭经验证明，通过利用语言的力量，CLIP 可以成为强大的视觉语言小样本学习器。我们首先评估 CLIP 在典型视觉问答任务上的零样本性能，并展示 CLIP 在视觉蕴涵任务上的零样本跨模态传输能力。然后，我们提出了一种参数有效的微调策略来提高 vqa 任务的小样本性能。我们在视觉问答和视觉蕴含任务上实现了有竞争力的零/少样本结果，而无需引入任何额外的预训练程序。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了CLIP模型在少样本学习任务中的表现，特别是在视觉问答（VQA）和视觉蕴含（Visual Entailment）任务中的能力。
AI.motivation: CLIP模型在零样本任务中表现出色，但其在少样本学习任务中的潜力尚未被充分探索。本文旨在验证CLIP是否具备作为视觉语言任务的少样本学习者的潜力。
AI.method: 作者首先评估了CLIP在视觉问答任务中的零样本性能，并展示了其在视觉蕴含任务中的跨模态迁移能力。随后，提出了一种参数高效的微调策略以提升VQA任务的少样本性能。
AI.result: 在无需额外预训练的情况下，CLIP在视觉问答和视觉蕴含任务中取得了具有竞争力的零样本和少样本结果。
AI.conclusion: CLIP模型不仅是一个强大的视觉编码器，还具备作为视觉语言任务的少样本学习者的潜力，通过适当的微调策略可以进一步提升其性能。

authors_text: Fangzhou Hong,Hui Zhou,Xinge Zhu,Hongsheng Li,Ziwei Liu
title: LiDAR-based 4D Panoptic Segmentation via Dynamic Shifting Network
title_zh: 通过动态移动网络进行基于 LiDAR 的 4D 全景分割
comment: Extension of arXiv:2011.11964; Source code at https://github.com/hongfz16/DS-Net
comments: Extension of arXiv:2011.11964; Source code at https://github.com/hongfz16/DS-Net
abstract: With the rapid advances of autonomous driving, it becomes critical to equip its sensing system with more holistic 3D perception. However, existing works focus on parsing either the objects (e.g. cars and pedestrians) or scenes (e.g. trees and buildings) from the LiDAR sensor. In this work, we address the task of LiDAR-based panoptic segmentation, which aims to parse both objects and scenes in a unified manner. As one of the first endeavors towards this new challenging task, we propose the Dynamic Shifting Network (DS-Net), which serves as an effective panoptic segmentation framework in the point cloud realm. In particular, DS-Net has three appealing properties: 1) Strong backbone design. DS-Net adopts the cylinder convolution that is specifically designed for LiDAR point clouds. 2) Dynamic Shifting for complex point distributions. We observe that commonly-used clustering algorithms are incapable of handling complex autonomous driving scenes with non-uniform point cloud distributions and varying instance sizes. Thus, we present an efficient learnable clustering module, dynamic shifting, which adapts kernel functions on the fly for different instances. 3) Extension to 4D prediction. Furthermore, we extend DS-Net to 4D panoptic LiDAR segmentation by the temporally unified instance clustering on aligned LiDAR frames. To comprehensively evaluate the performance of LiDAR-based panoptic segmentation, we construct and curate benchmarks from two large-scale autonomous driving LiDAR datasets, SemanticKITTI and nuScenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed DS-Net achieves superior accuracies over current state-of-the-art methods in both tasks. Notably, in the single frame version of the task, we outperform the SOTA method by 1.8% in terms of the PQ metric. In the 4D version of the task, we surpass 2nd place by 5.4% in terms of the LSTQ metric.
summary: With the rapid advances of autonomous driving, it becomes critical to equip its sensing system with more holistic 3D perception. However, existing works focus on parsing either the objects (e.g. cars and pedestrians) or scenes (e.g. trees and buildings) from the LiDAR sensor. In this work, we address the task of LiDAR-based panoptic segmentation, which aims to parse both objects and scenes in a unified manner. As one of the first endeavors towards this new challenging task, we propose the Dynamic Shifting Network (DS-Net), which serves as an effective panoptic segmentation framework in the point cloud realm. In particular, DS-Net has three appealing properties: 1) Strong backbone design. DS-Net adopts the cylinder convolution that is specifically designed for LiDAR point clouds. 2) Dynamic Shifting for complex point distributions. We observe that commonly-used clustering algorithms are incapable of handling complex autonomous driving scenes with non-uniform point cloud distributions and varying instance sizes. Thus, we present an efficient learnable clustering module, dynamic shifting, which adapts kernel functions on the fly for different instances. 3) Extension to 4D prediction. Furthermore, we extend DS-Net to 4D panoptic LiDAR segmentation by the temporally unified instance clustering on aligned LiDAR frames. To comprehensively evaluate the performance of LiDAR-based panoptic segmentation, we construct and curate benchmarks from two large-scale autonomous driving LiDAR datasets, SemanticKITTI and nuScenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed DS-Net achieves superior accuracies over current state-of-the-art methods in both tasks. Notably, in the single frame version of the task, we outperform the SOTA method by 1.8% in terms of the PQ metric. In the 4D version of the task, we surpass 2nd place by 5.4% in terms of the LSTQ metric.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶的快速发展，为其传感系统配备更全面的 3D 感知变得至关重要。然而，现有的工作重点是解析来自激光雷达传感器的物体（例如汽车和行人）或场景（例如树木和建筑物）。在这项工作中，我们解决了基于激光雷达的全景分割任务，旨在以统一的方式解析对象和场景。作为实现这一新的挑战性任务的首批努力之一，我们提出了动态移位网络（DS-Net），它作为点云领域中有效的全景分割框架。特别是，DS-Net 具有三个吸引人的特性： 1）强大的主干设计。 DS-Net采用专为LiDAR点云设计的圆柱卷积。 2) 复杂点分布的动态平移。我们观察到常用的聚类算法无法处理具有不均匀点云分布和不同实例大小的复杂自动驾驶场景。因此，我们提出了一种高效的可学习聚类模块，即动态移位，它可以针对不同的实例动态调整内核函数。 3）扩展到4D预测。此外，我们通过对齐 LiDAR 帧上的时间统一实例聚类，将 DS-Net 扩展到 4D 全景 LiDAR 分割。为了全面评估基于 LiDAR 的全景分割的性能，我们从两个大型自动驾驶 LiDAR 数据集 SemanticKITTI 和 nuScenes 构建和管理基准。大量实验表明，我们提出的 DS-Net 在这两项任务中都比当前最先进的方法实现了更高的精度。值得注意的是，在任务的单帧版本中，我们在 PQ 指标方面比 SOTA 方法高出 1.8%。在该任务的 4D 版本中，我们在 LSTQ 指标方面超出了第二名 5.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于LiDAR的4D全景分割方法DS-Net，旨在统一解析自动驾驶场景中的物体与场景。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR感知方法仅能单独处理物体或场景，缺乏对自动驾驶所需全方位3D感知能力的支持。
AI.method: 设计包含圆柱卷积骨干网络、动态聚类模块及4D时序对齐机制的DS-Net框架，通过可学习的动态移位算法适应复杂点云分布。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes数据集上，单帧任务PQ指标超越SOTA 1.8%，4D任务LSTQ指标领先第二名5.4%。
AI.conclusion: DS-Net通过创新网络结构和时序扩展机制，为LiDAR全景分割任务建立了新的性能基准。
