search_text: LiDAR-based 4D Panoptic Segmentation via Dynamic Shifting Network 通过动态移动网络进行基于 LiDAR 的 4D 全景分割 With the rapid advances of autonomous driving, it becomes critical to equip its sensing system with more holistic 3D perception. However, existing works focus on parsing either the objects (e.g. cars and pedestrians) or scenes (e.g. trees and buildings) from the LiDAR sensor. In this work, we address the task of LiDAR-based panoptic segmentation, which aims to parse both objects and scenes in a unified manner. As one of the first endeavors towards this new challenging task, we propose the Dynamic Shifting Network (DS-Net), which serves as an effective panoptic segmentation framework in the point cloud realm. In particular, DS-Net has three appealing properties: 1) Strong backbone design. DS-Net adopts the cylinder convolution that is specifically designed for LiDAR point clouds. 2) Dynamic Shifting for complex point distributions. We observe that commonly-used clustering algorithms are incapable of handling complex autonomous driving scenes with non-uniform point cloud distributions and varying instance sizes. Thus, we present an efficient learnable clustering module, dynamic shifting, which adapts kernel functions on the fly for different instances. 3) Extension to 4D prediction. Furthermore, we extend DS-Net to 4D panoptic LiDAR segmentation by the temporally unified instance clustering on aligned LiDAR frames. To comprehensively evaluate the performance of LiDAR-based panoptic segmentation, we construct and curate benchmarks from two large-scale autonomous driving LiDAR datasets, SemanticKITTI and nuScenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed DS-Net achieves superior accuracies over current state-of-the-art methods in both tasks. Notably, in the single frame version of the task, we outperform the SOTA method by 1.8% in terms of the PQ metric. In the 4D version of the task, we surpass 2nd place by 5.4% in terms of the LSTQ metric. 随着自动驾驶的快速发展，为其传感系统配备更全面的 3D 感知变得至关重要。然而，现有的工作重点是解析来自激光雷达传感器的物体（例如汽车和行人）或场景（例如树木和建筑物）。在这项工作中，我们解决了基于激光雷达的全景分割任务，旨在以统一的方式解析对象和场景。作为实现这一新的挑战性任务的首批努力之一，我们提出了动态移位网络（DS-Net），它作为点云领域中有效的全景分割框架。特别是，DS-Net 具有三个吸引人的特性： 1）强大的主干设计。 DS-Net采用专为LiDAR点云设计的圆柱卷积。 2) 复杂点分布的动态平移。我们观察到常用的聚类算法无法处理具有不均匀点云分布和不同实例大小的复杂自动驾驶场景。因此，我们提出了一种高效的可学习聚类模块，即动态移位，它可以针对不同的实例动态调整内核函数。 3）扩展到4D预测。此外，我们通过对齐 LiDAR 帧上的时间统一实例聚类，将 DS-Net 扩展到 4D 全景 LiDAR 分割。为了全面评估基于 LiDAR 的全景分割的性能，我们从两个大型自动驾驶 LiDAR 数据集 SemanticKITTI 和 nuScenes 构建和管理基准。大量实验表明，我们提出的 DS-Net 在这两项任务中都比当前最先进的方法实现了更高的精度。值得注意的是，在任务的单帧版本中，我们在 PQ 指标方面比 SOTA 方法高出 1.8%。在该任务的 4D 版本中，我们在 LSTQ 指标方面超出了第二名 5.4%。 本文提出基于LiDAR的4D全景分割方法DS-Net，旨在统一解析自动驾驶场景中的物体与场景。 Fangzhou Hong,Hui Zhou,Xinge Zhu,Hongsheng Li,Ziwei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel Oliveira,Edoardo Giusto,Emanuele Dri,Nadir Casciola,Betis Baheri,Qiang Guan,Bartolomeo Montrucchio,Paolo Rech
title: QuFI: a Quantum Fault Injector to Measure the Reliability of Qubits and Quantum Circuits
title_zh: QuFI：用于测量量子位和量子电路可靠性的量子故障注入器
comment: 13 pages, 11 figures. To be published in the 52nd Annual IEEE/IFIP International Conference on Dependable Systems and Networks (DSN'22)
comments: 13 pages, 11 figures. To be published in the 52nd Annual IEEE/IFIP International Conference on Dependable Systems and Networks (DSN'22)
abstract: Quantum computing is a new technology that is expected to revolutionize the computation paradigm in the next few years. Qubits exploit the quantum physics proprieties to increase the parallelism and speed of computation. Unfortunately, besides being intrinsically noisy, qubits have also been shown to be highly susceptible to external sources of faults, such as ionizing radiation. The latest discoveries highlight a much higher radiation sensitivity of qubits than traditional transistors and identify a much more complex fault model than bit-flip. We propose a framework to identify the quantum circuits sensitivity to radiation-induced faults and the probability for a fault in a qubit to propagate to the output. Based on the latest studies and radiation experiments performed on real quantum machines, we model the transient faults in a qubit as a phase shift with a parametrized magnitude. Additionally, our framework can inject multiple qubit faults, tuning the phase shift magnitude based on the proximity of the qubit to the particle strike location. As we show in the paper, the proposed fault injector is highly flexible, and it can be used on both quantum circuit simulators and real quantum machines. We report the finding of more than 285M injections on the Qiskit simulator and 53K injections on real IBM machines. We consider three quantum algorithms and identify the faults and qubits that are more likely to impact the output. We also consider the fault propagation dependence on the circuit scale, showing that the reliability profile for some quantum algorithms is scale-dependent, with increased impact from radiation-induced faults as we increase the number of qubits. Finally, we also consider multi qubits faults, showing that they are much more critical than single faults. The fault injector and the data presented in this paper are available in a public repository to allow further analysis.
summary: Quantum computing is a new technology that is expected to revolutionize the computation paradigm in the next few years. Qubits exploit the quantum physics proprieties to increase the parallelism and speed of computation. Unfortunately, besides being intrinsically noisy, qubits have also been shown to be highly susceptible to external sources of faults, such as ionizing radiation. The latest discoveries highlight a much higher radiation sensitivity of qubits than traditional transistors and identify a much more complex fault model than bit-flip. We propose a framework to identify the quantum circuits sensitivity to radiation-induced faults and the probability for a fault in a qubit to propagate to the output. Based on the latest studies and radiation experiments performed on real quantum machines, we model the transient faults in a qubit as a phase shift with a parametrized magnitude. Additionally, our framework can inject multiple qubit faults, tuning the phase shift magnitude based on the proximity of the qubit to the particle strike location. As we show in the paper, the proposed fault injector is highly flexible, and it can be used on both quantum circuit simulators and real quantum machines. We report the finding of more than 285M injections on the Qiskit simulator and 53K injections on real IBM machines. We consider three quantum algorithms and identify the faults and qubits that are more likely to impact the output. We also consider the fault propagation dependence on the circuit scale, showing that the reliability profile for some quantum algorithms is scale-dependent, with increased impact from radiation-induced faults as we increase the number of qubits. Finally, we also consider multi qubits faults, showing that they are much more critical than single faults. The fault injector and the data presented in this paper are available in a public repository to allow further analysis.
abstract_zh: 量子计算是一项新技术，有望在未来几年内彻底改变计算范式。量子位利用量子物理特性来提高计算的并行性和速度。不幸的是，除了固有的噪声之外，量子位还被证明非常容易受到外部故障源的影响，例如电离辐射。最新发现强调了量子位比传统晶体管具有更高的辐射敏感性，并确定了比位翻转更复杂的故障模型。我们提出了一个框架来识别量子电路对辐射引起的故障的敏感性以及量子位中的故障传播到输出的概率。基于在真实量子机器上进行的最新研究和辐射实验，我们将量子位中的瞬态故障建模为具有参数化幅度的相移。此外，我们的框架可以注入多个量子位故障，根据量子位与粒子撞击位置的接近程度调整相移幅度。正如我们在论文中所示，所提出的故障注入器非常灵活，它可以用于量子电路模拟器和真实的量子机。我们报告了在 Qiskit 模拟器上发现的超过 285M 注入，在真实 IBM 机器上发现的 53K 注入。我们考虑三种量子算法，并识别更有可能影响输出的故障和量子位。我们还考虑了故障传播对电路规模的依赖性，表明某些量子算法的可靠性概况是规模相关的，随着量子位数量的增加，辐射引起的故障的影响也会增加。最后，我们还考虑了多量子位故障，表明它们比单个故障更严重。本文中提供的故障注入器和数据可在公共存储库中获取，以便进行进一步分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuFI量子故障注入框架，用于评估量子比特和量子电路在辐射诱导故障下的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 量子比特对辐射等外部故障高度敏感，且故障模型比传统比特更复杂，现有方法难以全面评估其可靠性。
AI.method: 将瞬态故障建模为参数化相位偏移，通过调整相位偏移幅度模拟不同位置的粒子撞击，支持在量子模拟器和真实量子设备中注入单/多量子比特故障。
AI.result: 在Qiskit模拟器完成2.85亿次注入实验，在IBM设备完成5.3万次实验，发现故障传播与电路规模相关，多量子比特故障比单故障更危险。
AI.conclusion: QuFI框架有效揭示了量子算法的可靠性特征，实验数据公开可支持进一步研究。

authors_text: Yao Yao,Jingyang Zhang,Jingbo Liu,Yihang Qu,Tian Fang,David McKinnon,Yanghai Tsin,Long Quan
title: NeILF: Neural Incident Light Field for Physically-based Material Estimation
title_zh: NeILF：用于基于物理的材料估计的神经入射光场
abstract: We present a differentiable rendering framework for material and lighting estimation from multi-view images and a reconstructed geometry. In the framework, we represent scene lightings as the Neural Incident Light Field (NeILF) and material properties as the surface BRDF modelled by multi-layer perceptrons. Compared with recent approaches that approximate scene lightings as the 2D environment map, NeILF is a fully 5D light field that is capable of modelling illuminations of any static scenes. In addition, occlusions and indirect lights can be handled naturally by the NeILF representation without requiring multiple bounces of ray tracing, making it possible to estimate material properties even for scenes with complex lightings and geometries. We also propose a smoothness regularization and a Lambertian assumption to reduce the material-lighting ambiguity during the optimization. Our method strictly follows the physically-based rendering equation, and jointly optimizes material and lighting through the differentiable rendering process. We have intensively evaluated the proposed method on our in-house synthetic dataset, the DTU MVS dataset, and real-world BlendedMVS scenes. Our method is able to outperform previous methods by a significant margin in terms of novel view rendering quality, setting a new state-of-the-art for image-based material and lighting estimation.
summary: We present a differentiable rendering framework for material and lighting estimation from multi-view images and a reconstructed geometry. In the framework, we represent scene lightings as the Neural Incident Light Field (NeILF) and material properties as the surface BRDF modelled by multi-layer perceptrons. Compared with recent approaches that approximate scene lightings as the 2D environment map, NeILF is a fully 5D light field that is capable of modelling illuminations of any static scenes. In addition, occlusions and indirect lights can be handled naturally by the NeILF representation without requiring multiple bounces of ray tracing, making it possible to estimate material properties even for scenes with complex lightings and geometries. We also propose a smoothness regularization and a Lambertian assumption to reduce the material-lighting ambiguity during the optimization. Our method strictly follows the physically-based rendering equation, and jointly optimizes material and lighting through the differentiable rendering process. We have intensively evaluated the proposed method on our in-house synthetic dataset, the DTU MVS dataset, and real-world BlendedMVS scenes. Our method is able to outperform previous methods by a significant margin in terms of novel view rendering quality, setting a new state-of-the-art for image-based material and lighting estimation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个可微渲染框架，用于根据多视图图像和重建的几何体进行材质和照明估计。在该框架中，我们将场景照明表示为神经入射光场 (NeILF)，将材质属性表示为由多层感知器建模的表面 BRDF。与最近将场景照明近似为 2D 环境图的方法相比，NeILF 是一个完全 5D 光场，能够对任何静态场景的照明进行建模。此外，NeILF 表示可以自然地处理遮挡和间接光源，而不需要多次反射光线追踪，因此即使对于具有复杂光照和几何形状的场景也可以估计材质属性。我们还提出了平滑正则化和朗伯假设，以减少优化过程中的材质照明模糊性。我们的方法严格遵循基于物理的渲染方程，并通过可微渲染过程联合优化材质和光照。我们在内部合成数据集、DTU MVS 数据集和现实世界 BlendedMVS 场景上深入评估了所提出的方法。我们的方法在新颖的视图渲染质量方面能够显着优于以前的方法，为基于图像的材质和照明估计设定了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的光照场（NeILF）框架，用于从多视角图像和重建几何中联合估计材料属性和光照。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过二维环境图近似场景光照，难以处理复杂光照和遮挡场景，且无法自然建模间接光照。
AI.method: 将场景光照表示为5D神经入射光场（NeILF），材料属性用多层感知机建模BRDF，并引入平滑正则化和兰伯特假设减少优化歧义。
AI.result: 在合成数据集、DTU MVS数据集和真实场景BlendedMVS上均优于现有方法，新视图渲染质量达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: NeILF通过物理渲染方程联合优化材料和光照，为复杂场景的图像基材质与光照估计提供了新方法。

search_text: NeILF: Neural Incident Light Field for Physically-based Material Estimation NeILF：用于基于物理的材料估计的神经入射光场 We present a differentiable rendering framework for material and lighting estimation from multi-view images and a reconstructed geometry. In the framework, we represent scene lightings as the Neural Incident Light Field (NeILF) and material properties as the surface BRDF modelled by multi-layer perceptrons. Compared with recent approaches that approximate scene lightings as the 2D environment map, NeILF is a fully 5D light field that is capable of modelling illuminations of any static scenes. In addition, occlusions and indirect lights can be handled naturally by the NeILF representation without requiring multiple bounces of ray tracing, making it possible to estimate material properties even for scenes with complex lightings and geometries. We also propose a smoothness regularization and a Lambertian assumption to reduce the material-lighting ambiguity during the optimization. Our method strictly follows the physically-based rendering equation, and jointly optimizes material and lighting through the differentiable rendering process. We have intensively evaluated the proposed method on our in-house synthetic dataset, the DTU MVS dataset, and real-world BlendedMVS scenes. Our method is able to outperform previous methods by a significant margin in terms of novel view rendering quality, setting a new state-of-the-art for image-based material and lighting estimation. 我们提出了一个可微渲染框架，用于根据多视图图像和重建的几何体进行材质和照明估计。在该框架中，我们将场景照明表示为神经入射光场 (NeILF)，将材质属性表示为由多层感知器建模的表面 BRDF。与最近将场景照明近似为 2D 环境图的方法相比，NeILF 是一个完全 5D 光场，能够对任何静态场景的照明进行建模。此外，NeILF 表示可以自然地处理遮挡和间接光源，而不需要多次反射光线追踪，因此即使对于具有复杂光照和几何形状的场景也可以估计材质属性。我们还提出了平滑正则化和朗伯假设，以减少优化过程中的材质照明模糊性。我们的方法严格遵循基于物理的渲染方程，并通过可微渲染过程联合优化材质和光照。我们在内部合成数据集、DTU MVS 数据集和现实世界 BlendedMVS 场景上深入评估了所提出的方法。我们的方法在新颖的视图渲染质量方面能够显着优于以前的方法，为基于图像的材质和照明估计设定了新的最先进技术。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的光照场（NeILF）框架，用于从多视角图像和重建几何中联合估计材料属性和光照。 Yao Yao,Jingyang Zhang,Jingbo Liu,Yihang Qu,Tian Fang,David McKinnon,Yanghai Tsin,Long Quan cs.CV

title: Optimal Correlated Equilibria in General-Sum Extensive-Form Games: Fixed-Parameter Algorithms, Hardness, and Two-Sided Column-Generation
title_zh: 广义和扩展型博弈中的最优相关均衡：固定参数算法、硬度和两侧列生成
abstract: We study the problem of finding optimal correlated equilibria of various sorts in extensive-form games: normal-form coarse correlated equilibrium (NFCCE), extensive-form coarse correlated equilibrium (EFCCE), and extensive-form correlated equilibrium (EFCE). We make two primary contributions. First, we introduce a new algorithm for computing optimal equilibria in all three notions. Its runtime depends exponentially only on a parameter related to the information structure of the game. We also prove a fundamental complexity gap: while our size bounds for NFCCE are similar to those achieved in the case of team games by Zhang et al., this is impossible to achieve for the other two concepts under standard complexity assumptions. Second, we propose a two-sided column generation approach for use when the runtime or memory usage of the previous algorithm is prohibitive. Our algorithm improves upon the one-sided approach of Farina et al. by means of a new decomposition of correlated strategies which allows players to re-optimize their sequence-form strategies with respect to correlation plans which were previously added to the support. Experiments show that our techniques outperform the prior state of the art for computing optimal general-sum correlated equilibria.
summary: We study the problem of finding optimal correlated equilibria of various sorts in extensive-form games: normal-form coarse correlated equilibrium (NFCCE), extensive-form coarse correlated equilibrium (EFCCE), and extensive-form correlated equilibrium (EFCE). We make two primary contributions. First, we introduce a new algorithm for computing optimal equilibria in all three notions. Its runtime depends exponentially only on a parameter related to the information structure of the game. We also prove a fundamental complexity gap: while our size bounds for NFCCE are similar to those achieved in the case of team games by Zhang et al., this is impossible to achieve for the other two concepts under standard complexity assumptions. Second, we propose a two-sided column generation approach for use when the runtime or memory usage of the previous algorithm is prohibitive. Our algorithm improves upon the one-sided approach of Farina et al. by means of a new decomposition of correlated strategies which allows players to re-optimize their sequence-form strategies with respect to correlation plans which were previously added to the support. Experiments show that our techniques outperform the prior state of the art for computing optimal general-sum correlated equilibria.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在扩展形式博弈中寻找各种最佳相关均衡的问题：正态形式粗相关平衡（NFCCE）、扩展形式粗相关平衡（EFCCE）和扩展形式相关平衡（EFCE）。我们做出了两项主要贡献。首先，我们引入一种新算法来计算所有三个概念中的最佳平衡。它的运行时间仅以指数方式取决于与游戏信息结构相关的参数。我们还证明了一个基本的复杂性差距：虽然我们对 NFCCE 的规模限制与在张等人的团队游戏中实现的规模类似，但在标准复杂性假设下对于其他两个概念来说这是不可能实现的。其次，我们提出了一种双边列生成方法，用于当先前算法的运行时或内存使用量过高时使用。我们的算法改进了 Farina 等人的片面方法。通过相关策略的新分解，允许玩家根据先前添加到支持中的相关计划重新优化其序列形式策略。实验表明，我们的技术在计算最佳总和相关平衡方面优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究广义两人博弈中最优相关均衡的计算问题，提出固定参数算法和双侧列生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理复杂信息结构的博弈时效率低下，且不同均衡概念的计算复杂度差异未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 提出固定参数算法，运行时间仅与信息结构参数指数相关；设计双侧列生成方法改进策略分解与再优化过程。
AI.result: 证明NFCCE与团队博弈类似的时间复杂度边界，而EFCCE/EFCE在标准复杂性假设下无法达到；实验显示新方法优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法创新与复杂性分析，填补了不同均衡概念计算效率的理论空白，并提供了更实用的求解框架。

title: MDNet: Learning Monaural Speech Enhancement from Deep Prior Gradient
title_zh: MDNet：从深度先验梯度学习单声道语音增强
abstract: While traditional statistical signal processing model-based methods can derive the optimal estimators relying on specific statistical assumptions, current learning-based methods further promote the performance upper bound via deep neural networks but at the expense of high encapsulation and lack adequate interpretability. Standing upon the intersection between traditional model-based methods and learning-based methods, we propose a model-driven approach based on the maximum a posteriori (MAP) framework, termed as MDNet, for single-channel speech enhancement. Specifically, the original problem is formulated into the joint posterior estimation w.r.t. speech and noise components. Different from the manual assumption toward the prior terms, we propose to model the prior distribution via networks and thus can learn from training data. The framework takes the unfolding structure and in each step, the target parameters can be progressively estimated through explicit gradient descent operations. Besides, another network serves as the fusion module to further refine the previous speech estimation. The experiments are conducted on the WSJ0-SI84 and Interspeech2020 DNS-Challenge datasets, and quantitative results show that the proposed approach outshines previous state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: While traditional statistical signal processing model-based methods can derive the optimal estimators relying on specific statistical assumptions, current learning-based methods further promote the performance upper bound via deep neural networks but at the expense of high encapsulation and lack adequate interpretability. Standing upon the intersection between traditional model-based methods and learning-based methods, we propose a model-driven approach based on the maximum a posteriori (MAP) framework, termed as MDNet, for single-channel speech enhancement. Specifically, the original problem is formulated into the joint posterior estimation w.r.t. speech and noise components. Different from the manual assumption toward the prior terms, we propose to model the prior distribution via networks and thus can learn from training data. The framework takes the unfolding structure and in each step, the target parameters can be progressively estimated through explicit gradient descent operations. Besides, another network serves as the fusion module to further refine the previous speech estimation. The experiments are conducted on the WSJ0-SI84 and Interspeech2020 DNS-Challenge datasets, and quantitative results show that the proposed approach outshines previous state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 虽然传统的基于统计信号处理模型的方法可以根据特定的统计假设得出最佳估计量，但当前基于学习的方法通过深度神经网络进一步提升性能上限，但代价是高封装性和缺乏足够的可解释性。站在传统基于模型的方法和基于学习的方法之间的交叉点上，我们提出了一种基于最大后验（MAP）框架的模型驱动方法，称为 MDNet，用于单通道语音增强。具体来说，原始问题被表述为联合后验估计。语音和噪声成分。与对先验项的手动假设不同，我们建议通过网络对先验分布进行建模，从而可以从训练数据中学习。该框架采用展开结构，在每一步中，可以通过显式梯度下降操作逐步估计目标参数。此外，另一个网络作为融合模块来进一步细化先前的语音估计。实验是在 WSJ0-SI84 和 Interspeech2020 DNS-Challenge 数据集上进行的，定量结果表明，所提出的方法优于之前最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大后验框架的模型驱动方法MDNet，用于单通道语音增强。
AI.motivation: 传统统计方法依赖特定假设且性能有限，深度学习方法虽性能高但缺乏可解释性，需结合两者优势。
AI.method: 通过展开结构实现显式梯度下降逐步估计参数，利用网络建模先验分布并设置融合模块优化语音估计。
AI.result: 在WSJ0-SI84和DNS-Challenge数据集上实验，定量结果优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MDNet有效融合模型驱动与数据驱动优势，在提升性能的同时增强方法可解释性。

ai_content.result: 在WSJ0-SI84和DNS-Challenge数据集上实验，定量结果优于现有最先进基线方法。
ai_content.conclusion: MDNet有效融合模型驱动与数据驱动优势，在提升性能的同时增强方法可解释性。

search_text: MDNet: Learning Monaural Speech Enhancement from Deep Prior Gradient MDNet：从深度先验梯度学习单声道语音增强 While traditional statistical signal processing model-based methods can derive the optimal estimators relying on specific statistical assumptions, current learning-based methods further promote the performance upper bound via deep neural networks but at the expense of high encapsulation and lack adequate interpretability. Standing upon the intersection between traditional model-based methods and learning-based methods, we propose a model-driven approach based on the maximum a posteriori (MAP) framework, termed as MDNet, for single-channel speech enhancement. Specifically, the original problem is formulated into the joint posterior estimation w.r.t. speech and noise components. Different from the manual assumption toward the prior terms, we propose to model the prior distribution via networks and thus can learn from training data. The framework takes the unfolding structure and in each step, the target parameters can be progressively estimated through explicit gradient descent operations. Besides, another network serves as the fusion module to further refine the previous speech estimation. The experiments are conducted on the WSJ0-SI84 and Interspeech2020 DNS-Challenge datasets, and quantitative results show that the proposed approach outshines previous state-of-the-art baselines. 虽然传统的基于统计信号处理模型的方法可以根据特定的统计假设得出最佳估计量，但当前基于学习的方法通过深度神经网络进一步提升性能上限，但代价是高封装性和缺乏足够的可解释性。站在传统基于模型的方法和基于学习的方法之间的交叉点上，我们提出了一种基于最大后验（MAP）框架的模型驱动方法，称为 MDNet，用于单通道语音增强。具体来说，原始问题被表述为联合后验估计。语音和噪声成分。与对先验项的手动假设不同，我们建议通过网络对先验分布进行建模，从而可以从训练数据中学习。该框架采用展开结构，在每一步中，可以通过显式梯度下降操作逐步估计目标参数。此外，另一个网络作为融合模块来进一步细化先前的语音估计。实验是在 WSJ0-SI84 和 Interspeech2020 DNS-Challenge 数据集上进行的，定量结果表明，所提出的方法优于之前最先进的基线。 本文提出一种基于最大后验框架的模型驱动方法MDNet，用于单通道语音增强。 Andong Li,Chengshi Zheng,Ziyang Zhang,Xiaodong Li cs.SD,eess.AS

title: RED-ACE: Robust Error Detection for ASR using Confidence Embeddings
title_zh: RED-ACE：使用置信度嵌入进行 ASR 的鲁棒错误检测
comment: Accepted as a short paper in EMNLP 2022
comments: Accepted as a short paper in EMNLP 2022
abstract: ASR Error Detection (AED) models aim to post-process the output of Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems, in order to detect transcription errors. Modern approaches usually use text-based input, comprised solely of the ASR transcription hypothesis, disregarding additional signals from the ASR model. Instead, we propose to utilize the ASR system's word-level confidence scores for improving AED performance. Specifically, we add an ASR Confidence Embedding (ACE) layer to the AED model's encoder, allowing us to jointly encode the confidence scores and the transcribed text into a contextualized representation. Our experiments show the benefits of ASR confidence scores for AED, their complementary effect over the textual signal, as well as the effectiveness and robustness of ACE for combining these signals. To foster further research, we publish a novel AED dataset consisting of ASR outputs on the LibriSpeech corpus with annotated transcription errors.

Specifically, we add an ASR Confidence Embedding (ACE) layer to the AED model's encoder, allowing us to jointly encode the confidence scores and the transcribed text into a contextualized representation. Our experiments show the benefits of ASR confidence scores for AED, their complementary effect over the textual signal, as well as the effectiveness and robustness of ACE for combining these signals. To foster further research, we publish a novel AED dataset consisting of ASR outputs on the LibriSpeech corpus with annotated transcription errors.
abstract_zh: ASR 错误检测 (AED) 模型旨在对自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的输出进行后处理，以检测转录错误。现代方法通常使用基于文本的输入，仅包含 ASR 转录假设，忽略来自 ASR 模型的其他信号。相反，我们建议利用 ASR 系统的单词级置信度分数来提高 AED 性能。具体来说，我们将 ASR 置信度嵌入 (ACE) 层添加到 AED 模型的编码器中，使我们能够将置信度分数和转录文本联合编码为上下文化表示。我们的实验展示了 ASR 置信度评分对 AED 的好处、它们对文本信号的互补作用，以及 ACE 组合这些信号的有效性和鲁棒性。为了促进进一步的研究，我们发布了一个新颖的 AED 数据集，其中包含 LibriSpeech 语料库上的 ASR 输出以及带注释的转录错误。

AI.tldr: 提出RED-ACE方法，利用ASR置信度嵌入提升错误检测性能
AI.motivation: 传统AED方法仅依赖文本信息，未利用ASR置信度分数，导致检测效果受限，需探索更有效的方法
AI.method: 在AED编码器中加入ACE层，联合编码文本与置信度分数，生成上下文表示，结合文本和置信度信息
AI.result: 实验验证ACE有效结合置信度与文本信息，提升检测效果，发布LibriSpeech标注数据集促进研究
AI.conclusion: RED-ACE通过融合置信度信息提升AED性能，证明多源信号结合的优势，并为研究提供新数据集

title: Orchestrated Value Mapping for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习的精心编排的价值映射
abstract: We present a general convergent class of reinforcement learning algorithms that is founded on two distinct principles: (1) mapping value estimates to a different space using arbitrary functions from a broad class, and (2) linearly decomposing the reward signal into multiple channels. The first principle enables incorporating specific properties into the value estimator that can enhance learning. The second principle, on the other hand, allows for the value function to be represented as a composition of multiple utility functions. This can be leveraged for various purposes, e.g. dealing with highly varying reward scales, incorporating a priori knowledge about the sources of reward, and ensemble learning. Combining the two principles yields a general blueprint for instantiating convergent algorithms by orchestrating diverse mapping functions over multiple reward channels. This blueprint generalizes and subsumes algorithms such as Q-Learning, Log Q-Learning, and Q-Decomposition. In addition, our convergence proof for this general class relaxes certain required assumptions in some of these algorithms. Based on our theory, we discuss several interesting configurations as special cases. Finally, to illustrate the potential of the design space that our theory opens up, we instantiate a particular algorithm and evaluate its performance on the Atari suite.
summary: We present a general convergent class of reinforcement learning algorithms that is founded on two distinct principles: (1) mapping value estimates to a different space using arbitrary functions from a broad class, and (2) linearly decomposing the reward signal into multiple channels. The first principle enables incorporating specific properties into the value estimator that can enhance learning. The second principle, on the other hand, allows for the value function to be represented as a composition of multiple utility functions. This can be leveraged for various purposes, e.g. dealing with highly varying reward scales, incorporating a priori knowledge about the sources of reward, and ensemble learning. Combining the two principles yields a general blueprint for instantiating convergent algorithms by orchestrating diverse mapping functions over multiple reward channels. This blueprint generalizes and subsumes algorithms such as Q-Learning, Log Q-Learning, and Q-Decomposition. In addition, our convergence proof for this general class relaxes certain required assumptions in some of these algorithms. Based on our theory, we discuss several interesting configurations as special cases. Finally, to illustrate the potential of the design space that our theory opens up, we instantiate a particular algorithm and evaluate its performance on the Atari suite.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通用的收敛类强化学习算法，该算法基于两个不同的原则：（1）使用广泛类别中的任意函数将值估计映射到不同的空间，以及（2）将奖励信号线性分解为多个通道。第一个原则可以将特定属性合并到可以增强学习的价值估计器中。另一方面，第二个原则允许将价值函数表示为多个效用函数的组合。这可以用于多种目的，例如处理高度变化的奖励尺度，结合有关奖励来源的先验知识和集成学习。结合这两个原则，通过在多个奖励通道上协调不同的映射函数，生成了实例化收敛算法的通用蓝图。该蓝图概括并包含了 Q-Learning、Log Q-Learning 和 Q-Decomposition 等算法。此外，我们对此类通用类的收敛证明放宽了其中一些算法中某些所需的假设。根据我们的理论，我们讨论了几种有趣的配置作为特殊情况。最后，为了说明我们的理论所开辟的设计空间的潜力，我们实例化了一个特定的算法并评估了它在 Atari 套件上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于值估计映射和奖励信号分解的通用强化学习算法框架，能够整合多种映射函数并处理多通道奖励信号。
AI.motivation: 为了解决传统强化学习中值估计的局限性及奖励信号处理的灵活性问题，同时提升算法收敛性和适用性。
AI.method: 通过任意函数将值估计映射到不同空间，并将奖励信号线性分解为多通道，结合两者构建通用算法蓝图。
AI.result: 提出的方法统一了Q-Learning等经典算法，放宽了收敛条件，并在Atari游戏测试中验证了实例算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为设计收敛性强化学习算法提供了灵活工具，能够适应复杂奖励结构并融入先验知识。

title: Dataset and Case Studies for Visual Near-Duplicates Detection in the Context of Social Media
title_zh: 社交媒体背景下视觉近似重复检测的数据集和案例研究
abstract: The massive spread of visual content through the web and social media poses both challenges and opportunities. Tracking visually-similar content is an important task for studying and analyzing social phenomena related to the spread of such content. In this paper, we address this need by building a dataset of social media images and evaluating visual near-duplicates retrieval methods based on image retrieval and several advanced visual feature extraction methods. We evaluate the methods using a large-scale dataset of images we crawl from social media and their manipulated versions we generated, presenting promising results in terms of recall. We demonstrate the potential of this method in two case studies: one that shows the value of creating systems supporting manual content review, and another that demonstrates the usefulness of automatic large-scale data analysis.
summary: The massive spread of visual content through the web and social media poses both challenges and opportunities. Tracking visually-similar content is an important task for studying and analyzing social phenomena related to the spread of such content. In this paper, we address this need by building a dataset of social media images and evaluating visual near-duplicates retrieval methods based on image retrieval and several advanced visual feature extraction methods. We evaluate the methods using a large-scale dataset of images we crawl from social media and their manipulated versions we generated, presenting promising results in terms of recall. We demonstrate the potential of this method in two case studies: one that shows the value of creating systems supporting manual content review, and another that demonstrates the usefulness of automatic large-scale data analysis.
abstract_zh: 视觉内容通过网络和社交媒体的大规模传播既带来了挑战，也带来了机遇。跟踪视觉上相似的内容是研究和分析与此类内容传播相关的社会现象的一项重要任务。在本文中，我们通过构建社交媒体图像数据集并评估基于图像检索和几种高级视觉特征提取方法的视觉近似重复检索方法来满足这一需求。我们使用从社交媒体抓取的大规模图像数据集及其生成的操纵版本来评估这些方法，在召回方面呈现出有希望的结果。我们在两个案例研究中展示了这种方法的潜力：一个展示了创建支持手动内容审核的系统的价值，另一个展示了自动大规模数据分析的有用性。

AI.tldr: 构建社交媒体图像数据集并评估视觉近似重复检测方法
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中视觉内容的广泛传播需要有效追踪相似内容以分析社会现象

search_text: Dataset and Case Studies for Visual Near-Duplicates Detection in the Context of Social Media 社交媒体背景下视觉近似重复检测的数据集和案例研究 The massive spread of visual content through the web and social media poses both challenges and opportunities. Tracking visually-similar content is an important task for studying and analyzing social phenomena related to the spread of such content. In this paper, we address this need by building a dataset of social media images and evaluating visual near-duplicates retrieval methods based on image retrieval and several advanced visual feature extraction methods. We evaluate the methods using a large-scale dataset of images we crawl from social media and their manipulated versions we generated, presenting promising results in terms of recall. We demonstrate the potential of this method in two case studies: one that shows the value of creating systems supporting manual content review, and another that demonstrates the usefulness of automatic large-scale data analysis. 视觉内容通过网络和社交媒体的大规模传播既带来了挑战，也带来了机遇。跟踪视觉上相似的内容是研究和分析与此类内容传播相关的社会现象的一项重要任务。在本文中，我们通过构建社交媒体图像数据集并评估基于图像检索和几种高级视觉特征提取方法的视觉近似重复检索方法来满足这一需求。我们使用从社交媒体抓取的大规模图像数据集及其生成的操纵版本来评估这些方法，在召回方面呈现出有希望的结果。我们在两个案例研究中展示了这种方法的潜力：一个展示了创建支持手动内容审核的系统的价值，另一个展示了自动大规模数据分析的有用性。 构建社交媒体图像数据集并评估视觉近似重复检测方法 Hana Matatov,Mor Naaman,Ofra Amir cs.IR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Claudio Cimarelli,Hriday Bavle,Jose Luis Sanchez-Lopez,Holger Voos
title: RAUM-VO: Rotational Adjusted Unsupervised Monocular Visual Odometry
title_zh: RAUM-VO：旋转调整无监督单目视觉里程计
abstract: Unsupervised learning for monocular camera motion and 3D scene understanding has gained popularity over traditional methods, relying on epipolar geometry or non-linear optimization. Notably, deep learning can overcome many issues of monocular vision, such as perceptual aliasing, low-textured areas, scale-drift, and degenerate motions. Also, concerning supervised learning, we can fully leverage video streams data without the need for depth or motion labels. However, in this work, we note that rotational motion can limit the accuracy of the unsupervised pose networks more than the translational component. Therefore, we present RAUM-VO, an approach based on a model-free epipolar constraint for frame-to-frame motion estimation (F2F) to adjust the rotation during training and online inference. To this end, we match 2D keypoints between consecutive frames using pre-trained deep networks, Superpoint and Superglue, while training a network for depth and pose estimation using an unsupervised training protocol. Then, we adjust the predicted rotation with the motion estimated by F2F using the 2D matches and initializing the solver with the pose network prediction. Ultimately, RAUM-VO shows a considerable accuracy improvement compared to other unsupervised pose networks on the KITTI dataset while reducing the complexity of other hybrid or traditional approaches and achieving comparable state-of-the-art results.
summary: Unsupervised learning for monocular camera motion and 3D scene understanding has gained popularity over traditional methods, relying on epipolar geometry or non-linear optimization. Notably, deep learning can overcome many issues of monocular vision, such as perceptual aliasing, low-textured areas, scale-drift, and degenerate motions. Also, concerning supervised learning, we can fully leverage video streams data without the need for depth or motion labels. However, in this work, we note that rotational motion can limit the accuracy of the unsupervised pose networks more than the translational component. Therefore, we present RAUM-VO, an approach based on a model-free epipolar constraint for frame-to-frame motion estimation (F2F) to adjust the rotation during training and online inference. To this end, we match 2D keypoints between consecutive frames using pre-trained deep networks, Superpoint and Superglue, while training a network for depth and pose estimation using an unsupervised training protocol. Then, we adjust the predicted rotation with the motion estimated by F2F using the 2D matches and initializing the solver with the pose network prediction. Ultimately, RAUM-VO shows a considerable accuracy improvement compared to other unsupervised pose networks on the KITTI dataset while reducing the complexity of other hybrid or traditional approaches and achieving comparable state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 依靠对极几何或非线性优化，单目相机运动和 3D 场景理解的无监督学习比传统方法更受欢迎。值得注意的是，深度学习可以克服单眼视觉的许多问题，例如感知锯齿、低纹理区域、尺度漂移和简并运动。此外，关于监督学习，我们可以充分利用视频流数据，而不需要深度或运动标签。然而，在这项工作中，我们注意到旋转运动比平移分量更能限制无监督姿势网络的准确性。因此，我们提出了 RAUM-VO，一种基于无模型极线约束的帧间运动估计（F2F）方法，用于在训练和在线推理期间调整旋转。为此，我们使用预先训练的深度网络、Superpoint 和 Superglue 来匹配连续帧之间的 2D 关键点，同时使用无监督训练协议训练网络进行深度和姿态估计。然后，我们使用 2D 匹配通过 F2F 估计的运动来调整预测旋转，并使用位姿网络预测初始化求解器。最终，与 KITTI 数据集上的其他无监督姿势网络相比，RAUM-VO 显示出相当大的准确性改进，同时降低了其他混合或传统方法的复杂性，并实现了可比的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAUM-VO方法，通过调整旋转误差提升无监督单目视觉里程计的精度。
AI.motivation: 传统单目视觉里程计在旋转运动场景下存在精度不足问题，而现有无监督方法对旋转误差的处理不够有效。
AI.method: 基于无模型极线约束，结合预训练的Superpoint和Superglue进行特征匹配，通过帧间运动估计调整旋转参数，并采用无监督训练协议优化深度和姿态估计网络。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上相比其他无监督方法精度提升显著，同时降低算法复杂度并达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: RAUM-VO通过针对性旋转校正有效提升了单目视觉里程计性能，为无监督方法提供了新思路。

Notably, deep learning can overcome many issues of monocular vision, such as perceptual aliasing, low-textured areas, scale-drift, and degenerate motions. Also, concerning supervised learning, we can fully leverage video streams data without the need for depth or motion labels. However, in this work, we note that rotational motion can limit the accuracy of the unsupervised pose networks more than the translational component. Therefore, we present RAUM-VO, an approach based on a model-free epipolar constraint for frame-to-frame motion estimation (F2F) to adjust the rotation during training and online inference. To this end, we match 2D keypoints between consecutive frames using pre-trained deep networks, Superpoint and Superglue, while training a network for depth and pose estimation using an unsupervised training protocol. Then, we adjust the predicted rotation with the motion estimated by F2F using the 2D matches and initializing the solver with the pose network prediction. Ultimately, RAUM-VO shows a considerable accuracy improvement compared to other unsupervised pose networks on the KITTI dataset while reducing the complexity of other hybrid or traditional approaches and achieving comparable state-of-the-art results. 依靠对极几何或非线性优化，单目相机运动和 3D 场景理解的无监督学习比传统方法更受欢迎。值得注意的是，深度学习可以克服单眼视觉的许多问题，例如感知锯齿、低纹理区域、尺度漂移和简并运动。此外，关于监督学习，我们可以充分利用视频流数据，而不需要深度或运动标签。然而，在这项工作中，我们注意到旋转运动比平移分量更能限制无监督姿势网络的准确性。因此，我们提出了 RAUM-VO，一种基于无模型极线约束的帧间运动估计（F2F）方法，用于在训练和在线推理期间调整旋转。为此，我们使用预先训练的深度网络、Superpoint 和 Superglue 来匹配连续帧之间的 2D 关键点，同时使用无监督训练协议训练网络进行深度和姿态估计。然后，我们使用 2D 匹配通过 F2F 估计的运动来调整预测旋转，并使用位姿网络预测初始化求解器。最终，与 KITTI 数据集上的其他无监督姿势网络相比，RAUM-VO 显示出相当大的准确性改进，同时降低了其他混合或传统方法的复杂性，并实现了可比的最先进结果。 本文提出RAUM-VO方法，通过调整旋转误差提升无监督单目视觉里程计的精度。 Claudio Cimarelli,Hriday Bavle,Jose Luis Sanchez-Lopez,Holger Voos cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Ye Huang,Di Kang,Liang Chen,Xuefei Zhe,Wenjing Jia,Xiangjian He,Linchao Bao
title: CAR: Class-aware Regularizations for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: CAR：语义分割的类感知正则化
comment: ECCV 2022 camera ready. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/edwardyehuang/CAR
comments: ECCV 2022 camera ready. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/edwardyehuang/CAR
abstract: Recent segmentation methods, such as OCR and CPNet, utilizing "class level" information in addition to pixel features, have achieved notable success for boosting the accuracy of existing network modules. However, the extracted class-level information was simply concatenated to pixel features, without explicitly being exploited for better pixel representation learning. Moreover, these approaches learn soft class centers based on coarse mask prediction, which is prone to error accumulation. In this paper, aiming to use class level information more effectively, we propose a universal Class-Aware Regularization (CAR) approach to optimize the intra-class variance and inter-class distance during feature learning, motivated by the fact that humans can recognize an object by itself no matter which other objects it appears with. Three novel loss functions are proposed. The first loss function encourages more compact class representations within each class, the second directly maximizes the distance between different class centers, and the third further pushes the distance between inter-class centers and pixels. Furthermore, the class center in our approach is directly generated from ground truth instead of from the error-prone coarse prediction. Our method can be easily applied to most existing segmentation models during training, including OCR and CPNet, and can largely improve their accuracy at no additional inference overhead. Extensive experiments and ablation studies conducted on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed CAR can boost the accuracy of all baseline models by up to 2.23% mIOU with superior generalization ability. The complete code is available at https://github.com/edwardyehuang/CAR.
summary: Recent segmentation methods, such as OCR and CPNet, utilizing "class level" information in addition to pixel features, have achieved notable success for boosting the accuracy of existing network modules. However, the extracted class-level information was simply concatenated to pixel features, without explicitly being exploited for better pixel representation learning. Moreover, these approaches learn soft class centers based on coarse mask prediction, which is prone to error accumulation. In this paper, aiming to use class level information more effectively, we propose a universal Class-Aware Regularization (CAR) approach to optimize the intra-class variance and inter-class distance during feature learning, motivated by the fact that humans can recognize an object by itself no matter which other objects it appears with. Three novel loss functions are proposed. The first loss function encourages more compact class representations within each class, the second directly maximizes the distance between different class centers, and the third further pushes the distance between inter-class centers and pixels. Furthermore, the class center in our approach is directly generated from ground truth instead of from the error-prone coarse prediction. Our method can be easily applied to most existing segmentation models during training, including OCR and CPNet, and can largely improve their accuracy at no additional inference overhead. Extensive experiments and ablation studies conducted on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed CAR can boost the accuracy of all baseline models by up to 2.23% mIOU with superior generalization ability. The complete code is available at https://github.com/edwardyehuang/CAR.
abstract_zh: 最近的分割方法，例如 OCR 和 CPNet，除了像素特征之外还利用了“类级别”信息，在提高现有网络模块的准确性方面取得了显着的成功。然而，提取的类级信息只是简单地连接到像素特征，而没有明确地用于更好的像素表示学习。此外，这些方法基于粗掩模预测来学习软类中心，这很容易出现错误累积。在本文中，为了更有效地使用类级别信息，我们提出了一种通用的类感知正则化（CAR）方法来优化特征学习期间的类内方差和类间距离，其动机是人类可以单独识别一个对象，无论它与其他对象一起出现。提出了三种新颖的损失函数。第一个损失函数鼓励每个类内更紧凑的类表示，第二个损失函数直接最大化不同类中心之间的距离，第三个进一步推动类间中心和像素之间的距离。此外，我们方法中的类中心是直接从地面实况生成的，而不是从容易出错的粗略预测生成的。我们的方法可以在训练期间轻松应用于大多数现有的分割模型，包括 OCR 和 CPNet，并且可以在不增加推理开销的情况下大幅提高其准确性。在多个基准数据集上进行的广泛实验和消融研究表明，所提出的 CAR 可以将所有基线模型的准确性提高高达 2.23% mIOU，并具有卓越的泛化能力。完整代码可在 https://github.com/edwardyehuang/CAR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CAR的类感知正则化方法，旨在通过优化类内方差和类间距离提升语义分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽利用类级信息，但仅简单拼接至像素特征，未有效利用类信息进行像素表示学习，且依赖易出错的粗预测生成类中心。
AI.method: 设计三种损失函数：压缩类内表示、最大化类间距离、推动类间中心与像素距离。类中心直接由真实标签生成，无需依赖预测结果。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CAR使所有基线模型的mIOU提升最高达2.23%，且无额外推理开销。
AI.conclusion: CAR通过有效利用类信息，显著提升分割精度，具有良好的通用性和泛化能力。

The first loss function encourages more compact class representations within each class, the second directly maximizes the distance between different class centers, and the third further pushes the distance between inter-class centers and pixels. Furthermore, the class center in our approach is directly generated from ground truth instead of from the error-prone coarse prediction. Our method can be easily applied to most existing segmentation models during training, including OCR and CPNet, and can largely improve their accuracy at no additional inference overhead. Extensive experiments and ablation studies conducted on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed CAR can boost the accuracy of all baseline models by up to 2.23% mIOU with superior generalization ability. The complete code is available at https://github.com/edwardyehuang/CAR. 最近的分割方法，例如 OCR 和 CPNet，除了像素特征之外还利用了“类级别”信息，在提高现有网络模块的准确性方面取得了显着的成功。然而，提取的类级信息只是简单地连接到像素特征，而没有明确地用于更好的像素表示学习。此外，这些方法基于粗掩模预测来学习软类中心，这很容易出现错误累积。在本文中，为了更有效地使用类级别信息，我们提出了一种通用的类感知正则化（CAR）方法来优化特征学习期间的类内方差和类间距离，其动机是人类可以单独识别一个对象，无论它与其他对象一起出现。提出了三种新颖的损失函数。第一个损失函数鼓励每个类内更紧凑的类表示，第二个损失函数直接最大化不同类中心之间的距离，第三个进一步推动类间中心和像素之间的距离。此外，我们方法中的类中心是直接从地面实况生成的，而不是从容易出错的粗略预测生成的。我们的方法可以在训练期间轻松应用于大多数现有的分割模型，包括 OCR 和 CPNet，并且可以在不增加推理开销的情况下大幅提高其准确性。在多个基准数据集上进行的广泛实验和消融研究表明，所提出的 CAR 可以将所有基线模型的准确性提高高达 2.23% mIOU，并具有卓越的泛化能力。完整代码可在 https://github.com/edwardyehuang/CAR 获取。 本文提出一种名为CAR的类感知正则化方法，旨在通过优化类内方差和类间距离提升语义分割的准确性。 Ye Huang,Di Kang,Liang Chen,Xuefei Zhe,Wenjing Jia,Xiangjian He,Linchao Bao cs.CV

authors_text: Federico Zocco,Ching-I Huang,Hsueh-Cheng Wang,Mohammad Omar Khyam,Mien Van
title: Towards More Efficient EfficientDets and Low-Light Real-Time Marine Debris Detection
title_zh: 迈向更高效的 EfficientDets 和微光实时海洋碎片检测
comment: To be submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: To be submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: Marine debris is a problem both for the health of marine environments and for the human health since tiny pieces of plastic called "microplastics" resulting from the debris decomposition over the time are entering the food chain at any levels. For marine debris detection and removal, autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) are a potential solution. In this letter, we focus on the efficiency of AUV vision for real-time and low-light object detection. First, we improved the efficiency of a class of state-of-the-art object detectors, namely EfficientDets, by 1.5% AP on D0, 2.6% AP on D1, 1.2% AP on D2 and 1.3% AP on D3 without increasing the GPU latency. Subsequently, we created and made publicly available a dataset for the detection of in-water plastic bags and bottles and trained our improved EfficientDets on this and another dataset for marine debris detection. Finally, we investigated how the detector performance is affected by low-light conditions and compared two low-light underwater image enhancement strategies both in terms of accuracy and latency. Source code and dataset are publicly available.
summary: Marine debris is a problem both for the health of marine environments and for the human health since tiny pieces of plastic called "microplastics" resulting from the debris decomposition over the time are entering the food chain at any levels. For marine debris detection and removal, autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) are a potential solution. In this letter, we focus on the efficiency of AUV vision for real-time and low-light object detection. First, we improved the efficiency of a class of state-of-the-art object detectors, namely EfficientDets, by 1.5% AP on D0, 2.6% AP on D1, 1.2% AP on D2 and 1.3% AP on D3 without increasing the GPU latency. Subsequently, we created and made publicly available a dataset for the detection of in-water plastic bags and bottles and trained our improved EfficientDets on this and another dataset for marine debris detection. Finally, we investigated how the detector performance is affected by low-light conditions and compared two low-light underwater image enhancement strategies both in terms of accuracy and latency. Source code and dataset are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 海洋垃圾对于海洋环境的健康和人类健康来说都是一个问题，因为随着时间的推移，垃圾分解产生的称为“微塑料”的微小塑料碎片正在进入食物链的各个层面。对于海洋垃圾检测和清除，自主水下航行器（AUV）是一种潜在的解决方案。在这封信中，我们重点关注 AUV 视觉在实时和弱光物体检测方面的效率。首先，我们将一类最先进的目标检测器（即 EfficientDets）的效率提高了 D0 上的 1.5% AP、D1 上的 2.6% AP、D2 上的 1.2% AP 和 D3 上的 1.3% AP，而没有增加 GPU 延迟。随后，我们创建并公开了一个用于检测水中塑料袋和瓶子的数据集，并在此数据集和另一个用于海洋垃圾检测的数据集上训练了我们改进的 EfficientDets。最后，我们研究了探测器性能如何受到低光条件的影响，并在准确性和延迟方面比较了两种低光水下图像增强策略。源代码和数据集是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在提升自主水下机器人（AUV）在低光环境下实时检测海洋垃圾的效率，并构建相关数据集。
AI.motivation: 海洋垃圾及微塑料污染威胁生态与人类健康，需通过高效实时的AUV视觉检测技术解决低光环境下垃圾识别难题。
AI.method: 改进EfficientDets检测器效率，构建水下塑料袋与瓶类数据集，训练模型并对比两种低光图像增强策略的准确性与延迟。
AI.result: 在D0-D3数据集上分别提升1.5%-2.6% AP，公开数据集与代码，验证了低光增强策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 优化后的EfficientDets结合低光增强技术可有效提升AUV实时检测海洋垃圾的性能，为后续研究提供数据支持。

title: Interpretable Dysarthric Speaker Adaptation based on Optimal-Transport
title_zh: 基于最佳传输的可解释构音障碍说话人适应
abstract: This work addresses the mismatch problem between the distribution of training data (source) and testing data (target), in the challenging context of dysarthric speech recognition. We focus on Speaker Adaptation (SA) in command speech recognition, where data from multiple sources (i.e., multiple speakers) are available. Specifically, we propose an unsupervised Multi-Source Domain Adaptation (MSDA) algorithm based on optimal-transport, called MSDA via Weighted Joint Optimal Transport (MSDA-WJDOT). We achieve a Command Error Rate relative reduction of 16% and 7% over the speaker-independent model and the best competitor method, respectively. The strength of the proposed approach is that, differently from any other existing SA method, it offers an interpretable model that can also be exploited, in this context, to diagnose dysarthria without any specific training. Indeed, it provides a closeness measure between the target and the source speakers, reflecting their similarity in terms of speech characteristics. Based on the similarity between the target speaker and the healthy/dysarthric source speakers, we then define the healthy/dysarthric score of the target speaker that we leverage to perform dysarthria detection. This approach does not require any additional training and achieves a 95% accuracy in the dysarthria diagnosis.
summary: This work addresses the mismatch problem between the distribution of training data (source) and testing data (target), in the challenging context of dysarthric speech recognition. We focus on Speaker Adaptation (SA) in command speech recognition, where data from multiple sources (i.e., multiple speakers) are available. Specifically, we propose an unsupervised Multi-Source Domain Adaptation (MSDA) algorithm based on optimal-transport, called MSDA via Weighted Joint Optimal Transport (MSDA-WJDOT). We achieve a Command Error Rate relative reduction of 16% and 7% over the speaker-independent model and the best competitor method, respectively. The strength of the proposed approach is that, differently from any other existing SA method, it offers an interpretable model that can also be exploited, in this context, to diagnose dysarthria without any specific training. Indeed, it provides a closeness measure between the target and the source speakers, reflecting their similarity in terms of speech characteristics. Based on the similarity between the target speaker and the healthy/dysarthric source speakers, we then define the healthy/dysarthric score of the target speaker that we leverage to perform dysarthria detection. This approach does not require any additional training and achieves a 95% accuracy in the dysarthria diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了在构音障碍语音识别的挑战性背景下训练数据（源）和测试数据（目标）分布之间的不匹配问题。我们专注于命令语音识别中的说话人适应（SA），其中可以使用来自多个源（即多个说话人）的数据。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于最优传输的无监督多源域适应（MSDA）算法，称为加权联合最优传输 MSDA（MSDA-WJDOT）。与说话人无关模型和最佳竞争对手方法相比，我们的命令错误率分别相对降低了 16% 和 7%。所提出的方法的优点在于，与任何其他现有的 SA 方法不同，它提供了一个可解释的模型，在这种情况下，也可以利用该模型来诊断构音障碍，而无需任何特定的训练。事实上，它提供了目标说话者和源说话者之间的接近程度，反映了他们在语音特征方面的相似性。基于目标说话者和健康/构音障碍源说话者之间的相似性，我们然后定义目标说话者的健康/构音障碍分数，我们利用该分数来执行构音障碍检测。这种方法不需要任何额外的训练，构音障碍诊断的准确率达到 95%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最优传输的可解释性失语者说话人自适应方法，用于解决训练数据与测试数据分布不匹配的问题，并实现失语症诊断。
AI.motivation: 在失语症语音识别中，训练数据与测试数据的分布不匹配会导致性能下降，且现有说话人自适应方法缺乏可解释性，无法直接用于失语症诊断。
AI.method: 提出一种无监督多源域自适应算法MSDA-WJDOT，基于最优传输理论，通过加权联合最优传输实现跨说话人分布对齐，并利用目标说话人与健康/失语症源说话人的相似性进行失语症检测。
AI.result: 在命令词错误率上比基线模型降低16%，优于现有最佳方法7%；无需额外训练即可实现95%的失语症诊断准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可解释的最优传输模型有效解决了失语症语音识别的域适应问题，并实现了无需训练的失语症诊断，具有重要的临床应用价值。

This approach does not require any additional training and achieves a 95% accuracy in the dysarthria diagnosis. 这项工作解决了在构音障碍语音识别的挑战性背景下训练数据（源）和测试数据（目标）分布之间的不匹配问题。我们专注于命令语音识别中的说话人适应（SA），其中可以使用来自多个源（即多个说话人）的数据。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于最优传输的无监督多源域适应（MSDA）算法，称为加权联合最优传输 MSDA（MSDA-WJDOT）。与说话人无关模型和最佳竞争对手方法相比，我们的命令错误率分别相对降低了 16% 和 7%。所提出的方法的优点在于，与任何其他现有的 SA 方法不同，它提供了一个可解释的模型，在这种情况下，也可以利用该模型来诊断构音障碍，而无需任何特定的训练。事实上，它提供了目标说话者和源说话者之间的接近程度，反映了他们在语音特征方面的相似性。基于目标说话者和健康/构音障碍源说话者之间的相似性，我们然后定义目标说话者的健康/构音障碍分数，我们利用该分数来执行构音障碍检测。这种方法不需要任何额外的训练，构音障碍诊断的准确率达到 95%。 本文提出了一种基于最优传输的可解释性失语者说话人自适应方法，用于解决训练数据与测试数据分布不匹配的问题，并实现失语症诊断。 Rosanna Turrisi,Leonardo Badino cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Conservative Filtering for Heterogeneous Decentralized Data Fusion in Dynamic Robotic Systems
title_zh: 动态机器人系统中异构分散数据融合的保守过滤
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, submitted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, submitted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: This paper presents a method for Bayesian multi-robot peer-to-peer data fusion where any pair of autonomous robots hold non-identical, but overlapping parts of a global joint probability distribution, representing real world inference tasks (e.g., mapping, tracking). It is shown that in dynamic stochastic systems, filtering, which corresponds to marginalization of past variables, results in direct and hidden dependencies between variables not mutually monitored by the robots, which might lead to an overconfident fused estimate. The paper makes both theoretical and practical contributions by providing (i) a rigorous analysis of the origin of the dependencies and and (ii) a conservative filtering algorithm for heterogeneous data fusion in dynamic systems that can be integrated with existing fusion algorithms. This work uses factor graphs as an analysis tool and an inference engine. Each robot in the network maintains a local factor graph and communicates only relevant parts of it (a sub-graph) to its neighboring robot. We discuss the applicability to various multi-robot robotic applications and demonstrate the performance using a multi-robot multi-target tracking simulation, showing that the proposed algorithm produces conservative estimates at each robot.
summary: This paper presents a method for Bayesian multi-robot peer-to-peer data fusion where any pair of autonomous robots hold non-identical, but overlapping parts of a global joint probability distribution, representing real world inference tasks (e.g., mapping, tracking). It is shown that in dynamic stochastic systems, filtering, which corresponds to marginalization of past variables, results in direct and hidden dependencies between variables not mutually monitored by the robots, which might lead to an overconfident fused estimate. The paper makes both theoretical and practical contributions by providing (i) a rigorous analysis of the origin of the dependencies and and (ii) a conservative filtering algorithm for heterogeneous data fusion in dynamic systems that can be integrated with existing fusion algorithms. This work uses factor graphs as an analysis tool and an inference engine. Each robot in the network maintains a local factor graph and communicates only relevant parts of it (a sub-graph) to its neighboring robot. We discuss the applicability to various multi-robot robotic applications and demonstrate the performance using a multi-robot multi-target tracking simulation, showing that the proposed algorithm produces conservative estimates at each robot.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯多机器人点对点数据融合方法，其中任何一对自主机器人都拥有全局联合概率分布的不相同但重叠的部分，代表现实世界的推理任务（例如，映射、跟踪）。结果表明，在动态随机系统中，过滤（对应于过去变量的边缘化）会导致机器人不相互监控的变量之间产生直接和隐藏的依赖关系，这可能会导致过度自信的融合估计。该论文通过提供（i）对依赖性起源的严格分析和（ii）动态系统中异构数据融合的保守过滤算法（可以与现有融合算法集成）做出了理论和实践贡献。这项工作使用因子图作为分析工具和推理引擎。网络中的每个机器人都维护一个局部因子图，并仅将其相关部分（子图）与其相邻机器人进行通信。我们讨论了对各种多机器人应用的适用性，并使用多机器人多目标跟踪模拟演示了性能，表明所提出的算法对每个机器人产生了保守的估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对动态机器人系统中异构去中心化数据融合的保守滤波方法，解决多机器人协同时因隐藏依赖导致的过自信估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态系统中通过滤波消除历史变量时，可能产生机器人间未直接观测变量的隐藏依赖，导致融合估计过于自信，影响可靠性。
AI.method: 基于因子图理论，构建各机器人本地因子图并仅交换子图信息，设计保守滤波算法抑制隐藏依赖，通过边缘化操作保证估计保守性。
AI.result: 在多机器人多目标跟踪仿真中验证了算法有效性，各机器人均输出保守估计，避免因隐藏依赖导致的过自信问题。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析揭示了动态系统中隐藏依赖的成因，提出的保守滤波算法可与现有方法兼容，为异构多机器人系统提供可靠的数据融合框架。

title: Cross-model Fairness: Empirical Study of Fairness and Ethics Under Model Multiplicity
title_zh: 跨模型公平：模型多重性下公平与伦理的实证研究
comment: Published in the *ACM Journal on Responsible Computing*
comments: Published in the *ACM Journal on Responsible Computing*
abstract: While data-driven predictive models are a strictly technological construct, they may operate within a social context in which benign engineering choices entail implicit, indirect and unexpected real-life consequences. Fairness of such systems -- pertaining both to individuals and groups -- is one relevant consideration in this space; algorithms can discriminate people across various protected characteristics regardless of whether these properties are included in the data or discernible through proxy variables. To date, this notion has predominantly been studied for a fixed model, often under different classification thresholds, striving to identify and eradicate undesirable, discriminative and possibly unlawful aspects of its operation. Here, we backtrack on this fixed model assumption to propose and explore a novel definition of cross-model fairness where individuals can be harmed when one predictor is chosen ad hoc from a group of equally well performing models, i.e., in view of utility-based model multiplicity. Since a person may be classified differently across models that are otherwise considered equivalent, this individual could argue for a predictor granting them the most favourable outcome, employing which may have adverse effects on other people. We introduce this scenario with a two-dimensional example and linear classification; then, we present a comprehensive empirical study based on real-life predictive models and data sets that are popular with the algorithmic fairness community; finally, we investigate analytical properties of cross-model fairness and its ramifications in a broader context. Our findings suggest that such unfairness can be readily found in real life and it may be difficult to mitigate by technical means alone as doing so is likely to degrade predictive performance.
summary: While data-driven predictive models are a strictly technological construct, they may operate within a social context in which benign engineering choices entail implicit, indirect and unexpected real-life consequences. Fairness of such systems -- pertaining both to individuals and groups -- is one relevant consideration in this space; algorithms can discriminate people across various protected characteristics regardless of whether these properties are included in the data or discernible through proxy variables. To date, this notion has predominantly been studied for a fixed model, often under different classification thresholds, striving to identify and eradicate undesirable, discriminative and possibly unlawful aspects of its operation. Here, we backtrack on this fixed model assumption to propose and explore a novel definition of cross-model fairness where individuals can be harmed when one predictor is chosen ad hoc from a group of equally well performing models, i.e., in view of utility-based model multiplicity. Since a person may be classified differently across models that are otherwise considered equivalent, this individual could argue for a predictor granting them the most favourable outcome, employing which may have adverse effects on other people. We introduce this scenario with a two-dimensional example and linear classification; then, we present a comprehensive empirical study based on real-life predictive models and data sets that are popular with the algorithmic fairness community; finally, we investigate analytical properties of cross-model fairness and its ramifications in a broader context. Our findings suggest that such unfairness can be readily found in real life and it may be difficult to mitigate by technical means alone as doing so is likely to degrade predictive performance.
abstract_zh: 虽然数据驱动的预测模型是严格的技术构造，但它们可能在社会环境中运作，在这种社会环境中，良性的工程选择会带来隐含的、间接的和意想不到的现实生活后果。这种系统的公平性——无论是对于个人还是团体——是这一领域的一个相关考虑因素；算法可以根据各种受保护的特征来区分人们，无论这些属性是否包含在数据中或通过代理变量可辨别。迄今为止，这一概念主要针对固定模型进行研究，通常在不同的分类阈值下，努力识别和消除其操作中不良、歧视性和可能非法的方面。在这里，我们回溯这个固定模型假设，提出并探索一种跨模型公平性的新定义，其中，当从一组性能同样良好的模型中临时选择一个预测变量时，即考虑到基于效用的模型多重性，个人可能会受到伤害。由于一个人可能会在其他被认为是等效的模型中进行不同的分类，因此这个人可能会主张一个预测变量给予他们最有利的结果，而使用这可能会对其他人产生不利影响。我们用二维例子和线性分类来介绍这个场景；然后，我们基于算法公平社区流行的现实生活预测模型和数据集提出全面的实证研究；最后，我们研究跨模型公平性的分析特性及其在更广泛的背景下的影响。我们的研究结果表明，这种不公平现象在现实生活中很容易发现，并且可能很难仅通过技术手段来缓解，因为这样做可能会降低预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并研究了跨模型公平性概念，探讨在模型多样性背景下，选择不同但性能相当的模型可能导致的个体不公平现象。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性研究多基于固定模型，但实际场景中模型多样性可能导致因模型选择引发的隐性歧视，需重新审视公平性定义与应对策略。
AI.method: 通过二维示例与线性分类定义跨模型公平性，结合真实数据集进行实证分析，并探讨其理论性质与伦理影响。
AI.result: 实证表明跨模型不公平性普遍存在，且单纯技术手段可能难以缓解而不损害预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 跨模型公平性是现实存在的伦理挑战，需超越单纯技术调整，从系统设计层面综合应对。

Since a person may be classified differently across models that are otherwise considered equivalent, this individual could argue for a predictor granting them the most favourable outcome, employing which may have adverse effects on other people. We introduce this scenario with a two-dimensional example and linear classification; then, we present a comprehensive empirical study based on real-life predictive models and data sets that are popular with the algorithmic fairness community; finally, we investigate analytical properties of cross-model fairness and its ramifications in a broader context. Our findings suggest that such unfairness can be readily found in real life and it may be difficult to mitigate by technical means alone as doing so is likely to degrade predictive performance. 虽然数据驱动的预测模型是严格的技术构造，但它们可能在社会环境中运作，在这种社会环境中，良性的工程选择会带来隐含的、间接的和意想不到的现实生活后果。这种系统的公平性——无论是对于个人还是团体——是这一领域的一个相关考虑因素；算法可以根据各种受保护的特征来区分人们，无论这些属性是否包含在数据中或通过代理变量可辨别。迄今为止，这一概念主要针对固定模型进行研究，通常在不同的分类阈值下，努力识别和消除其操作中不良、歧视性和可能非法的方面。在这里，我们回溯这个固定模型假设，提出并探索一种跨模型公平性的新定义，其中，当从一组性能同样良好的模型中临时选择一个预测变量时，即考虑到基于效用的模型多重性，个人可能会受到伤害。由于一个人可能会在其他被认为是等效的模型中进行不同的分类，因此这个人可能会主张一个预测变量给予他们最有利的结果，而使用这可能会对其他人产生不利影响。我们用二维例子和线性分类来介绍这个场景；然后，我们基于算法公平社区流行的现实生活预测模型和数据集提出全面的实证研究；最后，我们研究跨模型公平性的分析特性及其在更广泛的背景下的影响。我们的研究结果表明，这种不公平现象在现实生活中很容易发现，并且可能很难仅通过技术手段来缓解，因为这样做可能会降低预测性能。 本文提出并研究了跨模型公平性概念，探讨在模型多样性背景下，选择不同但性能相当的模型可能导致的个体不公平现象。 Kacper Sokol,Meelis Kull,Jeffrey Chan,Flora Salim cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Adversarial amplitude swap towards robust image classifiers
title_zh: 对抗性幅度交换为鲁棒图像分类器
abstract: The vulnerability of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to image perturbations such as common corruptions and adversarial perturbations has recently been investigated from the perspective of frequency. In this study, we investigate the effect of the amplitude and phase spectra of adversarial images on the robustness of CNN classifiers. Extensive experiments revealed that the images generated by combining the amplitude spectrum of adversarial images and the phase spectrum of clean images accommodates moderate and general perturbations, and training with these images equips a CNN classifier with more general robustness, performing well under both common corruptions and adversarial perturbations. We also found that two types of overfitting (catastrophic overfitting and robust overfitting) can be circumvented by the aforementioned spectrum recombination. We believe that these results contribute to the understanding and the training of truly robust classifiers.
summary: The vulnerability of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to image perturbations such as common corruptions and adversarial perturbations has recently been investigated from the perspective of frequency. In this study, we investigate the effect of the amplitude and phase spectra of adversarial images on the robustness of CNN classifiers. Extensive experiments revealed that the images generated by combining the amplitude spectrum of adversarial images and the phase spectrum of clean images accommodates moderate and general perturbations, and training with these images equips a CNN classifier with more general robustness, performing well under both common corruptions and adversarial perturbations. We also found that two types of overfitting (catastrophic overfitting and robust overfitting) can be circumvented by the aforementioned spectrum recombination. We believe that these results contribute to the understanding and the training of truly robust classifiers.
abstract_zh: 最近从频率的角度研究了卷积神经网络（CNN）对图像扰动（例如常见损坏和对抗性扰动）的脆弱性。在本研究中，我们研究了对抗图像的幅度谱和相位谱对 CNN 分类器鲁棒性的影响。大量实验表明，通过组合对抗性图像的幅度谱和干净图像的相位谱生成的图像可以适应中等和一般的扰动，并且使用这些图像进行训练使 CNN 分类器具有更一般的鲁棒性，在常见的损坏和对抗性扰动下都表现良好。我们还发现两种类型的过度拟合（灾难性过度拟合和稳健过度拟合）可以通过上述频谱重组来规避。我们相信这些结果有助于理解和训练真正强大的分类器。

AI.tldr: 研究通过交换对抗图像与干净图像的振幅谱和相位谱来提升卷积神经网络（CNN）分类器的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要从频率角度分析CNN对图像扰动的脆弱性，但缺乏对振幅和相位谱具体影响的深入探讨，因此本文旨在通过分析这两个谱的作用，寻找提升CNN鲁棒性的新方法。
AI.method: 通过将对抗图像的振幅谱与干净图像的相位谱结合生成新图像，并利用这些图像训练CNN分类器，以增强其对常见污染和对抗扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用重组谱图像训练的CNN在常见污染和对抗扰动下均表现出更强的鲁棒性，并能有效避免灾难性过拟合和鲁棒过拟合。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了振幅谱与相位谱重组对提升CNN鲁棒性的有效性，为训练真正鲁棒的图像分类器提供了新思路。

title: Flexure-based Environmental Compliance for High-speed Robotic Contact Tasks
title_zh: 高速机器人接触任务的基于弯曲的环境合规性
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures, on review. Experiment video: https://youtu.be/96EdFZqY_2E
comments: 7 pages, 7 figures, on review. Experiment video: https://youtu.be/96EdFZqY_2E
abstract: The design of physical compliance -- its location, degree, and structure -- affects robot performance and robustness in contact-rich tasks. While compliance is often used in the robot's joints, flange, or end-effector, this paper proposes compliant structures in the environment, allowing safe and robust contact while keeping the higher motion control bandwidth and precision of high impedance robots. Compliance is here realized with flexures and viscoelastic materials, which are integrated to several mechanisms to offer structured compliance, such as a remote center of compliance. Additive manufacturing with fused deposition modeling is used, allowing faster design iteration and low-cost integration with standard industrial equipment. Mechanical properties, including the total stiffness matrix, stiffness ratio, and rotational precision, are analytically determined and compared to experimental results. Three remote center of compliance (RCC) devices and a 1-DOF linear device are prototyped and tested in high-speed assembly tasks.
summary: The design of physical compliance -- its location, degree, and structure -- affects robot performance and robustness in contact-rich tasks. While compliance is often used in the robot's joints, flange, or end-effector, this paper proposes compliant structures in the environment, allowing safe and robust contact while keeping the higher motion control bandwidth and precision of high impedance robots. Compliance is here realized with flexures and viscoelastic materials, which are integrated to several mechanisms to offer structured compliance, such as a remote center of compliance. Additive manufacturing with fused deposition modeling is used, allowing faster design iteration and low-cost integration with standard industrial equipment. Mechanical properties, including the total stiffness matrix, stiffness ratio, and rotational precision, are analytically determined and compared to experimental results. Three remote center of compliance (RCC) devices and a 1-DOF linear device are prototyped and tested in high-speed assembly tasks.
abstract_zh: 物理顺应性的设计——其位置、程度和结构——会影响机器人在接触丰富的任务中的性能和鲁棒性。虽然柔顺性通常用于机器人的关节、法兰或末端执行器，但本文提出了环境中的柔顺结构，允许安全和稳健的接触，同时保持高阻抗机器人更高的运动控制带宽和精度。这里的合规性是通过弯曲件和粘弹性材料实现的，这些材料集成到多种机制中以提供结构化的合规性，例如远程合规中心。采用熔融沉积建模的增材制造，可实现更快的设计迭代以及与标准工业设备的低成本集成。通过分析确定机械特性，包括总刚度矩阵、刚度比和旋转精度，并与实验结果进行比较。三个远程合规中心 (RCC) 设备和一个一自由度线性设备在高速装配任务中进行了原型设计和测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过在环境侧设计柔性结构实现高速机器人接触任务的物理顺应性，以提升安全性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人关节或末端执行器的顺应性设计会牺牲运动控制带宽与精度，而环境侧顺应性可保留高阻抗机器人的优势。
AI.method: 采用柔性铰链与粘弹性材料构建结构化顺应性机制（如远程顺应中心），结合熔融沉积成型技术快速制造并集成至工业设备进行测试。
AI.result: 成功研制三种远程顺应中心装置及1-DOF线性装置，实验验证其在高速装配任务中具备可预测的刚度特性与高精度运动控制。
AI.conclusion: 环境侧柔性顺应性设计为高精度工业机器人提供了低成本、可扩展的接触任务解决方案。

authors_text: Rui Xia,Chao Xue,Boyu Deng,Fang Wang,Jingchao Wang
title: Deep Transformers Thirst for Comprehensive-Frequency Data
title_zh: Deep Transformers 渴望全面的频率数据
abstract: Current researches indicate that inductive bias (IB) can improve Vision Transformer (ViT) performance. However, they introduce a pyramid structure concurrently to counteract the incremental FLOPs and parameters caused by introducing IB. This structure destroys the unification of computer vision and natural language processing (NLP) and complicates the model. We study an NLP model called LSRA, which introduces IB with a pyramid-free structure. We analyze why it outperforms ViT, discovering that introducing IB increases the share of high-frequency data in each layer, giving "attention" to more information. As a result, the heads notice more diverse information, showing better performance. To further explore the potential of transformers, we propose EIT, which Efficiently introduces IB to ViT with a novel decreasing convolutional structure under a pyramid-free structure. EIT achieves competitive performance with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on ImageNet-1K and achieves SOTA performance over the same scale models which have the pyramid-free structure.
summary: Current researches indicate that inductive bias (IB) can improve Vision Transformer (ViT) performance. However, they introduce a pyramid structure concurrently to counteract the incremental FLOPs and parameters caused by introducing IB. This structure destroys the unification of computer vision and natural language processing (NLP) and complicates the model. We study an NLP model called LSRA, which introduces IB with a pyramid-free structure. We analyze why it outperforms ViT, discovering that introducing IB increases the share of high-frequency data in each layer, giving "attention" to more information. As a result, the heads notice more diverse information, showing better performance. To further explore the potential of transformers, we propose EIT, which Efficiently introduces IB to ViT with a novel decreasing convolutional structure under a pyramid-free structure. EIT achieves competitive performance with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on ImageNet-1K and achieves SOTA performance over the same scale models which have the pyramid-free structure.
abstract_zh: 目前的研究表明，感应偏置（IB）可以提高视觉变压器（ViT）的性能。然而，他们同时引入了金字塔结构来抵消引入IB带来的增量FLOP和参数。这种结构破坏了计算机视觉和自然语言处理（NLP）的统一，并使模型变得复杂。我们研究了一种称为 LSRA 的 NLP 模型，它引入了无金字塔结构的 IB。我们分析了它为何优于 ViT，发现引入 IB 增加了每一层高频数据的份额，从而“关注”更多信息。因此，大脑会注意到更多样的信息，表现出更好的表现。为了进一步探索 Transformer 的潜力，我们提出了 EIT，它在无金字塔结构下通过新颖的递减卷积结构将 IB 有效地引入到 ViT 中。 EIT 在 ImageNet-1K 上与最先进的 (SOTA) 方法实现了竞争性能，并且在具有无金字塔结构的相同规模模型上实现了 SOTA 性能。

AI.tldr: 研究如何在无金字塔结构下有效引入归纳偏置以提升Transformer性能，并提出EIT方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法引入归纳偏置（IB）时需配合金字塔结构，导致模型复杂化并破坏CV与NLP的统一性，需探索更简洁的结构。
AI.method: 分析LSRA模型发现IB提升高频数据占比，提出EIT方法通过递减卷积结构在无金字塔框架下高效引入IB。
AI.result: EIT在ImageNet-1K上达到SOTA性能，且优于同规模无金字塔结构模型。
AI.conclusion: 证明高效引入IB的潜力，为Transformer设计提供新思路，强调高频数据利用对性能提升的关键作用。

search_text: Deep Transformers Thirst for Comprehensive-Frequency Data Deep Transformers 渴望全面的频率数据 Current researches indicate that inductive bias (IB) can improve Vision Transformer (ViT) performance. However, they introduce a pyramid structure concurrently to counteract the incremental FLOPs and parameters caused by introducing IB. This structure destroys the unification of computer vision and natural language processing (NLP) and complicates the model. We study an NLP model called LSRA, which introduces IB with a pyramid-free structure. We analyze why it outperforms ViT, discovering that introducing IB increases the share of high-frequency data in each layer, giving "attention" to more information. As a result, the heads notice more diverse information, showing better performance. To further explore the potential of transformers, we propose EIT, which Efficiently introduces IB to ViT with a novel decreasing convolutional structure under a pyramid-free structure. EIT achieves competitive performance with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on ImageNet-1K and achieves SOTA performance over the same scale models which have the pyramid-free structure. 目前的研究表明，感应偏置（IB）可以提高视觉变压器（ViT）的性能。然而，他们同时引入了金字塔结构来抵消引入IB带来的增量FLOP和参数。这种结构破坏了计算机视觉和自然语言处理（NLP）的统一，并使模型变得复杂。我们研究了一种称为 LSRA 的 NLP 模型，它引入了无金字塔结构的 IB。我们分析了它为何优于 ViT，发现引入 IB 增加了每一层高频数据的份额，从而“关注”更多信息。因此，大脑会注意到更多样的信息，表现出更好的表现。为了进一步探索 Transformer 的潜力，我们提出了 EIT，它在无金字塔结构下通过新颖的递减卷积结构将 IB 有效地引入到 ViT 中。 EIT 在 ImageNet-1K 上与最先进的 (SOTA) 方法实现了竞争性能，并且在具有无金字塔结构的相同规模模型上实现了 SOTA 性能。 研究如何在无金字塔结构下有效引入归纳偏置以提升Transformer性能，并提出EIT方法。 Rui Xia,Chao Xue,Boyu Deng,Fang Wang,Jingchao Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Sahar Almahfouz Nasser,Nikhil Cherian Kurian,Saqib Shamsi,Mohit Meena,Amit Sethi
title: WSSAMNet: Weakly Supervised Semantic Attentive Medical Image Registration Network
title_zh: WSSAMNet：弱监督语义关注医学图像配准网络
abstract: We present WSSAMNet, a weakly supervised method for medical image registration. Ours is a two step method, with the first step being the computation of segmentation masks of the fixed and moving volumes. These masks are then used to attend to the input volume, which are then provided as inputs to a registration network in the second step. The registration network computes the deformation field to perform the alignment between the fixed and the moving volumes. We study the effectiveness of our technique on the BraTSReg challenge data against ANTs and VoxelMorph, where we demonstrate that our method performs competitively.
summary: We present WSSAMNet, a weakly supervised method for medical image registration. Ours is a two step method, with the first step being the computation of segmentation masks of the fixed and moving volumes. These masks are then used to attend to the input volume, which are then provided as inputs to a registration network in the second step. The registration network computes the deformation field to perform the alignment between the fixed and the moving volumes. We study the effectiveness of our technique on the BraTSReg challenge data against ANTs and VoxelMorph, where we demonstrate that our method performs competitively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 WSSAMNet，一种用于医学图像配准的弱监督方法。我们的方法是两步方法，第一步是计算固定体积和移动体积的分割掩模。然后使用这些掩码来处理输入量，然后将其作为第二步中的注册网络的输入提供。配准网络计算变形场以执行固定体积和移动体积之间的对齐。我们研究了我们的技术在针对 ANT 和 VoxelMorph 的 BraTSReg 挑战数据上的有效性，我们证明了我们的方法具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种弱监督的语义注意力医学图像配准网络（WSSAMNet），用于实现医学图像的自动对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统医学图像配准方法依赖大量精确标注数据，而弱监督方法可降低对标注数据的依赖，从而减少数据标注成本。
AI.method: 采用两步法：首先生成固定和移动图像的分割掩码，利用注意力机制提取关键区域特征；随后将处理后的图像输入配准网络，计算变形场实现图像对齐。
AI.result: 在BraTSReg数据集上的实验表明，WSSAMNet在配准精度上与ANTs和VoxelMorph等现有方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了弱监督方法在医学图像配准中的有效性，为降低标注数据依赖性提供了可行的解决方案。

title: RCL: Recurrent Continuous Localization for Temporal Action Detection
title_zh: RCL：用于时间动作检测的循环连续定位
abstract: Temporal representation is the cornerstone of modern action detection techniques. State-of-the-art methods mostly rely on a dense anchoring scheme, where anchors are sampled uniformly over the temporal domain with a discretized grid, and then regress the accurate boundaries. In this paper, we revisit this foundational stage and introduce Recurrent Continuous Localization (RCL), which learns a fully continuous anchoring representation. Specifically, the proposed representation builds upon an explicit model conditioned with video embeddings and temporal coordinates, which ensure the capability of detecting segments with arbitrary length. To optimize the continuous representation, we develop an effective scale-invariant sampling strategy and recurrently refine the prediction in subsequent iterations. Our continuous anchoring scheme is fully differentiable, allowing to be seamlessly integrated into existing detectors, e.g., BMN and G-TAD. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate that our continuous representation steadily surpasses other discretized counterparts by ~2% mAP. As a result, RCL achieves 52.92% mAP@0.5 on THUMOS14 and 37.65% mAP on ActivtiyNet v1.3, outperforming all existing single-model detectors.
summary: Temporal representation is the cornerstone of modern action detection techniques. State-of-the-art methods mostly rely on a dense anchoring scheme, where anchors are sampled uniformly over the temporal domain with a discretized grid, and then regress the accurate boundaries. In this paper, we revisit this foundational stage and introduce Recurrent Continuous Localization (RCL), which learns a fully continuous anchoring representation. Specifically, the proposed representation builds upon an explicit model conditioned with video embeddings and temporal coordinates, which ensure the capability of detecting segments with arbitrary length. To optimize the continuous representation, we develop an effective scale-invariant sampling strategy and recurrently refine the prediction in subsequent iterations. Our continuous anchoring scheme is fully differentiable, allowing to be seamlessly integrated into existing detectors, e.g., BMN and G-TAD. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate that our continuous representation steadily surpasses other discretized counterparts by ~2% mAP. As a result, RCL achieves 52.92% mAP@0.5 on THUMOS14 and 37.65% mAP on ActivtiyNet v1.3, outperforming all existing single-model detectors.
abstract_zh: 时间表示是现代动作检测技术的基石。最先进的方法主要依赖于密集锚定方案，其中使用离散网格在时域上对锚点进行均匀采样，然后回归准确的边界。在本文中，我们重新审视这个基础阶段并引入循环连续定位（RCL），它学习完全连续的锚定表示。具体来说，所提出的表示建立在以视频嵌入和时间坐标为条件的显式模型的基础上，这确保了检测任意长度的片段的能力。为了优化连续表示，我们开发了一种有效的尺度不变采样策略，并在后续迭代中反复细化预测。我们的连续锚定方案是完全可微分的，可以无缝集成到现有检测器中，例如 BMN 和 G-TAD。对两个基准的大量实验表明，我们的连续表示稳定地超过了其他离散对应物约 2% 的 mAP。结果，RCL 在 THUMOS14 上实现了 52.92% mAP@0.5，在 ActivtiyNet v1.3 上实现了 37.65% mAP，优于所有现有的单模型检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RCL的连续定位方法，用于改进时间动作检测中的锚点表示。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖离散化网格采样的锚点，难以检测任意长度的动作片段，限制了检测精度。
AI.method: 通过视频嵌入和时间坐标构建连续锚点表示，结合尺度不变采样策略与递归优化，实现端到端可微分的连续定位。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet v1.3数据集上分别达到52.92% mAP@0.5和37.65% mAP，超越现有单模型方法约2% mAP。
AI.conclusion: 连续锚点表示显著优于离散化方案，为时间动作检测提供了更灵活高效的建模方式。
