authors_text: Qiang Wang,Yanhao Zhang,Yun Zheng,Pan Pan,Xian-Sheng Hua
title: Disentangled Representation Learning for Text-Video Retrieval
title_zh: 用于文本视频检索的解开表示学习
abstract: Cross-modality interaction is a critical component in Text-Video Retrieval (TVR), yet there has been little examination of how different influencing factors for computing interaction affect performance. This paper first studies the interaction paradigm in depth, where we find that its computation can be split into two terms, the interaction contents at different granularity and the matching function to distinguish pairs with the same semantics. We also observe that the single-vector representation and implicit intensive function substantially hinder the optimization. Based on these findings, we propose a disentangled framework to capture a sequential and hierarchical representation. Firstly, considering the natural sequential structure in both text and video inputs, a Weighted Token-wise Interaction (WTI) module is performed to decouple the content and adaptively exploit the pair-wise correlations. This interaction can form a better disentangled manifold for sequential inputs. Secondly, we introduce a Channel DeCorrelation Regularization (CDCR) to minimize the redundancy between the components of the compared vectors, which facilitate learning a hierarchical representation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the disentangled representation on various benchmarks, e.g., surpassing CLIP4Clip largely by +2.9%, +3.1%, +7.9%, +2.3%, +2.8% and +6.5% R@1 on the MSR-VTT, MSVD, VATEX, LSMDC, AcitivityNet, and DiDeMo, respectively.
summary: Cross-modality interaction is a critical component in Text-Video Retrieval (TVR), yet there has been little examination of how different influencing factors for computing interaction affect performance. This paper first studies the interaction paradigm in depth, where we find that its computation can be split into two terms, the interaction contents at different granularity and the matching function to distinguish pairs with the same semantics. We also observe that the single-vector representation and implicit intensive function substantially hinder the optimization. Based on these findings, we propose a disentangled framework to capture a sequential and hierarchical representation. Firstly, considering the natural sequential structure in both text and video inputs, a Weighted Token-wise Interaction (WTI) module is performed to decouple the content and adaptively exploit the pair-wise correlations. This interaction can form a better disentangled manifold for sequential inputs. Secondly, we introduce a Channel DeCorrelation Regularization (CDCR) to minimize the redundancy between the components of the compared vectors, which facilitate learning a hierarchical representation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the disentangled representation on various benchmarks, e.g., surpassing CLIP4Clip largely by +2.9%, +3.1%, +7.9%, +2.3%, +2.8% and +6.5% R@1 on the MSR-VTT, MSVD, VATEX, LSMDC, AcitivityNet, and DiDeMo, respectively.
abstract_zh: 跨模态交互是文本视频检索（TVR）的关键组成部分，但很少有人研究计算交互的不同影响因素如何影响性能。本文首先深入研究了交互范式，发现其计算可以分为两个方面，即不同粒度的交互内容和区分具有相同语义的对的匹配函数。我们还观察到单向量表示和隐式强化函数极大地阻碍了优化。基于这些发现，我们提出了一个解缠结的框架来捕获顺序和层次表示。首先，考虑到文本和视频输入中的自然顺序结构，执行加权令牌交互（WTI）模块来解耦内容并自适应地利用成对相关性。这种相互作用可以为顺序输入形成更好的解缠结流形。其次，我们引入通道去相关正则化（CDCR）来最小化比较向量的分量之间的冗余，这有助于学习层次表示。我们在各种基准上证明了解缠结表示的有效性，例如，在 MSR-VTT、MSVD、VATEX、LSMDC、AcitivityNet 和 DiDeMo 上，R@1 分别大大超过了 CLIP4Clip +2.9%、+3.1%、+7.9%、+2.3%、+2.8% 和 +6.5% R@1。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于文本-视频检索的解耦表示学习框架，通过改进跨模态交互机制提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本-视频检索方法在跨模态交互计算中未充分考虑不同影响因素，导致表示学习效果受限，单向量表示和隐式匹配函数难以优化模型性能。
AI.method: 设计了加权分词交互模块（WTI）捕捉序列输入的层次化语义，引入通道去相关正则化（CDCR）减少向量组件冗余，实现解耦表示学习。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT、MSVD等六个基准数据集上，该方法分别以+2.9%至+6.5%的R@1指标超越CLIP4Clip基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 解耦表示框架通过显式建模跨模态交互内容与匹配函数，有效提升了文本-视频检索的准确性和鲁棒性。

search_text: Disentangled Representation Learning for Text-Video Retrieval 用于文本视频检索的解开表示学习 Cross-modality interaction is a critical component in Text-Video Retrieval (TVR), yet there has been little examination of how different influencing factors for computing interaction affect performance. This paper first studies the interaction paradigm in depth, where we find that its computation can be split into two terms, the interaction contents at different granularity and the matching function to distinguish pairs with the same semantics. We also observe that the single-vector representation and implicit intensive function substantially hinder the optimization. Based on these findings, we propose a disentangled framework to capture a sequential and hierarchical representation. Firstly, considering the natural sequential structure in both text and video inputs, a Weighted Token-wise Interaction (WTI) module is performed to decouple the content and adaptively exploit the pair-wise correlations. This interaction can form a better disentangled manifold for sequential inputs. Secondly, we introduce a Channel DeCorrelation Regularization (CDCR) to minimize the redundancy between the components of the compared vectors, which facilitate learning a hierarchical representation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the disentangled representation on various benchmarks, e.g., surpassing CLIP4Clip largely by +2.9%, +3.1%, +7.9%, +2.3%, +2.8% and +6.5% R@1 on the MSR-VTT, MSVD, VATEX, LSMDC, AcitivityNet, and DiDeMo, respectively. 跨模态交互是文本视频检索（TVR）的关键组成部分，但很少有人研究计算交互的不同影响因素如何影响性能。本文首先深入研究了交互范式，发现其计算可以分为两个方面，即不同粒度的交互内容和区分具有相同语义的对的匹配函数。我们还观察到单向量表示和隐式强化函数极大地阻碍了优化。基于这些发现，我们提出了一个解缠结的框架来捕获顺序和层次表示。首先，考虑到文本和视频输入中的自然顺序结构，执行加权令牌交互（WTI）模块来解耦内容并自适应地利用成对相关性。这种相互作用可以为顺序输入形成更好的解缠结流形。其次，我们引入通道去相关正则化（CDCR）来最小化比较向量的分量之间的冗余，这有助于学习层次表示。我们在各种基准上证明了解缠结表示的有效性，例如，在 MSR-VTT、MSVD、VATEX、LSMDC、AcitivityNet 和 DiDeMo 上，R@1 分别大大超过了 CLIP4Clip +2.9%、+3.1%、+7.9%、+2.3%、+2.8% 和 +6.5% R@1。 本文提出了一种用于文本-视频检索的解耦表示学习框架，通过改进跨模态交互机制提升检索性能。 Qiang Wang,Yanhao Zhang,Yun Zheng,Pan Pan,Xian-Sheng Hua cs.CV

title: A Two-Block RNN-based Trajectory Prediction from Incomplete Trajectory
title_zh: 基于两块 RNN 的不完整轨迹轨迹预测
abstract: Trajectory prediction has gained great attention and significant progress has been made in recent years. However, most works rely on a key assumption that each video is successfully preprocessed by detection and tracking algorithms and the complete observed trajectory is always available. However, in complex real-world environments, we often encounter miss-detection of target agents (e.g., pedestrian, vehicles) caused by the bad image conditions, such as the occlusion by other agents. In this paper, we address the problem of trajectory prediction from incomplete observed trajectory due to miss-detection, where the observed trajectory includes several missing data points. We introduce a two-block RNN model that approximates the inference steps of the Bayesian filtering framework and seeks the optimal estimation of the hidden state when miss-detection occurs. The model uses two RNNs depending on the detection result. One RNN approximates the inference step of the Bayesian filter with the new measurement when the detection succeeds, while the other does the approximation when the detection fails. Our experiments show that the proposed model improves the prediction accuracy compared to the three baseline imputation methods on publicly available datasets: ETH and UCY ($9\%$ and $7\%$ improvement on the ADE and FDE metrics). We also show that our proposed method can achieve better prediction compared to the baselines when there is no miss-detection.
summary: Trajectory prediction has gained great attention and significant progress has been made in recent years. However, most works rely on a key assumption that each video is successfully preprocessed by detection and tracking algorithms and the complete observed trajectory is always available. However, in complex real-world environments, we often encounter miss-detection of target agents (e.g., pedestrian, vehicles) caused by the bad image conditions, such as the occlusion by other agents. In this paper, we address the problem of trajectory prediction from incomplete observed trajectory due to miss-detection, where the observed trajectory includes several missing data points. We introduce a two-block RNN model that approximates the inference steps of the Bayesian filtering framework and seeks the optimal estimation of the hidden state when miss-detection occurs. The model uses two RNNs depending on the detection result. One RNN approximates the inference step of the Bayesian filter with the new measurement when the detection succeeds, while the other does the approximation when the detection fails. Our experiments show that the proposed model improves the prediction accuracy compared to the three baseline imputation methods on publicly available datasets: ETH and UCY ($9\%$ and $7\%$ improvement on the ADE and FDE metrics). We also show that our proposed method can achieve better prediction compared to the baselines when there is no miss-detection.
abstract_zh: 近年来，轨迹预测受到了广泛关注并取得了重大进展。然而，大多数工作都依赖于一个关键假设，即每个视频都通过检测和跟踪算法成功进行了预处理，并且完整的观察轨迹始终可用。然而，在复杂的现实环境中，我们经常遇到由于图像条件不佳（例如被其他智能体遮挡）而导致目标智能体（例如行人、车辆）的误检测。在本文中，我们解决了由于漏检而导致的不完整观测轨迹的轨迹预测问题，其中观测轨迹包含多个丢失的数据点。我们引入了一个两块 RNN 模型，该模型近似贝叶斯过滤框架的推理步骤，并在发生漏检时寻求隐藏状态的最佳估计。该模型根据检测结果使用两个 RNN。当检测成功时，一个 RNN 使用新的测量值来近似贝叶斯滤波器的推理步骤，而另一个 RNN 在检测失败时进行近似。我们的实验表明，与公开数据集 ETH 和 UCY 上的三种基线插补方法相比，所提出的模型提高了预测准确性（ADE 和 FDE 指标提高了 9\%$ 和 $7\%$）。我们还表明，在没有漏检的情况下，与基线相比，我们提出的方法可以实现更好的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双块RNN的轨迹预测方法，用于处理因目标检测失败导致的不完整轨迹数据。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法依赖于完整观测轨迹，但现实场景中因遮挡等因素常出现检测失败导致的数据缺失，需解决此问题以提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 设计双块RNN模型，通过两个RNN分别处理检测成功与失败的情况，近似贝叶斯滤波框架的推断步骤，优化缺失数据下的隐藏状态估计。
AI.result: 在ETH和UCY数据集上，ADE和FDE指标分别提升9%和7%，且在无检测失败场景下也优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了不完整轨迹预测问题，在多种场景下均优于现有方法，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zhenfeng He,Yuqiang Han,Zhenqiu Ouyang,Wei Gao,Hongxu Chen,Guandong Xu,Jian Wu
title: DialMed: A Dataset for Dialogue-based Medication Recommendation
title_zh: DialMed：基于对话的药物推荐数据集
comment: Accepted as a long paper at COLING 2022
comments: Accepted as a long paper at COLING 2022
abstract: Medication recommendation is a crucial task for intelligent healthcare systems. Previous studies mainly recommend medications with electronic health records (EHRs). However, some details of interactions between doctors and patients may be ignored or omitted in EHRs, which are essential for automatic medication recommendation. Therefore, we make the first attempt to recommend medications with the conversations between doctors and patients. In this work, we construct DIALMED, the first high-quality dataset for medical dialogue-based medication recommendation task. It contains 11,996 medical dialogues related to 16 common diseases from 3 departments and 70 corresponding common medications. Furthermore, we propose a Dialogue structure and Disease knowledge aware Network (DDN), where a QA Dialogue Graph mechanism is designed to model the dialogue structure and the knowledge graph is used to introduce external disease knowledge. The extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method is a promising solution to recommend medications with medical dialogues. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/f-window/DialMed.
summary: Medication recommendation is a crucial task for intelligent healthcare systems. Previous studies mainly recommend medications with electronic health records (EHRs). However, some details of interactions between doctors and patients may be ignored or omitted in EHRs, which are essential for automatic medication recommendation. Therefore, we make the first attempt to recommend medications with the conversations between doctors and patients. In this work, we construct DIALMED, the first high-quality dataset for medical dialogue-based medication recommendation task. It contains 11,996 medical dialogues related to 16 common diseases from 3 departments and 70 corresponding common medications. Furthermore, we propose a Dialogue structure and Disease knowledge aware Network (DDN), where a QA Dialogue Graph mechanism is designed to model the dialogue structure and the knowledge graph is used to introduce external disease knowledge. The extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method is a promising solution to recommend medications with medical dialogues. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/f-window/DialMed.
abstract_zh: 药物推荐是智能医疗系统的一项关键任务。之前的研究主要推荐带有电子健康记录（EHR）的药物。然而，电子病历中医生和患者之间互动的一些细节可能会被忽略或省略，而这对于自动药物推荐至关重要。因此，我们首先尝试通过医患对话来推荐药物。在这项工作中，我们构建了 DIALMED，这是第一个用于基于医学对话的药物推荐任务的高质量数据集。包含11996条医学对话，涉及3个科室的16种常见疾病和70种相应的常用药物。此外，我们提出了对话结构和疾病知识感知网络（DDN），其中设计了QA对话图机制来对对话结构进行建模，并使用知识图来引入外部疾病知识。广泛的实验结果表明，所提出的方法是通过医学对话推荐药物的一种有前途的解决方案。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/f-window/DialMed 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个基于医患对话的高质量医疗用药推荐数据集DialMed，并提出结合对话结构和疾病知识的推荐方法DDN。
AI.motivation: 传统用药推荐依赖电子健康记录（EHR），但可能忽略医患对话中的关键交互细节，而这些细节对自动用药推荐至关重要。
AI.method: 构建包含11,996个医疗对话的DialMed数据集，并设计融合问答对话图机制与知识图谱的DDN模型，结合对话结构和外部疾病知识进行用药推荐。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在基于医疗对话的用药推荐任务中展现出良好的性能。
AI.conclusion: DialMed数据集和DDN方法为利用医患对话进行用药推荐提供了有效解决方案，相关资源已开源。

search_text: DialMed: A Dataset for Dialogue-based Medication Recommendation DialMed：基于对话的药物推荐数据集 Medication recommendation is a crucial task for intelligent healthcare systems. Previous studies mainly recommend medications with electronic health records (EHRs). However, some details of interactions between doctors and patients may be ignored or omitted in EHRs, which are essential for automatic medication recommendation. Therefore, we make the first attempt to recommend medications with the conversations between doctors and patients. In this work, we construct DIALMED, the first high-quality dataset for medical dialogue-based medication recommendation task. It contains 11,996 medical dialogues related to 16 common diseases from 3 departments and 70 corresponding common medications. Furthermore, we propose a Dialogue structure and Disease knowledge aware Network (DDN), where a QA Dialogue Graph mechanism is designed to model the dialogue structure and the knowledge graph is used to introduce external disease knowledge. The extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method is a promising solution to recommend medications with medical dialogues. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/f-window/DialMed. 药物推荐是智能医疗系统的一项关键任务。之前的研究主要推荐带有电子健康记录（EHR）的药物。然而，电子病历中医生和患者之间互动的一些细节可能会被忽略或省略，而这对于自动药物推荐至关重要。因此，我们首先尝试通过医患对话来推荐药物。在这项工作中，我们构建了 DIALMED，这是第一个用于基于医学对话的药物推荐任务的高质量数据集。包含11996条医学对话，涉及3个科室的16种常见疾病和70种相应的常用药物。此外，我们提出了对话结构和疾病知识感知网络（DDN），其中设计了QA对话图机制来对对话结构进行建模，并使用知识图来引入外部疾病知识。广泛的实验结果表明，所提出的方法是通过医学对话推荐药物的一种有前途的解决方案。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/f-window/DialMed 获取。 本文构建了一个基于医患对话的高质量医疗用药推荐数据集DialMed，并提出结合对话结构和疾病知识的推荐方法DDN。 Zhenfeng He,Yuqiang Han,Zhenqiu Ouyang,Wei Gao,Hongxu Chen,Guandong Xu,Jian Wu cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Human Attention Detection Using AM-FM Representations
title_zh: 使用 AM-FM 表示进行人类注意力检测
abstract: Human activity detection from digital videos presents many challenges to the computer vision and image processing communities. Recently, many methods have been developed to detect human activities with varying degree of success. Yet, the general human activity detection problem remains very challenging, especially when the methods need to work 'in the wild' (e.g., without having precise control over the imaging geometry). The thesis explores phase-based solutions for (i) detecting faces, (ii) back of the heads, (iii) joint detection of faces and back of the heads, and (iv) whether the head is looking to the left or the right, using standard video cameras without any control on the imaging geometry. The proposed phase-based approach is based on the development of simple and robust methods that rely on the use of Amplitude Modulation- Frequency Modulation (AM-FM) models. The approach is validated using video frames extracted from the Advancing Out-of-school Learning in Mathematics and Engineering (AOLME) project. The dataset consisted of 13,265 images from ten students looking at the camera, and 6,122 images from five students looking away from the camera. For the students facing the camera, the method was able to correctly classify 97.1% of them looking to the left and 95.9% of them looking to the right. For the students facing the back of the camera, the method was able to correctly classify 87.6% of them looking to the left and 93.3% of them looking to the right. The results indicate that AM-FM based methods hold great promise for analyzing human activity videos.

Recently, many methods have been developed to detect human activities with varying degree of success. Yet, the general human activity detection problem remains very challenging, especially when the methods need to work 'in the wild' (e.g., without having precise control over the imaging geometry). The thesis explores phase-based solutions for (i) detecting faces, (ii) back of the heads, (iii) joint detection of faces and back of the heads, and (iv) whether the head is looking to the left or the right, using standard video cameras without any control on the imaging geometry. The proposed phase-based approach is based on the development of simple and robust methods that rely on the use of Amplitude Modulation- Frequency Modulation (AM-FM) models. The approach is validated using video frames extracted from the Advancing Out-of-school Learning in Mathematics and Engineering (AOLME) project. The dataset consisted of 13,265 images from ten students looking at the camera, and 6,122 images from five students looking away from the camera. For the students facing the camera, the method was able to correctly classify 97.1% of them looking to the left and 95.9% of them looking to the right. For the students facing the back of the camera, the method was able to correctly classify 87.6% of them looking to the left and 93.3% of them looking to the right. The results indicate that AM-FM based methods hold great promise for analyzing human activity videos.
abstract_zh: 数字视频中的人类活动检测给计算机视觉和图像处理社区带来了许多挑战。最近，已经开发出许多方法来检测人类活动，并取得了不同程度的成功。然而，一般的人类活动检测问题仍然非常具有挑战性，特别是当这些方法需要“在野外”工作时（例如，无需对成像几何形状进行精确控制）。该论文探讨了基于相位的解决方案，用于（i）检测面部，（ii）头部后部，（iii）面部和头部后部的联合检测，以及（iv）头部是否向左或向右看，使用标准摄像机，对成像几何形状没有任何控制。所提出的基于相位的方法基于简单而稳健的方法的开发，这些方法依赖于调幅-调频（AM-FM）模型的使用。该方法使用从推进数学和工程校外学习 (AOLME) 项目中提取的视频帧进行了验证。该数据集包含 10 名学生看着相机的 13,265 张图像，以及 5 名学生远离相机的 6,122 张图像。对于面对镜头的学生，该方法能够正确分类其中 97.1% 的学生向左看，95.9% 的学生向右看。对于面向相机背面的学生，该方法能够正确分类其中 87.6% 的向左看的学生和 93.3% 的向右看的学生。结果表明，基于 AM-FM 的方法在分析人类活动视频方面具有广阔的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于AM-FM模型的相位分析方法，用于检测视频中的人脸、头部背面及注视方向，解决野外环境下人体活动检测的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在复杂野外场景（如无控成像几何）下检测人体活动效果有限，需更稳健的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发基于相位的AM-FM模型，利用视频帧的幅度调制-频率调制特征，实现人脸/头部背面检测及左右注视方向判断。
AI.result: 在AOLME数据集上，面对摄像头学生左右注视识别准确率达97.1%/95.9%，背对摄像头学生达87.6%/93.3%。
AI.conclusion: AM-FM方法在复杂场景下展现高鲁棒性，为分析人类活动视频提供有效技术路径。

title: MDMMT-2: Multidomain Multimodal Transformer for Video Retrieval, One More Step Towards Generalization
title_zh: MDMMT-2：用于视频检索的多域多模态变压器，朝着泛化又迈出了一步
abstract: In this work we present a new State-of-The-Art on the text-to-video retrieval task on MSR-VTT, LSMDC, MSVD, YouCook2 and TGIF obtained by a single model. Three different data sources are combined: weakly-supervised videos, crowd-labeled text-image pairs and text-video pairs. A careful analysis of available pre-trained networks helps to choose the best prior-knowledge ones. We introduce three-stage training procedure that provides high transfer knowledge efficiency and allows to use noisy datasets during training without prior knowledge degradation. Additionally, double positional encoding is used for better fusion of different modalities and a simple method for non-square inputs processing is suggested.
summary: In this work we present a new State-of-The-Art on the text-to-video retrieval task on MSR-VTT, LSMDC, MSVD, YouCook2 and TGIF obtained by a single model. Three different data sources are combined: weakly-supervised videos, crowd-labeled text-image pairs and text-video pairs. A careful analysis of available pre-trained networks helps to choose the best prior-knowledge ones. We introduce three-stage training procedure that provides high transfer knowledge efficiency and allows to use noisy datasets during training without prior knowledge degradation. Additionally, double positional encoding is used for better fusion of different modalities and a simple method for non-square inputs processing is suggested.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了通过单个模型获得的 MSR-VTT、LSMDC、MSVD、YouCook2 和 TGIF 上的文本到视频检索任务的新的 State-of-The-Art。组合了三种不同的数据源：弱监督视频、人群标记的文本图像对和文本视频对。对可用的预训练网络的仔细分析有助于选择最佳的先验知识网络。我们引入了三阶段训练过程，该过程提供了较高的知识转移效率，并允许在训练期间使用噪声数据集，而不会降低先验知识。此外，双位置编码用于更好地融合不同模态，并提出了一种用于非方形输入处理的简单方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MDMMT-2模型，在多个视频检索数据集上实现跨领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检索模型在不同数据集间泛化能力不足，需解决多模态数据融合与噪声数据利用问题。
AI.method: 采用三阶段训练流程结合弱监督数据，引入双重位置编码与非方输入处理机制，融合图文视频多模态信息。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT等五个数据集上取得SOTA结果，单模型实现跨领域视频检索性能突破。
AI.conclusion: 通过多数据源协同训练与模态融合优化，证明了MDMMT-2在视频检索任务上的通用性优势。

Additionally, double positional encoding is used for better fusion of different modalities and a simple method for non-square inputs processing is suggested. 在这项工作中，我们提出了通过单个模型获得的 MSR-VTT、LSMDC、MSVD、YouCook2 和 TGIF 上的文本到视频检索任务的新的 State-of-The-Art。组合了三种不同的数据源：弱监督视频、人群标记的文本图像对和文本视频对。对可用的预训练网络的仔细分析有助于选择最佳的先验知识网络。我们引入了三阶段训练过程，该过程提供了较高的知识转移效率，并允许在训练期间使用噪声数据集，而不会降低先验知识。此外，双位置编码用于更好地融合不同模态，并提出了一种用于非方形输入处理的简单方法。 本文提出MDMMT-2模型，在多个视频检索数据集上实现跨领域泛化能力。 Alexander Kunitsyn,Maksim Kalashnikov,Maksim Dzabraev,Andrei Ivaniuta cs.CV

title: Strategy Complexity of Point Payoff, Mean Payoff and Total Payoff Objectives in Countable MDPs
title_zh: 可数 MDP 中点支付、平均支付和总支付目标的策略复杂性
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.03287
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.03287
abstract: We study countably infinite Markov decision processes (MDPs) with real-valued transition rewards. Every infinite run induces the following sequences of payoffs: 1. Point payoff (the sequence of directly seen transition rewards), 2. Mean payoff (the sequence of the sums of all rewards so far, divided by the number of steps), and 3. Total payoff (the sequence of the sums of all rewards so far). For each payoff type, the objective is to maximize the probability that the $\liminf$ is non-negative. We establish the complete picture of the strategy complexity of these objectives, i.e., how much memory is necessary and sufficient for $\varepsilon$-optimal (resp. optimal) strategies. Some cases can be won with memoryless deterministic strategies, while others require a step counter, a reward counter, or both.
summary: We study countably infinite Markov decision processes (MDPs) with real-valued transition rewards. Every infinite run induces the following sequences of payoffs: 1. Point payoff (the sequence of directly seen transition rewards), 2. Mean payoff (the sequence of the sums of all rewards so far, divided by the number of steps), and 3. Total payoff (the sequence of the sums of all rewards so far). For each payoff type, the objective is to maximize the probability that the $\liminf$ is non-negative. We establish the complete picture of the strategy complexity of these objectives, i.e., how much memory is necessary and sufficient for $\varepsilon$-optimal (resp. optimal) strategies. Some cases can be won with memoryless deterministic strategies, while others require a step counter, a reward counter, or both.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有实值转换奖励的可数无限马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）。每次无限运行都会产生以下收益序列：1. 点收益（直接看到的转换奖励的序列），2. 平均收益（迄今为止所有奖励之和的序列，除以步数），以及 3. 总收益（迄今为止所有奖励之和的序列）。对于每种收益类型，目标是最大化 $\liminf$ 非负的概率。我们建立了这些目标的策略复杂性的完整图景，即对于$\varepsilon$-最优（或最优）策略来说，多少内存是必要和足够的。有些案件可以通过无记忆的确定性策略获胜，而其他案件则需要计步器、奖励计数器或两者兼而有之。

AI.tldr: 本文研究可数无限马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）中点收益、平均收益和总收益目标的策略复杂度，分析实现非负liminf概率所需的记忆资源。
AI.motivation: MDPs在无限时间决策中广泛应用，但不同收益目标对策略记忆需求的研究尚不明确，需明确各类目标下最优策略的复杂度边界。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，针对三种收益序列（点收益、平均收益、总收益）分别建立模型，研究ε-最优策略和最优策略所需的记忆资源类型与数量。
AI.result: 部分目标可通过无记忆策略解决，而平均收益和总收益目标需要步数计数器、收益计数器或两者结合，揭示了不同目标的策略复杂度差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文完整刻画了三类收益目标的策略复杂度，证明了记忆需求与目标类型之间的紧密关联，为无限MDPs的策略设计提供理论指导。

title: A Mixed Integer Programming Approach for Verifying Properties of Binarized Neural Networks
title_zh: 验证二值化神经网络性质的混合整数规划方法
comment: ef:2021 AISafety Workshop at the International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI)
comments: ef:2021 AISafety Workshop at the International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI)
abstract: Many approaches for verifying input-output properties of neural networks have been proposed recently. However, existing algorithms do not scale well to large networks. Recent work in the field of model compression studied binarized neural networks (BNNs), whose parameters and activations are binary. BNNs tend to exhibit a slight decrease in performance compared to their full-precision counterparts, but they can be easier to verify. This paper proposes a simple mixed integer programming formulation for BNN verification that leverages network structure. We demonstrate our approach by verifying properties of BNNs trained on the MNIST dataset and an aircraft collision avoidance controller. We compare the runtime of our approach against state-of-the-art verification algorithms for full-precision neural networks. The results suggest that the difficulty of training BNNs might be worth the reduction in runtime achieved by our verification algorithm.
summary: Many approaches for verifying input-output properties of neural networks have been proposed recently. However, existing algorithms do not scale well to large networks. Recent work in the field of model compression studied binarized neural networks (BNNs), whose parameters and activations are binary. BNNs tend to exhibit a slight decrease in performance compared to their full-precision counterparts, but they can be easier to verify. This paper proposes a simple mixed integer programming formulation for BNN verification that leverages network structure. We demonstrate our approach by verifying properties of BNNs trained on the MNIST dataset and an aircraft collision avoidance controller. We compare the runtime of our approach against state-of-the-art verification algorithms for full-precision neural networks. The results suggest that the difficulty of training BNNs might be worth the reduction in runtime achieved by our verification algorithm.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了许多验证神经网络输入输出特性的方法。然而，现有算法不能很好地扩展到大型网络。模型压缩领域的最新工作研究了二值化神经网络（BNN），其参数和激活都是二元的。与全精度对应物相比，BNN 的性能往往会略有下降，但它们更容易验证。本文提出了一种利用网络结构进行 BNN 验证的简单混合整数规划公式。我们通过验证在 MNIST 数据集和飞机防撞控制器上训练的 BNN 的属性来演示我们的方法。我们将我们的方法的运行时间与最先进的全精度神经网络验证算法进行比较。结果表明，训练 BNN 的难度可能值得我们的验证算法所实现的运行时间的减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合整数规划的二值化神经网络属性验证方法，通过利用网络结构提升验证效率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络验证算法难以扩展到大规模网络，而二值化神经网络（BNNs）虽性能略低但具有更优的可验证性，亟需高效验证方法。
AI.method: 设计混合整数规划模型，结合BNNs的二值化特性与网络结构，构建验证问题的数学表达式进行求解。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集和飞机避撞控制器案例中验证有效性，相比全精度网络验证算法显著降低运行时间。
AI.conclusion: BNNs的训练难度可被验证效率提升所弥补，混合整数规划方法为BNNs验证提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Di Wu,Cheng Chen,Xiujun Chen,Junwei Pan,Xun Yang,Qing Tan,Jian Xu,Kuang-Chih Lee
title: Impression Allocation and Policy Search in Display Advertising
title_zh: 展示广告中的展示分配和策略搜索
abstract: In online display advertising, guaranteed contracts and real-time bidding (RTB) are two major ways to sell impressions for a publisher. For large publishers, simultaneously selling impressions through both guaranteed contracts and in-house RTB has become a popular choice. Generally speaking, a publisher needs to derive an impression allocation strategy between guaranteed contracts and RTB to maximize its overall outcome (e.g., revenue and/or impression quality). However, deriving the optimal strategy is not a trivial task, e.g., the strategy should encourage incentive compatibility in RTB and tackle common challenges in real-world applications such as unstable traffic patterns (e.g., impression volume and bid landscape changing). In this paper, we formulate impression allocation as an auction problem where each guaranteed contract submits virtual bids for individual impressions. With this formulation, we derive the optimal bidding functions for the guaranteed contracts, which result in the optimal impression allocation. In order to address the unstable traffic pattern challenge and achieve the optimal overall outcome, we propose a multi-agent reinforcement learning method to adjust the bids from each guaranteed contract, which is simple, converging efficiently and scalable. The experiments conducted on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: In online display advertising, guaranteed contracts and real-time bidding (RTB) are two major ways to sell impressions for a publisher. For large publishers, simultaneously selling impressions through both guaranteed contracts and in-house RTB has become a popular choice. Generally speaking, a publisher needs to derive an impression allocation strategy between guaranteed contracts and RTB to maximize its overall outcome (e.g., revenue and/or impression quality). However, deriving the optimal strategy is not a trivial task, e.g., the strategy should encourage incentive compatibility in RTB and tackle common challenges in real-world applications such as unstable traffic patterns (e.g., impression volume and bid landscape changing). In this paper, we formulate impression allocation as an auction problem where each guaranteed contract submits virtual bids for individual impressions. With this formulation, we derive the optimal bidding functions for the guaranteed contracts, which result in the optimal impression allocation. In order to address the unstable traffic pattern challenge and achieve the optimal overall outcome, we propose a multi-agent reinforcement learning method to adjust the bids from each guaranteed contract, which is simple, converging efficiently and scalable. The experiments conducted on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 在在线展示广告中，有保证的合同和实时出价 (RTB) 是发布商销售展示次数的两种主要方式。对于大型出版商来说，通过有保证的合同和内部 RTB 同时销售展示次数已成为一种流行的选择。一般来说，发布商需要在有保证的合同和RTB之间制定展示分配策略，以最大化其整体成果（例如，收入和/或展示质量）。然而，导出最佳策略并不是一项简单的任务，例如，该策略应鼓励 RTB 中的激励兼容性，并解决现实应用中的常见挑战，例如不稳定的流量模式（例如展示量和出价格局变化）。在本文中，我们将印象分配制定为拍卖问题，其中每个有保证的合同针对各个印象提交虚拟出价。通过这个公式，我们得出了有保证的合同的最佳出价函数，从而实现了最佳展示分配。为了解决不稳定的流量模式挑战并实现最佳的整体结果，我们提出了一种多智能体强化学习方法来调整每个保证合约的出价，该方法简单、高效收敛且可扩展。在现实世界数据集上进行的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线显示广告中如何通过优化保证合同与实时竞价（RTB）的印象分配策略，以最大化出版商的整体收益和印象质量。
AI.motivation: 大型出版商同时使用保证合同和RTB面临策略制定复杂、流量模式不稳定等挑战，需设计兼顾激励相容性和实际应用的分配方案。
AI.method: 将印象分配建模为拍卖问题，推导保证合同的最优出价函数，并提出多智能体强化学习方法动态调整出价以应对流量波动。
AI.result: 基于真实数据集的实验验证了该方法在提升整体收益和应对不稳定流量方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多智能体强化学习方法能高效解决印象分配中的实际挑战，为出版商提供可扩展的优化策略。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究在线显示广告中如何通过优化保证合同与实时竞价（RTB）的印象分配策略，以最大化出版商的整体收益和印象质量。

search_text: Impression Allocation and Policy Search in Display Advertising 展示广告中的展示分配和策略搜索 In online display advertising, guaranteed contracts and real-time bidding (RTB) are two major ways to sell impressions for a publisher. For large publishers, simultaneously selling impressions through both guaranteed contracts and in-house RTB has become a popular choice. Generally speaking, a publisher needs to derive an impression allocation strategy between guaranteed contracts and RTB to maximize its overall outcome (e.g., revenue and/or impression quality). However, deriving the optimal strategy is not a trivial task, e.g., the strategy should encourage incentive compatibility in RTB and tackle common challenges in real-world applications such as unstable traffic patterns (e.g., impression volume and bid landscape changing). In this paper, we formulate impression allocation as an auction problem where each guaranteed contract submits virtual bids for individual impressions. With this formulation, we derive the optimal bidding functions for the guaranteed contracts, which result in the optimal impression allocation. In order to address the unstable traffic pattern challenge and achieve the optimal overall outcome, we propose a multi-agent reinforcement learning method to adjust the bids from each guaranteed contract, which is simple, converging efficiently and scalable. The experiments conducted on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. 在在线展示广告中，有保证的合同和实时出价 (RTB) 是发布商销售展示次数的两种主要方式。对于大型出版商来说，通过有保证的合同和内部 RTB 同时销售展示次数已成为一种流行的选择。一般来说，发布商需要在有保证的合同和RTB之间制定展示分配策略，以最大化其整体成果（例如，收入和/或展示质量）。然而，导出最佳策略并不是一项简单的任务，例如，该策略应鼓励 RTB 中的激励兼容性，并解决现实应用中的常见挑战，例如不稳定的流量模式（例如展示量和出价格局变化）。在本文中，我们将印象分配制定为拍卖问题，其中每个有保证的合同针对各个印象提交虚拟出价。通过这个公式，我们得出了有保证的合同的最佳出价函数，从而实现了最佳展示分配。为了解决不稳定的流量模式挑战并实现最佳的整体结果，我们提出了一种多智能体强化学习方法来调整每个保证合约的出价，该方法简单、高效收敛且可扩展。在现实世界数据集上进行的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文研究在线显示广告中如何通过优化保证合同与实时竞价（RTB）的印象分配策略，以最大化出版商的整体收益和印象质量。 Di Wu,Cheng Chen,Xiujun Chen,Junwei Pan,Xun Yang,Qing Tan,Jian Xu,Kuang-Chih Lee cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.CE

title: Neural Forecasting of the Italian Sovereign Bond Market with Economic News
title_zh: 利用经济新闻对意大利主权债券市场进行神经预测
abstract: In this paper we employ economic news within a neural network framework to forecast the Italian 10-year interest rate spread. We use a big, open-source, database known as Global Database of Events, Language and Tone to extract topical and emotional news content linked to bond markets dynamics. We deploy such information within a probabilistic forecasting framework with autoregressive recurrent networks (DeepAR). Our findings suggest that a deep learning network based on Long-Short Term Memory cells outperforms classical machine learning techniques and provides a forecasting performance that is over and above that obtained by using conventional determinants of interest rates alone.
summary: In this paper we employ economic news within a neural network framework to forecast the Italian 10-year interest rate spread. We use a big, open-source, database known as Global Database of Events, Language and Tone to extract topical and emotional news content linked to bond markets dynamics. We deploy such information within a probabilistic forecasting framework with autoregressive recurrent networks (DeepAR). Our findings suggest that a deep learning network based on Long-Short Term Memory cells outperforms classical machine learning techniques and provides a forecasting performance that is over and above that obtained by using conventional determinants of interest rates alone.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们利用神经网络框架内的经济新闻来预测意大利 10 年期利差。我们使用一个名为“全球事件、语言和语气数据库”的大型开源数据库来提取与债券市场动态相关的话题和情感新闻内容。我们将这些信息部署在具有自回归循环网络（DeepAR）的概率预测框架内。我们的研究结果表明，基于长短期记忆细胞的深度学习网络的性能优于经典的机器学习技术，并且提供的预测性能优于单独使用传统利率决定因素所获得的预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文利用经济新闻和神经网络框架预测意大利10年期利率利差，通过结合新闻数据与深度学习模型提升预测效果。
AI.motivation: 传统利率预测方法依赖常规经济指标，难以捕捉新闻事件对市场的影响，需探索结合经济新闻的深度学习方法以提高预测精度。
AI.method: 使用GDELT数据库提取新闻话题与情感信息，结合DeepAR框架中的LSTM模型进行概率预测，对比传统机器学习方法。
AI.result: LSTM模型在预测意大利主权债券利率利差上优于传统机器学习方法及单独使用传统经济指标的模型。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习结合经济新闻能有效提升利率预测性能，为债券市场分析提供新思路。

title: Toward Ethical AIED
title_zh: 迈向道德 AIED
comment: 11 pages; concluding chapter from the forthcoming book to be printed by Routledge in August 2022
comments: 11 pages; concluding chapter from the forthcoming book to be printed by Routledge in August 2022
abstract: This paper presents the key conclusions to the forthcoming edited book on The Ethics of Artificial Intelligence in Education: Practices, Challenges and Debates (August 2022, Routlege). As well as highlighting the key contributions to the book, it discusses the key questions and the grand challenges for the field of AI in Education (AIED)in the context of ethics and ethical practices within the field. The book itself presents diverse perspectives from outside and from within the AIED as a way of achieving a broad perspective in the key ethical issues for AIED and a deep understanding of work conducted to date by the AIED community.
summary: This paper presents the key conclusions to the forthcoming edited book on The Ethics of Artificial Intelligence in Education: Practices, Challenges and Debates (August 2022, Routlege). As well as highlighting the key contributions to the book, it discusses the key questions and the grand challenges for the field of AI in Education (AIED)in the context of ethics and ethical practices within the field. The book itself presents diverse perspectives from outside and from within the AIED as a way of achieving a broad perspective in the key ethical issues for AIED and a deep understanding of work conducted to date by the AIED community.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了即将出版的《教育中的人工智能伦理：实践、挑战和辩论》（2022 年 8 月，Routlege）一书的主要结论。除了强调本书的主要贡献外，它还讨论了人工智能教育领域 (AIED) 在道德和道德实践背景下的关键问题和重大挑战。本书本身提出了 AIED 外部和内部的不同观点，以此作为对 AIED 关键道德问题获得广泛视角并深入了解 AIED 社区迄今为止所做工作的一种方式。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍即将出版的《人工智能教育伦理》书籍的核心观点，探讨人工智能教育（AIED）领域在伦理和道德实践中的关键问题与挑战。
AI.motivation: 通过整合AIED领域内外的多元视角，推动教育界对人工智能伦理问题的深入讨论，并梳理当前研究进展以应对未来挑战。
AI.method: 综述与分析现有文献，结合书籍中不同学科的研究成果，提炼AIED伦理问题的核心议题与实践方向。
AI.result: 总结书籍中关于AIED伦理的关键贡献，明确当前研究的不足，并提出未来需解决的伦理难题与研究路径。
AI.conclusion: 强调AIED伦理研究的必要性，呼吁跨学科合作以制定更符合教育公平与人类价值观的人工智能应用规范。

authors_text: Joey Wilson,Jingyu Song,Yuewei Fu,Arthur Zhang,Andrew Capodieci,Paramsothy Jayakumar,Kira Barton,Maani Ghaffari
title: MotionSC: Data Set and Network for Real-Time Semantic Mapping in Dynamic Environments
title_zh: MotionSC：动态环境中实时语义映射的数据集和网络
abstract: This work addresses a gap in semantic scene completion (SSC) data by creating a novel outdoor data set with accurate and complete dynamic scenes. Our data set is formed from randomly sampled views of the world at each time step, which supervises generalizability to complete scenes without occlusions or traces. We create SSC baselines from state-of-the-art open source networks and construct a benchmark real-time dense local semantic mapping algorithm, MotionSC, by leveraging recent 3D deep learning architectures to enhance SSC with temporal information. Our network shows that the proposed data set can quantify and supervise accurate scene completion in the presence of dynamic objects, which can lead to the development of improved dynamic mapping algorithms. All software is available at https://github.com/UMich-CURLY/3DMapping.
summary: This work addresses a gap in semantic scene completion (SSC) data by creating a novel outdoor data set with accurate and complete dynamic scenes. Our data set is formed from randomly sampled views of the world at each time step, which supervises generalizability to complete scenes without occlusions or traces. We create SSC baselines from state-of-the-art open source networks and construct a benchmark real-time dense local semantic mapping algorithm, MotionSC, by leveraging recent 3D deep learning architectures to enhance SSC with temporal information. Our network shows that the proposed data set can quantify and supervise accurate scene completion in the presence of dynamic objects, which can lead to the development of improved dynamic mapping algorithms. All software is available at https://github.com/UMich-CURLY/3DMapping.
abstract_zh: 这项工作通过创建具有准确且完整的动态场景的新型户外数据集，解决了语义场景完成（SSC）数据中的空白。我们的数据集是由每个时间步长的随机采样的世界视图形成的，它监督了没有遮挡或痕迹的完整场景的概括性。我们从最先进的开源网络创建 SSC 基线，并利用最新的 3D 深度学习架构构建基准实时密集局部语义映射算法 MotionSC，通过时间信息增强 SSC。我们的网络表明，所提出的数据集可以在存在动态对象的情况下量化和监督准确的场景完成，这可以导致改进的动态映射算法的开发。所有软件均可从 https://github.com/UMich-CURLY/3DMapping 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MotionSC的实时语义映射算法，并构建了一个用于动态环境的语义场景补全（SSC）数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有的语义场景补全数据集主要集中在静态场景，缺乏对动态环境的充分覆盖，限制了相关算法在动态场景中的应用。
AI.method: 本文创建了一个包含准确且完整的动态场景的户外数据集，并基于最新的3D深度学习架构开发了MotionSC算法，通过时间信息增强SSC。
AI.result: 该网络展示了所提出的数据集在动态物体存在的情况下能够量化和监督精确的场景补全，为改进动态映射算法提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 本文的数据集和MotionSC算法为动态环境下的实时语义映射提供了新的研究方向和基准。

search_text: MotionSC: Data Set and Network for Real-Time Semantic Mapping in Dynamic Environments MotionSC：动态环境中实时语义映射的数据集和网络 This work addresses a gap in semantic scene completion (SSC) data by creating a novel outdoor data set with accurate and complete dynamic scenes. Our data set is formed from randomly sampled views of the world at each time step, which supervises generalizability to complete scenes without occlusions or traces. We create SSC baselines from state-of-the-art open source networks and construct a benchmark real-time dense local semantic mapping algorithm, MotionSC, by leveraging recent 3D deep learning architectures to enhance SSC with temporal information. Our network shows that the proposed data set can quantify and supervise accurate scene completion in the presence of dynamic objects, which can lead to the development of improved dynamic mapping algorithms. All software is available at https://github.com/UMich-CURLY/3DMapping. 这项工作通过创建具有准确且完整的动态场景的新型户外数据集，解决了语义场景完成（SSC）数据中的空白。我们的数据集是由每个时间步长的随机采样的世界视图形成的，它监督了没有遮挡或痕迹的完整场景的概括性。我们从最先进的开源网络创建 SSC 基线，并利用最新的 3D 深度学习架构构建基准实时密集局部语义映射算法 MotionSC，通过时间信息增强 SSC。我们的网络表明，所提出的数据集可以在存在动态对象的情况下量化和监督准确的场景完成，这可以导致改进的动态映射算法的开发。所有软件均可从 https://github.com/UMich-CURLY/3DMapping 获取。 本文提出了一种名为MotionSC的实时语义映射算法，并构建了一个用于动态环境的语义场景补全（SSC）数据集。 Joey Wilson,Jingyu Song,Yuewei Fu,Arthur Zhang,Andrew Capodieci,Paramsothy Jayakumar,Kira Barton,Maani Ghaffari cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Self-Promoted Supervision for Few-Shot Transformer
title_zh: 少镜头变压器的自提升监察
abstract: The few-shot learning ability of vision transformers (ViTs) is rarely investigated though heavily desired. In this work, we empirically find that with the same few-shot learning frameworks, \eg~Meta-Baseline, replacing the widely used CNN feature extractor with a ViT model often severely impairs few-shot classification performance. Moreover, our empirical study shows that in the absence of inductive bias, ViTs often learn the low-qualified token dependencies under few-shot learning regime where only a few labeled training data are available, which largely contributes to the above performance degradation. To alleviate this issue, for the first time, we propose a simple yet effective few-shot training framework for ViTs, namely Self-promoted sUpervisioN (SUN). Specifically, besides the conventional global supervision for global semantic learning SUN further pretrains the ViT on the few-shot learning dataset and then uses it to generate individual location-specific supervision for guiding each patch token. This location-specific supervision tells the ViT which patch tokens are similar or dissimilar and thus accelerates token dependency learning. Moreover, it models the local semantics in each patch token to improve the object grounding and recognition capability which helps learn generalizable patterns. To improve the quality of location-specific supervision, we further propose two techniques:~1) background patch filtration to filtrate background patches out and assign them into an extra background class; and 2) spatial-consistent augmentation to introduce sufficient diversity for data augmentation while keeping the accuracy of the generated local supervisions. Experimental results show that SUN using ViTs significantly surpasses other few-shot learning frameworks with ViTs and is the first one that achieves higher performance than those CNN state-of-the-arts.
summary: The few-shot learning ability of vision transformers (ViTs) is rarely investigated though heavily desired. In this work, we empirically find that with the same few-shot learning frameworks, \eg~Meta-Baseline, replacing the widely used CNN feature extractor with a ViT model often severely impairs few-shot classification performance. Moreover, our empirical study shows that in the absence of inductive bias, ViTs often learn the low-qualified token dependencies under few-shot learning regime where only a few labeled training data are available, which largely contributes to the above performance degradation. To alleviate this issue, for the first time, we propose a simple yet effective few-shot training framework for ViTs, namely Self-promoted sUpervisioN (SUN). Specifically, besides the conventional global supervision for global semantic learning SUN further pretrains the ViT on the few-shot learning dataset and then uses it to generate individual location-specific supervision for guiding each patch token. This location-specific supervision tells the ViT which patch tokens are similar or dissimilar and thus accelerates token dependency learning. Moreover, it models the local semantics in each patch token to improve the object grounding and recognition capability which helps learn generalizable patterns. To improve the quality of location-specific supervision, we further propose two techniques:~1) background patch filtration to filtrate background patches out and assign them into an extra background class; and 2) spatial-consistent augmentation to introduce sufficient diversity for data augmentation while keeping the accuracy of the generated local supervisions. Experimental results show that SUN using ViTs significantly surpasses other few-shot learning frameworks with ViTs and is the first one that achieves higher performance than those CNN state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViT）的小样本学习能力虽然非常需要，但很少被研究。在这项工作中，我们凭经验发现，使用相同的少样本学习框架（例如~Meta-Baseline），用 ViT 模型替换广泛使用的 CNN 特征提取器通常会严重损害少样本分类性能。此外，我们的实证研究表明，在没有归纳偏差的情况下，ViT 经常在只有少量标记训练数据可用的少样本学习机制下学习低质量的令牌依赖关系，这在很大程度上导致了上述性能下降。为了缓解这个问题，我们首次提出了一种简单而有效的 ViT 训练框架，即自我促进监督（SUN）。具体来说，除了用于全局语义学习的传统全局监督之外，SUN 还进一步在少样本学习数据集上预训练 ViT，然后使用它生成单独的特定位置监督来指导每个补丁标记。这种特定于位置的监督告诉 ViT 哪些补丁令牌相似或不相似，从而加速令牌依赖性学习。此外，它对每个补丁标记中的局部语义进行建模，以提高对象基础和识别能力，这有助于学习可概括的模式。为了提高特定位置监督的质量，我们进一步提出了两种技术：~1）背景补丁过滤，将背景补丁过滤掉并将其分配到额外的背景类中； 2）空间一致的增强，为数据增强引入足够的多样性，同时保持生成的局部监督的准确性。实验结果表明，使用 ViT 的 SUN 显着优于其他使用 ViT 的少样本学习框架，并且是第一个实现比 CNN 最先进的性能更高的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SUN的自促进监督框架，旨在提升视觉Transformer（ViT）在少样本学习任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉Transformer（ViT）在许多任务中表现出色，但其少样本学习能力尚未被充分研究，且在相同框架下性能常低于CNN。
AI.method: SUN框架通过预训练ViT生成位置特定的监督信号，指导每个图像块（patch）的依赖关系学习，并引入背景块过滤和空间一致增强技术优化监督质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，SUN框架下的ViT在少样本分类任务中显著优于其他ViT框架，并首次超越CNN的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SUN通过位置特定监督和优化技术有效解决了ViT在少样本场景下的性能缺陷，为未来研究提供了新方向。

title: Real-Robot Deep Reinforcement Learning: Improving Trajectory Tracking of Flexible-Joint Manipulator with Reference Correction
title_zh: 真实机器人深度强化学习：通过参考校正改进柔性关节机械臂的轨迹跟踪
comment: Accepted final version. IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Philadelphia, USA, May 2022
comments: Accepted final version. IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Philadelphia, USA, May 2022
abstract: Flexible-joint manipulators are governed by complex nonlinear dynamics, defining a challenging control problem. In this work, we propose an approach to learn an outer-loop joint trajectory tracking controller with deep reinforcement learning. The controller represented by a stochastic policy is learned in under two hours directly on the real robot. This is achieved through bounded reference correction actions and use of a model-free off-policy learning method. In addition, an informed policy initialization is proposed, where the agent is pre-trained in a learned simulation. We test our approach on the 7 DOF manipulator of a Baxter robot. We demonstrate that the proposed method is capable of consistent learning across multiple runs when applied directly on the real robot. Our method yields a policy which significantly improves the trajectory tracking accuracy in comparison to the vendor-provided controller, generalizing to an unseen payload.
summary: Flexible-joint manipulators are governed by complex nonlinear dynamics, defining a challenging control problem. In this work, we propose an approach to learn an outer-loop joint trajectory tracking controller with deep reinforcement learning. The controller represented by a stochastic policy is learned in under two hours directly on the real robot. This is achieved through bounded reference correction actions and use of a model-free off-policy learning method. In addition, an informed policy initialization is proposed, where the agent is pre-trained in a learned simulation. We test our approach on the 7 DOF manipulator of a Baxter robot. We demonstrate that the proposed method is capable of consistent learning across multiple runs when applied directly on the real robot. Our method yields a policy which significantly improves the trajectory tracking accuracy in comparison to the vendor-provided controller, generalizing to an unseen payload.
abstract_zh: 柔性关节机械手受复杂的非线性动力学控制，定义了一个具有挑战性的控制问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过深度强化学习来学习外环联合轨迹跟踪控制器的方法。由随机策略代表的控制器是在两个小时内直接在真实机器人上学习的。这是通过有界参考校正动作和使用无模型的离策略学习方法来实现的。此外，还提出了一种明智的策略初始化，其中代理在学习模拟中进行了预训练。我们在 Baxter 机器人的 7 DOF 机械臂上测试了我们的方法。我们证明，当直接应用于真实机器人时，所提出的方法能够在多次运行中进行一致的学习。与供应商提供的控制器相比，我们的方法产生的策略显着提高了轨迹跟踪精度，并推广到不可见的有效负载。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的方法，通过参考校正直接在真实机器人上学习柔性关节机械臂的轨迹跟踪控制器。
AI.motivation: 柔性关节机械臂具有复杂非线性动力学特性，传统控制方法难以实现高精度轨迹跟踪，需探索更有效的自适应控制策略。
AI.method: 采用无模型离线策略学习算法，结合有界参考校正机制，并通过仿真预训练策略初始化，直接在真实7自由度Baxter机械臂上进行训练。
AI.result: 所学策略在真实机器人上多次运行均表现稳定，轨迹跟踪精度较厂商控制器提升显著，且能适应未见过的负载变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了深度强化学习在真实机器人控制中的有效性，为复杂动力学系统的自适应控制提供了可行方案。

ai_content_json.method: 采用无模型离线策略学习算法，结合有界参考校正机制，并通过仿真预训练策略初始化，直接在真实7自由度Baxter机械臂上进行训练。
ai_content_json.result: 所学策略在真实机器人上多次运行均表现稳定，轨迹跟踪精度较厂商控制器提升显著，且能适应未见过的负载变化。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法验证了深度强化学习在真实机器人控制中的有效性，为复杂动力学系统的自适应控制提供了可行方案。

search_text: Real-Robot Deep Reinforcement Learning: Improving Trajectory Tracking of Flexible-Joint Manipulator with Reference Correction 真实机器人深度强化学习：通过参考校正改进柔性关节机械臂的轨迹跟踪 Flexible-joint manipulators are governed by complex nonlinear dynamics, defining a challenging control problem. In this work, we propose an approach to learn an outer-loop joint trajectory tracking controller with deep reinforcement learning. The controller represented by a stochastic policy is learned in under two hours directly on the real robot. This is achieved through bounded reference correction actions and use of a model-free off-policy learning method. In addition, an informed policy initialization is proposed, where the agent is pre-trained in a learned simulation. We test our approach on the 7 DOF manipulator of a Baxter robot. We demonstrate that the proposed method is capable of consistent learning across multiple runs when applied directly on the real robot. Our method yields a policy which significantly improves the trajectory tracking accuracy in comparison to the vendor-provided controller, generalizing to an unseen payload. 柔性关节机械手受复杂的非线性动力学控制，定义了一个具有挑战性的控制问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过深度强化学习来学习外环联合轨迹跟踪控制器的方法。由随机策略代表的控制器是在两个小时内直接在真实机器人上学习的。这是通过有界参考校正动作和使用无模型的离策略学习方法来实现的。此外，还提出了一种明智的策略初始化，其中代理在学习模拟中进行了预训练。我们在 Baxter 机器人的 7 DOF 机械臂上测试了我们的方法。我们证明，当直接应用于真实机器人时，所提出的方法能够在多次运行中进行一致的学习。与供应商提供的控制器相比，我们的方法产生的策略显着提高了轨迹跟踪精度，并推广到不可见的有效负载。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的方法，通过参考校正直接在真实机器人上学习柔性关节机械臂的轨迹跟踪控制器。 Dmytro Pavlichenko,Sven Behnke cs.RO

title: A Microring as a Reservoir Computing Node: Memory/Nonlinear Tasks and Effect of Input Non-ideality
title_zh: 微环作为储层计算节点：记忆/非线性任务和输入非理想性的影响
abstract: The nonlinear response of an optical microresonator is used in a time multiplexed reservoir computing neural network. Within a virtual node approach combined with an offline training through ridge regression, we solved linear and nonlinear logic operations. We analyzed the nonlinearity of the microresonator as a memory between bits and/or as a neural activation function. This is made possible by controlling both the distance between bits subject to the logical operation and the number of bits supplied to the ridge regression. We show that the optical microresonator exhibits up to two bits of memory in linear tasks and that it allows solving nonlinear tasks providing both memory and nonlinearity. Finally, we demonstrate that the virtual node approach always requires a comparison of the reservoir's performance with the results obtained by applying the same training process on the input signal.
summary: The nonlinear response of an optical microresonator is used in a time multiplexed reservoir computing neural network. Within a virtual node approach combined with an offline training through ridge regression, we solved linear and nonlinear logic operations. We analyzed the nonlinearity of the microresonator as a memory between bits and/or as a neural activation function. This is made possible by controlling both the distance between bits subject to the logical operation and the number of bits supplied to the ridge regression. We show that the optical microresonator exhibits up to two bits of memory in linear tasks and that it allows solving nonlinear tasks providing both memory and nonlinearity. Finally, we demonstrate that the virtual node approach always requires a comparison of the reservoir's performance with the results obtained by applying the same training process on the input signal.
abstract_zh: 光学微谐振器的非线性响应用于时分复用储层计算神经网络。通过虚拟节点方法与岭回归离线训练相结合，我们解决了线性和非线性逻辑运算。我们分析了微谐振器作为位之间的存储器和/或作为神经激活函数的非线性。这是通过控制进行逻辑运算的位之间的距离和提供给岭回归的位数来实现的。我们表明，光学微谐振器在线性任务中表现出高达两位的记忆，并且它允许解决提供记忆和非线性的非线性任务。最后，我们证明虚拟节点方法总是需要将水库的性能与对输入信号应用相同的训练过程所获得的结果进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了光学微谐振器在时间复用的储备计算神经网络中的非线性响应，并探讨了其在执行线性和非线性逻辑操作中的记忆和非线性特性。
AI.motivation: 光学微谐振器因其非线性特性和潜在的记忆能力，被提出作为储备计算节点，用于处理复杂的逻辑任务。
AI.method: 作者采用虚拟节点方法结合离线岭回归训练，分析了微谐振器的非线性特性，并通过控制比特间距和输入比特数量来解决线性和非线性逻辑任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，光学微谐振器在执行线性任务时可表现出最多两位的记忆能力，并能够通过结合记忆和非线性特性解决非线性任务。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟节点方法在储备计算中有效，但需要始终将储备器的性能与直接对输入信号进行相同训练过程的结果进行比较，以确保其优越性。

title: Soft-margin classification of object manifolds
title_zh: 对象流形的软边缘分类
abstract: A neural population responding to multiple appearances of a single object defines a manifold in the neural response space. The ability to classify such manifolds is of interest, as object recognition and other computational tasks require a response that is insensitive to variability within a manifold. Linear classification of object manifolds was previously studied for max-margin classifiers. Soft-margin classifiers are a larger class of algorithms and provide an additional regularization parameter used in applications to optimize performance outside the training set by balancing between making fewer training errors and learning more robust classifiers. Here we develop a mean-field theory describing the behavior of soft-margin classifiers applied to object manifolds. Analyzing manifolds with increasing complexity, from points through spheres to general manifolds, a mean-field theory describes the expected value of the linear classifier's norm, as well as the distribution of fields and slack variables. By analyzing the robustness of the learned classification to noise, we can predict the probability of classification errors and their dependence on regularization, demonstrating a finite optimal choice. The theory describes a previously unknown phase transition, corresponding to the disappearance of a non-trivial solution, thus providing a soft version of the well-known classification capacity of max-margin classifiers.
summary: A neural population responding to multiple appearances of a single object defines a manifold in the neural response space. The ability to classify such manifolds is of interest, as object recognition and other computational tasks require a response that is insensitive to variability within a manifold. Linear classification of object manifolds was previously studied for max-margin classifiers. Soft-margin classifiers are a larger class of algorithms and provide an additional regularization parameter used in applications to optimize performance outside the training set by balancing between making fewer training errors and learning more robust classifiers. Here we develop a mean-field theory describing the behavior of soft-margin classifiers applied to object manifolds. Analyzing manifolds with increasing complexity, from points through spheres to general manifolds, a mean-field theory describes the expected value of the linear classifier's norm, as well as the distribution of fields and slack variables. By analyzing the robustness of the learned classification to noise, we can predict the probability of classification errors and their dependence on regularization, demonstrating a finite optimal choice. The theory describes a previously unknown phase transition, corresponding to the disappearance of a non-trivial solution, thus providing a soft version of the well-known classification capacity of max-margin classifiers.
abstract_zh: 对单个对象的多次出现做出响应的神经群体定义了神经响应空间中的流形。对此类流形进行分类的能力很有趣，因为对象识别和其他计算任务需要对流形内的变化不敏感的响应。对象流形的线性分类之前曾针对最大边缘分类器进行过研究。软边缘分类器是一类更大的算法，它提供了应用程序中使用的附加正则化参数，通过在减少训练错误和学习更鲁棒的分类器之间进行平衡来优化训练集之外的性能。在这里，我们开发了一种平均场理论，描述应用于对象流形的软边缘分类器的行为。通过分析复杂性不断增加的流形（从点到球体再到一般流形），平均场理论描述了线性分类器范数的期望值，以及场和松弛变量的分布。通过分析学习分类对噪声的鲁棒性，我们可以预测分类错误的概率及其对正则化的依赖性，从而证明有限的最优选择。该理论描述了先前未知的相变，对应于非平凡解决方案的消失，从而提供了众所周知的最大边缘分类器分类能力的软版本。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种均场理论，用于描述软边距分类器在物体流形上的行为，分析其分类鲁棒性及正则化参数优化。
AI.motivation: 物体识别等任务需对流形内变化不敏感的响应，而软边距分类器通过平衡训练误差与鲁棒性提升性能，需建立其理论分析框架。
AI.method: 基于均场理论，分析从点到球体再到一般流形的复杂度递增场景，推导分类器范数期望值、场分布及松弛变量分布，并通过噪声鲁棒性分析预测错误概率。
AI.result: 理论揭示了分类错误概率与正则化的依赖关系，确定有限最优正则化参数，并发现对应非平凡解消失的相变现象。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为最大边距分类器的分类能力提供了软版本解释，阐明了正则化参数优化机制及流形复杂度对分类性能的影响。

The theory describes a previously unknown phase transition, corresponding to the disappearance of a non-trivial solution, thus providing a soft version of the well-known classification capacity of max-margin classifiers. 对单个对象的多次出现做出响应的神经群体定义了神经响应空间中的流形。对此类流形进行分类的能力很有趣，因为对象识别和其他计算任务需要对流形内的变化不敏感的响应。对象流形的线性分类之前曾针对最大边缘分类器进行过研究。软边缘分类器是一类更大的算法，它提供了应用程序中使用的附加正则化参数，通过在减少训练错误和学习更鲁棒的分类器之间进行平衡来优化训练集之外的性能。在这里，我们开发了一种平均场理论，描述应用于对象流形的软边缘分类器的行为。通过分析复杂性不断增加的流形（从点到球体再到一般流形），平均场理论描述了线性分类器范数的期望值，以及场和松弛变量的分布。通过分析学习分类对噪声的鲁棒性，我们可以预测分类错误的概率及其对正则化的依赖性，从而证明有限的最优选择。该理论描述了先前未知的相变，对应于非平凡解决方案的消失，从而提供了众所周知的最大边缘分类器分类能力的软版本。 本文开发了一种均场理论，用于描述软边距分类器在物体流形上的行为，分析其分类鲁棒性及正则化参数优化。 Uri Cohen,Haim Sompolinsky cond-mat.dis-nn,cond-mat.stat-mech,cs.NE,q-bio.NC,stat.ML
